    // Let me check if there are any canceled reservations in the user's history
    // First, let me check all reservations again but look for any with status "cancelled"
    val allReservations = user.reservations.map { reservationId =>
      try {
        getReservationDetails(reservationId)
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => null
      }
    }
    
    val canceledReservations = allReservations.filter(r => r != null && r.status.contains("cancelled"))
    
    println(s"Found ${canceledReservations.size} canceled reservations:")
    canceledReservations.foreach { reservation =>
      println(s"\nReservation ID: ${reservation.reservationId}")
      println(s"Cabin: ${reservation.cabin}")
      println(s"Trip type: ${reservation.flightType}")
      println(s"Origin: ${reservation.origin} -> Destination: ${reservation.destination}")
      println(s"Number of passengers: ${reservation.passengers.size}")
      println(s"Insurance: ${reservation.insurance}")
      println(s"Created at: ${reservation.createdAt}")
      println(s"Flights: ${reservation.flights.map(f => s"${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}").mkString(", ")}")
    }
    
    // Also check if any flights were business class
    val businessReservations = allReservations.filter(r => r != null && r.cabin == "business")
    println(s"\n\nFound ${businessReservations.size} business class reservations:")
    businessReservations.foreach { reservation =>
      println(s"\nReservation ID: ${reservation.reservationId}")
      println(s"Status: ${reservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
      println(s"Trip type: ${reservation.flightType}")
      println(s"Origin: ${reservation.origin} -> Destination: ${reservation.destination}")
      println(s"Number of passengers: ${reservation.passengers.size}")
      println(s"Insurance: ${reservation.insurance}")
      println(s"Created at: ${reservation.createdAt}")
    }

    import scala.language.unsafeNulls
    
    // Search for direct flights from New York airports to Chicago on May 10th
    val nyAirportCodes = List("JFK", "LGA", "EWR")
    val chicagoAirportCode = "ORD"
    val searchDate = "2024-05-10"
    
    println("Searching for flights from New York airports to Chicago on May 10th:")
    nyAirportCodes.foreach { origin =>
      try {
        val flights = searchDirectFlight(origin, chicagoAirportCode, searchDate)
        println(s"\nFrom $origin to ORD on $searchDate:")
        if (flights.isEmpty) {
          println("  No direct flights found")
        } else {
          flights.foreach { flight =>
            println(s"  Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.status}")
            println(s"    Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}, Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
            println(s"    Business class price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("business", "N/A")}")
          }
        }
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => println(s"  Error searching $origin to ORD: ${e.getMessage}")
      }
    }

    // Check each reservation to find the one with flight HAT045
    val reservations = user.reservations.map { reservationId =>
      try {
        val reservation = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
        (reservationId, reservation)
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => (reservationId, null)
      }
    }
    
    // Look for reservations with flight HAT045 from PHX to SEA
    var foundReservation: Option[(String, Reservation)] = None
    var foundFlightInfo: Option[(String, ReservationFlight)] = None
    
    for ((reservationId, reservation) <- reservations if reservation != null) {
      println(s"\nChecking reservation: $reservationId")
      println(s"Origin: ${reservation.origin}, Destination: ${reservation.destination}")
      println(s"Flights: ${reservation.flights.map(f => s"${f.flightNumber} (${f.date})").mkString(", ")}")
      
      // Check each flight in the reservation
      for (flight <- reservation.flights) {
        if (flight.flightNumber == "HAT045" && flight.origin == "PHX" && flight.destination == "SEA") {
          foundReservation = Some((reservationId, reservation))
          foundFlightInfo = Some((reservationId, flight))
          println(s"Found flight HAT045 from PHX to SEA on ${flight.date}")
        }
      }
    }
    
    // Check flight status for today's date (2024-05-15)
    println(s"\nChecking flight status for HAT045 on 2024-05-15...")
    try {
      val status = getFlightStatus("HAT045", "2024-05-15")
      println(s"Flight HAT045 status on 2024-05-15: $status")
    } catch {
      case e: Exception => println(s"Could not get flight status for HAT045 on 2024-05-15: ${e.getMessage}")
    }
    
    // If we found a reservation, check its details
    foundReservation match {
      case Some((resId, res)) =>
        println(s"\nFound reservation with HAT045: $resId")
        println(s"Reservation status: ${res.status.getOrElse("active")}")
        println(s"Cabin class: ${res.cabin}")
        println(s"Insurance: ${res.insurance}")
        println(s"Passengers: ${res.passengers.length}")
        
      case None =>
        println("\nNo reservation found with flight HAT045 from PHX to SEA.")
    }

    val freeBagsPerPassenger = 4
    val totalFreeBags = freeBagsPerPassenger * reservation.passengers.size
    println(s"As a Gold member with business class, you get $freeBagsPerPassenger free checked bags per passenger.")
    println(s"For 2 passengers, that's $totalFreeBags free checked bags in total.")
    
    // You want to add 2 checked bags
    val desiredTotalBags = 2
    val nonfreeBags = if (desiredTotalBags > totalFreeBags) desiredTotalBags - totalFreeBags else 0
    println(s"\nIf you want $desiredTotalBags total checked bags:")

    // Check dates around May 22nd
    val datesToCheck = List("2024-05-21", "2024-05-22", "2024-05-23")
    datesToCheck.foreach { date =>
      val flights = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "MCO", date)
      if (flights.nonEmpty) {
        println(s"Direct flights from JFK to MCO on $date:")
        flights.foreach { flight =>
          println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
          println(s"    Economy price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", "N/A")}")

    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("ATL", "PHL", "2024-05-24")
    println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.size} one-stop flight options from ATL to PHL on 2024-05-24")
    
    // We need to check economy availability for both segments
    val availableOneStopEconomy = oneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      firstFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
      secondFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0
    }
    
    if (availableOneStopEconomy.isEmpty) {
      println("No one-stop economy flights available on 2024-05-24")
    } else {
      println("\nAvailable one-stop economy flights:")
      availableOneStopEconomy.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flightPair, idx) =>
        val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
        val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
        val totalPrice = firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0) + secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
        println(s"\nOption ${idx + 1}:")
        println(s"First leg: ${firstFlight.flightNumber} (ATL -> ${firstFlight.destination})")
        println(s"  Departure: ${firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Arrival: ${firstFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Price: $${firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
        println(s"Second leg: ${secondFlight.flightNumber} (${secondFlight.origin} -> PHL)")
        println(s"  Departure: ${secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Arrival: ${secondFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Price: $${secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
        println(s"Total price: $$$totalPrice")
      }
      
      // Find the cheapest option
      val cheapestOption = availableOneStopEconomy.minBy { flightPair =>
        val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
        val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
        firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0) + secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      }
      
      val firstFlight = cheapestOption(0)
      val secondFlight = cheapestOption(1)
      val cheapestTotalPrice = firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0) + secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      
      println(s"\nCheapest one-stop option:")
      println(s"${firstFlight.flightNumber} (ATL -> ${firstFlight.destination}) + ${secondFlight.flightNumber} (${secondFlight.origin} -> PHL)")
      println(s"Total price: $$$cheapestTotalPrice")

    // Get all one-stop options for May 24

    val cheapestMay24Business = allMay24Options.map { pair =>
      pair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", 0) + pair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
    }.min
    
    println(s"\nCheapest business class option on May 24: $$$cheapestMay24Business")

ERROR #57  [COMPILATION]  generic -- Error
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    44 (trial 0)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Calculate flight durations in hours
    // Helper function to parse time strings
    import java.time.LocalTime
    import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    import java.time.Duration
    
    def parseTime(timeStr: String): LocalTime = {
      // Handle +1 notation for next day
      val cleanTime = if (timeStr.contains("+")) timeStr.split("\+")(0) else timeStr
      LocalTime.parse(cleanTime, DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("HH:mm:ss"))
    }
    
    def calculateDuration(depStr: String, arrStr: String): Double = {
      val dep = parseTime(depStr)
      val arr = parseTime(arrStr)
      
      // Handle next day arrival (arrival time earlier than departure)
      val duration = if (arr.isBefore(dep)) {
        Duration.between(dep, LocalTime.MAX).plus(Duration.between(LocalTime.MIN, arr)).plus(Duration.ofHours(1))
      } else {
        Duration.between(dep, arr)
      }
      
      duration.toMinutes.toDouble / 60.0
    }
    
    // Calculate durations for each flight
    val flightsWithDurations = flightsWithTimes.map { case (fn, date, orig, dest, dep, arr) =>
      val duration = calculateDuration(dep, arr)
      (fn, date, orig, dest, dep, arr, duration)
    }
    
    println("Flight durations:")
    flightsWithDurations.foreach { case (fn, date, orig, dest, dep, arr, dur) =>
      println(f"  $fn on $date: $orig -> $dest: ${dur}%.1f hours")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    9 |  val cleanTime = if (timeStr.contains("+")) timeStr.split("\+")(0) else timeStr
      |                                                             ^
      |                                                  invalid escape character

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let's find the cheapest round-trip combination
    println("Finding cheapest round-trip combinations...")
    
    var cheapestCombination: Option[(DirectFlight, DirectFlight, Int)] = None
    var cheapestPrice = Int.MaxValue
    
    for ((depOrigin, depDest, depFlight) <- departureFlights) {
      for ((retOrigin, retDest, retFlight) <- returnFlights) {
        // Check if this is a valid round-trip (departure destination matches return origin)
        if (depDest == retOrigin && depOrigin == retDest) {
          val depPrice = depFlight.prices.getOrElse("basic_economy", Int.MaxValue)
          val retPrice = retFlight.prices.getOrElse("basic_economy", Int.MaxValue)
          val totalPrice = depPrice + retPrice
          
          if (totalPrice < cheapestPrice) {
            cheapestPrice = totalPrice
            cheapestCombination = Some((depFlight, retFlight, totalPrice))
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    println("\nCheapest round-trip combination:")
    cheapestCombination match {
      case Some((depFlight, retFlight, totalPrice)) =>
        println(s"Departure: ${depFlight.flightNumber} from ${depFlight.origin} to ${depFlight.destination} on $departureDate")
        println(s"  Basic economy price: $${depFlight.prices.getOrElse("basic_economy", "N/A")}")
        println(s"Return: ${retFlight.flightNumber} from ${retFlight.origin} to ${retFlight.destination} on $returnDate")
        println(s"  Basic economy price: $${retFlight.prices.getOrElse("basic_economy", "N/A")}")
        println(s"Total round-trip price: $$$totalPrice")
      case None =>
        println("No valid round-trip combinations found")
    }
    
    // Also show all departure flights for reference
    println("\nAll available departure flights (May 20):")
    departureFlights.foreach { case (origin, dest, flight) =>
      println(s"${flight.flightNumber}: $origin -> $dest, Basic economy: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("basic_economy", "N/A")}")
    }
    
    println("\nAll available return flights (May 25):")
    returnFlights.foreach { case (origin, dest, flight) =>
      println(s"${flight.flightNumber}: $origin -> $dest, Basic economy: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("basic_economy", "N/A")}")
    }

        reservationId = "YAX4DR",

        flights = List(
          FlightInfo("HAT013", "2024-05-18"),
          FlightInfo("HAT298", "2024-05-19")
        ),

      )
    }

      case scala.util.Success(res) => 
        println("✓ Successfully updated flights and cabin to business class!")
        println(s"  New cabin: ${res.cabin}")
        println(s"  New total price: $${res.flights.map(_.price).sum}")

            println(s"\n✗ Error adding bags: ${e.getMessage}")

ERROR #95  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    32 (trial 1)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // First, let me check if there are any delayed or cancelled flights in your reservation
    // that might qualify for compensation
    println("Checking flight statuses for compensation eligibility:")
    
    var hasDelayedOrCancelled = false
    for (flight <- currentReservation.flights) {
      val status = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: $status")
      if (status == "delayed" || status == "cancelled") {
        hasDelayedOrCancelled = true
      }
    }
    
    println()
    println("Compensation eligibility check:")
    println(s"1. Membership level: ${user.membership}")
    println(s"2. Travel insurance: ${currentReservation.insurance}")
    println(s"3. Cabin class: ${currentReservation.cabin}")
    println(s"4. Any delayed/cancelled flights: $hasDelayedOrCancelled")
    println()
    
    // According to policy, compensation can be offered if:
    // 1. User is silver/gold member OR has travel insurance OR flies business
    // 2. AND the user complains about cancelled flights (or delayed flights with change/cancellation)
    
    val eligibleForCompensation = user.membership == "silver" || user.membership == "gold" || 
                                  currentReservation.insurance == "yes" || 
                                  currentReservation.cabin == "business"
    
    println(s"Eligible for compensation: $eligibleForCompensation")
    println()
    
    if (eligibleForCompensation && hasDelayedOrCancelled) {
      val numPassengers = currentReservation.passengers.length
      val compensationAmount = if (hasDelayedOrCancelled) 50 * numPassengers else 0
      println(s"If you have a delayed/cancelled flight and want to change/cancel, you could receive: $${compensationAmount} certificate")
      println(s"($50 per passenger for ${numPassengers} passengers)")
    } else {
      println("No compensation available based on current situation.")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    37 |  println(s"($50 per passenger for ${numPassengers} passengers)")
       |             ^
       |invalid string interpolation: `$$`, `$"`, `$`ident or `$`BlockExpr expected

ERROR #96  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    32 (trial 1)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // First, let me check if there are any delayed or cancelled flights in your reservation
    // that might qualify for compensation
    println("Checking flight statuses for compensation eligibility:")
    
    var hasDelayedOrCancelled = false
    for (flight <- currentReservation.flights) {
      val status = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: $status")
      if (status == "delayed" || status == "cancelled") {
        hasDelayedOrCancelled = true
      }
    }
    
    println()
    println("Compensation eligibility check:")
    println(s"1. Membership level: ${user.membership}")
    println(s"2. Travel insurance: ${currentReservation.insurance}")
    println(s"3. Cabin class: ${currentReservation.cabin}")
    println(s"4. Any delayed/cancelled flights: $hasDelayedOrCancelled")
    println()
    
    // According to policy, compensation can be offered if:
    // 1. User is silver/gold member OR has travel insurance OR flies business
    // 2. AND the user complains about cancelled flights (or delayed flights with change/cancellation)
    
    val eligibleForCompensation = user.membership == "silver" || user.membership == "gold" || 
                                  currentReservation.insurance == "yes" || 
                                  currentReservation.cabin == "business"
    
    println(s"Eligible for compensation: $eligibleForCompensation")
    println()
    
    if (eligibleForCompensation && hasDelayedOrCancelled) {
      val numPassengers = currentReservation.passengers.length
      val compensationAmount = if (hasDelayedOrCancelled) 50 * numPassengers else 0
      println(s"If you have a delayed/cancelled flight and want to change/cancel, you could receive: $${compensationAmount} certificate")
      println(s"($50 per passenger for $numPassengers passengers)")
    } else {

    // First, let me check if there are any delayed or cancelled flights in your reservation
    // that might qualify for compensation
    println("Checking flight statuses for compensation eligibility:")
    
    var hasDelayedOrCancelled = false
    for (flight <- currentReservation.flights) {
      val status = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: $status")
      if (status == "delayed" || status == "cancelled") {
        hasDelayedOrCancelled = true
      }
    }
    
    println()
    println("Compensation eligibility check:")
    println(s"1. Membership level: ${user.membership}")
    println(s"2. Travel insurance: ${currentReservation.insurance}")
    println(s"3. Cabin class: ${currentReservation.cabin}")
    println(s"4. Any delayed/cancelled flights: $hasDelayedOrCancelled")
    println()
    
    // According to policy, compensation can be offered if:
    // 1. User is silver/gold member OR has travel insurance OR flies business
    // 2. AND the user complains about cancelled flights (or delayed flights with change/cancellation)
    
    val eligibleForCompensation = user.membership == "silver" || user.membership == "gold" || 
                                  currentReservation.insurance == "yes" || 
                                  currentReservation.cabin == "business"
    
    println(s"Eligible for compensation: $eligibleForCompensation")
    println()
    
    if (eligibleForCompensation && hasDelayedOrCancelled) {
      val numPassengers = currentReservation.passengers.length
      val compensationAmount = if (hasDelayedOrCancelled) 50 * numPassengers else 0
      println(s"If you have a delayed/cancelled flight and want to change/cancel, you could receive: $" + compensationAmount + " certificate")

    } else {
      println("No compensation available based on current situation.")

    // Get one-stop flight options and calculate total economy prices
    val oneStopEconomyFlights = oneStopFlights.filter { flights =>
      flights.forall { flight =>
        flight.status == "available" && 
        flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
        flight.prices.contains("economy")
      }
    }.map { flights =>
      val totalPrice = flights.map(_.prices("economy")).sum
      (flights, totalPrice)
    }.sortBy(_._2)

      flights.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flight, legIndex) =>
        println(s"   Leg ${legIndex + 1}: Flight ${flight.flightNumber} from ${flight.origin} to ${flight.destination}")
        println(s"        Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
        println(s"        Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")

    println(s"   Departure: 14:00:00 EST")
    println(s"   Arrival: 20:00:00 EST")
    println()

      val optionNum = index + 2

    // Get one-stop flight options and calculate total economy prices

      flights.forall { flight =>
        flight.status == "available" && 
        flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
        flight.prices.contains("economy")
      }

    println("\nSECOND CHEAPEST ECONOMY OPTION:")

      println(s"Option: ${secondCheapestFlights.map(_.flightNumber).mkString(" + ")}")
      println(s"Total price: $$$secondCheapestPrice")
      secondCheapestFlights.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flight, legIndex) =>
        println(s"Leg ${legIndex + 1}: Flight ${flight.flightNumber}")
        println(s"   From: ${flight.origin} to ${flight.destination}")
        println(s"   Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
        println(s"   Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
        println(s"   Price: $${flight.prices("economy")}")
      }
    } else {
      println("Only one economy option available (direct flight HAT023)")
    }

    println(s"New cabin (business): 4 free bags")

      method match {
        case PaymentMethod.GiftCard(_, amount) =>
          totalGiftCardBalance += amount
          println(s"Gift card ID: $id, Balance: $$$amount")
        case PaymentMethod.Certificate(_, amount) =>
          totalCertificateBalance += amount
          println(s"Certificate ID: $id, Balance: $$$amount")

          println(s"Credit card: $brand ending in $lastFour")
        case _ => // ignore other types
      }

      var mostRecentTime: String = ""
      
      for (reservationId <- user.reservations) {
        try {
          val reservation = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
          if (mostRecentReservation.isEmpty || reservation.createdAt > mostRecentTime) {
            mostRecentReservation = Some(reservation)
            mostRecentTime = reservation.createdAt
          }
        } catch {
          case e: Exception => println(s"Could not retrieve reservation $reservationId: ${e.getMessage}")
        }
      }
      
      mostRecentReservation match {
        case Some(reservation) =>
          println(s"\nMost recent reservation: ${reservation.reservationId}")
          println(s"Created at: ${reservation.createdAt}")
          println(s"Origin: ${reservation.origin} -> Destination: ${reservation.destination}")
          println(s"Flight type: ${reservation.flightType}")
          println(s"Cabin class: ${reservation.cabin}")
          println(s"Passengers: ${reservation.passengers.length}")
          println(s"Flights:")
          reservation.flights.foreach { flight =>
            println(s"  - ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: ${flight.origin} to ${flight.destination}")
          }
        case None =>
          println("\nCould not retrieve any reservation details.")
      }
    } else {
      println("\nYou don't have any reservations.")

    // Let me check the policy by looking at the booking API constraints
    println("=== Checking payment method constraints ===")
    
    // First, let me check what the policy says about payment methods
    println("From the policy:")
    println("1. Each reservation can use at most one travel certificate")
    println("2. Each reservation can use at most one credit card")
    println("3. Each reservation can use at most three gift cards")
    println("4. All payment methods must already be in user profile for safety reasons")

    println("Passenger 2: $871 - $250 certificate = $621 remaining")
    println("Passenger 3: $871 - $250 certificate = $621 remaining")

    // Then use gift cards
    println("\nOption 2: Use gift cards for remaining amounts")
    println(s"Available gift cards: $129 + $198 = $327")
    println(s"Remaining after gift cards: $1,613 - $327 = $1,286")
    println("This would go to MasterCard")

    println("Passenger 2: $871 - $250 certificate - $198 gift card = $423")
    println("Passenger 3: $871 - $250 certificate = $621")
    println("Total MasterCard charge: $242 + $423 + $621 = $1,286")
    
    println("\n=== Conclusion ===")
    println("The MasterCard charge remains $1,286 regardless of booking method.")
    println("This is because the total cost ($2,613) minus total certificates ($1,000) minus total gift cards ($327) = $1,286")

  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json

  --- Scala Code ---
    // First, let me verify the payment method IDs and amounts
    val user = getUserDetails("mohamed_silva_9265")
    println("=== Verifying Payment Methods ===")
    println("Your payment methods:")
    
    var certificate500: Option[String] = None
    var certificate250a: Option[String] = None
    var certificate250b: Option[String] = None
    var giftCard129: Option[String] = None
    var giftCard198: Option[String] = None
    var mastercardId: Option[String] = None
    
    user.paymentMethods.foreach { case (id, method) =>
      method match {
        case PaymentMethod.Certificate(_, amount) =>
          println(s"Certificate $id: $$$amount")
          if (amount == 500.0) certificate500 = Some(id)
          else if (amount == 250.0) {
            if (certificate250a.isEmpty) certificate250a = Some(id)
            else certificate250b = Some(id)
          }
        case PaymentMethod.GiftCard(_, amount) =>
          println(s"Gift card $id: $$$amount")
          if (amount == 129.0) giftCard129 = Some(id)
          else if (amount == 198.0) giftCard198 = Some(id)
        case PaymentMethod.CreditCard(id, brand, lastFour) =>
          println(s"Credit card $id: $brand ending in $lastFour")
          if (brand == "mastercard") mastercardId = Some(id)
        case _ => // ignore
      }
    }
    
    println("\n=== Payment Method Assignment ===")
    println(s"$500 certificate: ${certificate500.getOrElse("NOT FOUND")}")
    println(s"$250 certificate (for Aarav): ${certificate250a.getOrElse("NOT FOUND")}")
    println(s"$250 certificate (for Evelyn): ${certificate250b.getOrElse("NOT FOUND")}")
    println(s"$129 gift card: ${giftCard129.getOrElse("NOT FOUND")}")
    println(s"$198 gift card: ${giftCard198.getOrElse("NOT FOUND")}")
    println(s"MasterCard: ${mastercardId.getOrElse("NOT FOUND")}")
    
    // Calculate exact charges
    val pricePerPassenger = 871
    println(s"\n=== Price Calculation ===")
    println(s"Price per passenger: $$$pricePerPassenger")
    
    println("\n=== Reservation 1 (Mohamed - using $500 certificate and $129 gift card) ===")
    val remaining1 = pricePerPassenger - 500 - 129
    println(s"$871 - $500 - $129 = $$$remaining1")
    
    println("\n=== Reservation 2 (Aarav - using $250 certificate and $198 gift card) ===")
    val remaining2 = pricePerPassenger - 250 - 198
    println(s"$871 - $250 - $198 = $$$remaining2")
    
    println("\n=== Reservation 3 (Evelyn - using $250 certificate) ===")
    val remaining3 = pricePerPassenger - 250
    println(s"$871 - $250 = $$$remaining3")
    
    println("\n=== Summary ===")
    println(s"Reservation 1 MasterCard charge: $$$remaining1")
    println(s"Reservation 2 MasterCard charge: $$$remaining2")
    println(s"Reservation 3 MasterCard charge: $$$remaining3")
    val totalMastercard = remaining1 + remaining2 + remaining3
    println(s"\nTOTAL MasterCard charge: $$$totalMastercard")
    
    // Verify this matches our earlier calculation
    println(s"\nVerification: $2,613 total - $1,000 certificates - $327 gift cards = $1,286")
    println(s"Calculated total: $$$totalMastercard")
    println(s"Match: ${totalMastercard == 1286}")
    
    println("\n=== Final Confirmation ===")
    println("If we proceed, here are the exact charges:")
    println("1. Mohamed's reservation: $242 to MasterCard")
    println("2. Aarav's reservation: $423 to MasterCard")
    println("3. Evelyn's reservation: $621 to MasterCard")
    println("TOTAL: $1,286 to MasterCard")

    // Book reservation 1: Mohamed
    println("=== Booking Reservation 1: Mohamed ===")
    
    val userId = "mohamed_silva_9265"
    val origin = "JFK"
    val destination = "SFO"
    val flightType = FlightType.RoundTrip
    val cabin = Cabin.Business
    
    // Flight information
    val flights = List(
      FlightInfo("HAT023", "2024-05-26"),
      FlightInfo("HAT204", "2024-05-28"),
      FlightInfo("HAT100", "2024-05-28")
    )
    
    // Passenger: Mohamed
    val passenger1 = Passenger("Mohamed", "Silva", "1960-11-26")
    
    // Payment methods: $500 certificate + $129 gift card + $242 MasterCard
    // Total: $871
    val payment1 = List(
      Payment("certificate_3765853", 500),  // $500 certificate
      Payment("gift_card_6136092", 129),    // $129 gift card
      Payment("credit_card_2198526", 242)   // $242 MasterCard
    )
    
    // Baggage: Regular member with Business class gets 2 free bags per passenger
    // Since Mohamed has 2 free bags and no additional bags needed:
    val totalBaggages1 = 2
    val nonfreeBaggages1 = 0  // All bags are free
    
    // No insurance
    val insurance = Insurance.No
    
    println("Booking details:")
    println(s"Passenger: ${passenger1.firstName} ${passenger1.lastName}")
    println(s"Flights: ${flights.map(f => s"${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}").mkString(", ")}")
    println(s"Cabin: $cabin")
    println(s"Payment: $500 certificate + $129 gift card + $242 MasterCard = $871")
    println(s"Baggage: $totalBaggages1 bags ($nonfreeBaggages1 paid)")
    println(s"Insurance: $insurance")
    
    try {
      val reservation1 = bookReservation(
        userId = userId,
        origin = origin,
        destination = destination,
        flightType = flightType,
        cabin = cabin,
        flights = flights,
        passengers = List(passenger1),
        paymentMethods = payment1,
        totalBaggages = totalBaggages1,
        nonfreeBaggages = nonfreeBaggages1,
        insurance = insurance
      )
      
      println(s"\n✓ Reservation 1 created successfully!")
      println(s"Reservation ID: ${reservation1.reservationId}")
      println(s"Total paid: ${reservation1.paymentHistory.map(_.amount).sum}")
      
    } catch {
      case e: Exception =>
        println(s"\n✗ Error booking reservation 1: ${e.getMessage}")
        throw e
    }

    // Check current business class prices for WUNA5K flights
    println("Checking business class prices for WUNA5K flights:")
    
    wunRes.flights.foreach { f =>
      val searchResults = searchDirectFlight(f.origin, f.destination, f.date)
      val matchedFlight = searchResults.find(_.flightNumber == f.flightNumber)
      
      matchedFlight match {
        case Some(flight) =>
          val currentBusinessPrice = flight.prices.get("business")
          val currentEconomyPrice = flight.prices.get("economy")
          println(s"  ${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}:")
          println(s"    Current economy price: $${currentEconomyPrice.getOrElse("N/A")}")
          println(s"    Current business price: $${currentBusinessPrice.getOrElse("N/A")}")
          println(s"    Original booked price: $${f.price}")
        case None =>
          println(s"  ${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}: Flight not found in search")

      matchedFlight match {
        case Some(flight) =>
          val currentBusinessPrice = flight.prices.get("business")
          val currentEconomyPrice = flight.prices.get("economy")
          println(s"  ${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}:")
          println(s"    Current economy price: $" + currentEconomyPrice.getOrElse("N/A"))
          println(s"    Current business price: $" + currentBusinessPrice.getOrElse("N/A"))
          println(s"    Original booked price: $" + f.price)
        case None =>
          println(s"  ${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}: Flight not found in search")
      }
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    13 |      println(s"    Current economy price: $" + currentEconomyPrice.getOrElse("N/A"))

    val returnPrice = 507   // HAT204 + HAT100 business class (cheapest one-stop)

    println(s"Cost per passenger: $$$costPerPassenger")
    
    // Calculate total cost for all 3 passengers

    println(s"Total cost for 3 passengers: $$$totalCost")

    // User is regular member, business class passengers get 2 free bags each

    val totalFreeBags = freeBagsPerPassenger * 3
    println(s"\nBaggage allowance:")

    val giftCardBalance = 327.0
    val totalAvailableBalance = certificateBalance + giftCardBalance
    
    println(s"\nAvailable payment balances:")
    println(s"- Travel certificates: $$$certificateBalance")
    println(s"- Gift cards: $$$giftCardBalance")
    println(s"- Total available balance: $$$totalAvailableBalance")
    
    // Calculate MasterCard charge
    val mastercardCharge = totalCost - totalAvailableBalance
    println(s"\nMasterCard charge calculation:")
    println(s"Total cost: $$$totalCost")
    println(s"- Available balance: $$$totalAvailableBalance")
    println(s"= MasterCard charge: $$$mastercardCharge")

    val originalCost = 567
    println(s"\nOriginal basic economy reservation cost: $$$originalCost")
    println(s"MasterCard charge for new business booking: $$$mastercardCharge")
    println(s"Difference: $$${mastercardCharge - originalCost}")
    
    if (mastercardCharge < originalCost) {
      println("\n✓ MasterCard charge would be LESS than original basic economy cost")

    for (flightPair <- oneStopFlights) {
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      
      // Check if business class is available on both flights
      if (firstFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 && 
          secondFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0) {
        
        val businessPrice1 = firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
        val businessPrice2 = secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
        val totalPrice = businessPrice1 + businessPrice2
        
        if (cheapestOption.isEmpty || totalPrice < cheapestOption.get._2) {
          cheapestOption = Some((flightPair, totalPrice))
        }
      }
    }
    
    cheapestOption match {
      case Some((flights, price)) =>
        println(s"\nCheapest one-stop business class option:")
        println(s"First flight: ${flights(0).flightNumber} (${flights(0).origin} to ${flights(0).destination}) - $${flights(0).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")

        println(s"Total price per person: $$$price")
        println(s"Total for 2 passengers: $${price * 2}")
      case None =>
        println("\nNo one-stop business class options available")
    }

    // Check other flights on different dates for cheaper business class options
    // First, let's check other BOS to MCO flights on May 18
    println("Alternative BOS to MCO flights on 2024-05-18 with business class:")
    val altFlightsBOS_MCO = search1.filter(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0)
    altFlightsBOS_MCO.foreach { flight =>
      val businessPrice = flight.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
      val departureTime = flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: Business class = $$$businessPrice, Departs: $departureTime")
    }
    
    // Check if there are any MCO to MSP flights on May 19 with cheaper business class
    println("\nOnly MCO to MSP flight on 2024-05-19 is HAT298 at $499")
    
    // Check if there are MCO to MSP flights on different dates (May 18 or May 20)
    println("\nChecking MCO to MSP flights on 2024-05-18...")
    val searchMCO_MSP_May18 = searchDirectFlight("MCO", "MSP", "2024-05-18")
    println(s"Found ${searchMCO_MSP_May18.size} flights on May 18")
    
    println("\nChecking MCO to MSP flights on 2024-05-20...")
    val searchMCO_MSP_May20 = searchDirectFlight("MCO", "MSP", "2024-05-20")
    println(s"Found ${searchMCO_MSP_May20.size} flights on May 20")
    
    // Check for cheapest business class on May 18 and 20
    val may18Business = searchMCO_MSP_May18.filter(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0).map(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).minOption
    val may20Business = searchMCO_MSP_May20.filter(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0).map(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).minOption
    
    println("\nCheapest business class options:")
    may18Business.foreach(price => println(s"May 18: $$$price"))
    may20Business.foreach(price => println(s"May 20: $$$price"))
    
    // Calculate possible combinations within your budget
    println("\nChecking if any combination fits within your $650 upgrade budget...")
    val maxBudgetPerPerson = 650 / 2 // $650 total for 2 passengers = $325 per person
    
    // Check cheapest BOS to MCO business class
    val cheapestBOS_MCO = altFlightsBOS_MCO.map(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).minOption.getOrElse(Int.MaxValue)
    
    // Check cheapest MCO to MSP business class across different dates
    val cheapestMCO_MSP = List(
      searchMCO_MSP_May18.filter(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0).map(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).minOption,
      searchMCO_MSP_May20.filter(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0).map(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).minOption,
      Some(499) // Original HAT298 price
    ).flatten.min
    
    println(s"Cheapest BOS to MCO business: $$$cheapestBOS_MCO")
    println(s"Cheapest MCO to MSP business: $$$cheapestMCO_MSP")
    println(s"Minimum total per person: $$${cheapestBOS_MCO + cheapestMCO_MSP}")
    println(s"Your budget per person: $$$maxBudgetPerPerson")
    
    // Calculate minimum total for 2 passengers
    val minTotalForTwo = (cheapestBOS_MCO + cheapestMCO_MSP) * 2
    println(s"\nMinimum upgrade cost for 2 passengers: $$$minTotalForTwo")
    println(s"Your total budget: $$$650")

    // Final summary of all reservations
    println("=== FINAL RESERVATION SUMMARY ===")
    println(s"User: ${user.name.firstName} ${user.name.lastName}")
    println(s"Membership: ${user.membership}")
    println(s"Current Date: 2024-05-15")
    
    user.reservations.foreach { reservationId =>
      val res = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
      
      val status = res.status match {
        case Some("cancelled") => "CANCELLED"
        case None => 
          // Check if flights are in past
          val allFlightsPast = res.flights.forall(_.date < "2024-05-15")
          if (allFlightsPast) "COMPLETED" else "ACTIVE"
      }
      
      println(s"\n${"="*50}")
      println(s"Reservation: $reservationId - $status")
      println(s"${"="*50}")
      println(s"Type: ${res.flightType}")
      println(s"Cabin: ${res.cabin}")
      println(s"Route: ${res.origin} → ${res.destination}")
      println(s"Passengers: ${res.passengers.size}")
      println(s"Insurance: ${res.insurance}")
      println(s"Bags: ${res.totalBaggages} total (${res.nonfreeBaggages} paid)")
      println(s"Created: ${res.createdAt}")
      
      println(s"Flights:")
      res.flights.foreach { flight =>
        val flightStatus = try {
          getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
        } catch {
          case e: Exception => "unknown"
        }
        val dateIndicator = if (flight.date < "2024-05-15") "PAST" else if (flight.date == "2024-05-15") "TODAY" else "UPCOMING"
        println(s"  - ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date} ($dateIndicator)")
        println(s"    ${flight.origin} → ${flight.destination}, Status: $flightStatus")
      }
    }

  --- Scala Code ---
    val date = "2024-05-20"
    val directFlights = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "SEA", date)
    println(s"Found ${directFlights.size} direct flights on $date")
    
    val filteredDirect = directFlights.filter { flight =>
      flight.status == "available" && 
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
      flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst >= "11:00:00"
    }
    
    println(s"\nDirect flights after 11 AM EST with economy seats:")
    filteredDirect.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Economy seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"  Economy price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println()
    }
    
    if (filteredDirect.isEmpty) {
      println("No direct flights match your criteria. Searching for one-stop flights...")
      val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", "SEA", date)
      println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.size} one-stop options")
      
      val filteredOneStop = oneStopFlights.filter { pair =>
        val first = pair(0)
        val second = pair(1)
        first.status == "available" && second.status == "available" &&
        first.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
        second.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
        first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst >= "11:00:00"
      }
      
      println(s"\nOne-stop flights after 11 AM EST with economy seats:")
      filteredOneStop.take(5).foreach { pair =>
        val first = pair(0)
        val second = pair(1)
        println(s"Option: ${first.flightNumber} (${first.origin}->${first.destination}) -> ${second.flightNumber} (${second.origin}->${second.destination})")
        println(s"  First departure: ${first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
        println(s"  Second arrival: ${second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
        val totalPrice = first.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0) + second.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
        println(s"  Total economy price: $${totalPrice}")
        println()
      }
    }

    17 |  println(s"  Economy price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")

    // Let me recalculate with actual values
    val priceDetails = businessReservations.map { case (id, res) =>
      val originalTotalPrice = res.flights.map(_.price).sum
      
      // Get economy prices for each flight
      val economyPrices = res.flights.map { flight =>
        val economyPriceOpt = getEconomyPrice(flight.flightNumber, flight.date, flight.origin, flight.destination)
        economyPriceOpt
      }
      
      val newTotalPriceOpt = if (economyPrices.forall(_.isDefined)) {
        Some(economyPrices.map(_.get).sum)
      } else {
        None
      }
      
      (id, res, originalTotalPrice, newTotalPriceOpt)
    }
    
    println("=== Detailed Price Analysis ===")
    priceDetails.foreach { case (id, res, originalPrice, newPriceOpt) =>
      println(s"\nReservation: $id")
      println(s"  Origin: ${res.origin} -> Destination: ${res.destination}")
      println(s"  Flight dates: ${res.flights.map(_.date).distinct.mkString(", ")}")
      println(s"  Passengers: ${res.passengers.size}")
      println(s"  Original business price: $$$originalPrice")
      
      newPriceOpt match {
        case Some(newPrice) =>
          val difference = originalPrice - newPrice
          println(s"  New economy price: $$$newPrice")
          println(s"  Price difference: $$$difference (REFUND)")
          println(s"  Refund per passenger: $$${difference / res.passengers.size}")
        case None =>
          println(s"  Could not calculate new economy price")
      }
      
      // Show flight details
      println("  Flight details:")
      res.flights.foreach { flight =>
        val economyPrice = getEconomyPrice(flight.flightNumber, flight.date, flight.origin, flight.destination)
        println(s"    ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: Business $$${flight.price}, Economy $${economyPrice.getOrElse("N/A")}")

    // Replace the return flights with HAT290 and HAT175 on May 27
    
    val outboundFlight1 = FlightInfo("HAT078", "2024-05-27")
    val outboundFlight2 = FlightInfo("HAT118", "2024-05-27")
    val returnFlight1 = FlightInfo("HAT290", "2024-05-27")
    val returnFlight2 = FlightInfo("HAT175", "2024-05-27")
    
    val updatedFlights = List(outboundFlight1, outboundFlight2, returnFlight1, returnFlight2)
    
    // Update the reservation with new flights, same cabin
    val updatedReservation = updateReservationFlights(
      reservationId = "OBUT9V",
      cabin = Cabin.Economy,  // Same cabin class
      flights = updatedFlights,
      paymentId = "gift_card_7480005"  // Use smallest gift card for payment processing
    )
    
    println("Reservation updated successfully!")
    println(s"New reservation ID: ${updatedReservation.reservationId}")
    println(s"Updated flights:")
    updatedReservation.flights.foreach(f => println(s"  ${f.flightNumber} ${f.origin}-${f.destination} on ${f.date} price=$${f.price}"))
    println(s"Total price: $${updatedReservation.flights.map(_.price).sum}")
    
    // Now update the baggage count from 1 to 2 (non-free remains 0)
    val finalReservation = updateReservationBaggages(
      reservationId = "OBUT9V",
      totalBaggages = 2,
      nonfreeBaggages = 0,
      paymentId = "gift_card_7480005"
    )
    
    println("\nBaggage updated successfully!")
    println(s"Final total baggages: ${finalReservation.totalBaggages}")
    println(s"Final non-free baggages: ${finalReservation.nonfreeBaggages}")
    println(s"Reservation status: ${finalReservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
    
    // Calculate the price difference
    val originalReturnPrice = 122 + 131  // HAT084 + HAT266
    val newReturnPrice = 142 + 170       // HAT290 + HAT175
    val priceDifference = newReturnPrice - originalReturnPrice
    println(s"\nPrice analysis:")
    println(s"  Original return flights (May 28): $122 + $131 = $$$originalReturnPrice")
    println(s"  New return flights (May 27): $142 + $170 = $$$newReturnPrice")
    println(s"  Price difference: $$$priceDifference (to be charged to gift_card_7480005)")

    val membership = user.membership
    val cabin = reservation.cabin
    val passengerCount = reservation.passengers.size
    
    val freeBagsPerPassenger = cabin match {
      case "basic_economy" => membership match {
        case "regular" => 0
        case "silver" => 1
        case "gold" => 2
      }
      case "economy" => membership match {
        case "regular" => 1
        case "silver" => 2
        case "gold" => 3
      }
      case "business" => membership match {
        case "regular" => 2
        case "silver" => 3
        case "gold" => 4
      }
    }
    
    val totalFreeBags = freeBagsPerPassenger * passengerCount

    println(s"- Membership: $membership")

    println(s"- Non-free (paid) bags: $currentNonFreeBags")

    val desiredTotalBags = 1
    val additionalBagsNeeded = math.max(0, desiredTotalBags - currentTotalBags)
    val newNonFreeBags = math.max(0, desiredTotalBags - totalFreeBags)

    println(s"- Additional bags needed: $additionalBagsNeeded")

    // Calculate cost
    val bagCost = if (newNonFreeBags > currentNonFreeBags) {
      val additionalPaidBags = newNonFreeBags - currentNonFreeBags

        case Some(flight) =>

    println(s"Mixed class (outbound business + return economy) total: $" + mixedTotal)
    println(s"Upgrade cost for mixed class: $" + mixedUpgradeCost)
    
    // Baggage calculation for mixed class
    val baggageCostMixed = 0 // Still 0 since 2 bags < free allowance
    
    val totalCostMixed = mixedUpgradeCost + baggageCostMixed
    println(s"\nTotal cost for mixed class upgrade + 2 bags: $" + totalCostMixed)
    
    println("\nOption 1: Upgrade ALL flights to business class")
    println(s"  - Cost: $644 (exceeds your $200 budget)")
    println("\nOption 2: Upgrade ONLY outbound flights to business class, keep return in economy")
    println(s"  - Cost: $" + totalCostMixed + " (exceeds your $200 budget)")
    println("\nOption 3: Keep ALL flights in economy, just add 2 checked bags")
    println(s"  - Cost: $" + baggageCost + " (within your $200 budget)")
    
    // Check baggage cost if staying in economy
    val freeBagsEconomy = 3 // Gold member in economy
    val totalFreeBagsEconomy = passengerCount * freeBagsEconomy
    val totalBagsAfter = 2 // Adding 2 bags
    val nonfreeBagsEconomy = math.max(0, totalBagsAfter - totalFreeBagsEconomy)
    val baggageCostEconomy = nonfreeBagsEconomy * 50
    println(s"\nIf staying in economy with 2 bags:")
    println(s"Free baggage allowance: $passengerCount passenger(s) × 3 bags = $totalFreeBagsEconomy free bags")
    println(s"Total bags: $totalBagsAfter")
    println(s"Non-free bags: $nonfreeBagsEconomy")
    println(s"Baggage cost: $" + baggageCostEconomy)
  --- Error Output ---

ERROR #191  [RUNTIME]  java.lang.NumberFormatException
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    44 (trial 2)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Get details for all reservations
    val reservationIds = user.reservations
    val reservations = reservationIds.map(id => getReservationDetails(id))
    
    // Function to calculate flight duration in hours
    def calculateDuration(departureTime: String, arrivalTime: String): Double = {
      // Parse HH:MM:SS times
      def parseTime(timeStr: String): Int = {
        val parts = timeStr.split(":")
        parts(0).toInt * 3600 + parts(1).toInt * 60 + parts(2).toInt
      }
      
      val depSec = parseTime(departureTime)
      val arrSec = parseTime(arrivalTime)
      val durationSeconds = if (arrSec < depSec) arrSec + (24*3600) - depSec else arrSec - depSec
      durationSeconds.toDouble / 3600.0
    }
    
    // Analyze each reservation
    reservations.foreach { res =>
      println(s"=== Reservation ${res.reservationId} ===")
      println(s"Status: ${res.status.getOrElse("active")}")
      println(s"Origin: ${res.origin} → Destination: ${res.destination}")
      println(s"Flight type: ${res.flightType}")
      println(s"Cabin: ${res.cabin}")
      println(s"Passengers: ${res.passengers.size}")
      println(s"Insurance: ${res.insurance}")
      println("Flights:")
      
      res.flights.foreach { flight =>
        // Get flight status and scheduled times
        val status = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
        val directFlights = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
        val directFlight = directFlights.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
        
        directFlight match {
          case Some(df) =>
            val duration = calculateDuration(df.scheduledDepartureTimeEst, df.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
            println(s"  - ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: ${flight.origin} → ${flight.destination}")
            println(s"    Status: $status")
            println(s"    Scheduled: ${df.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} → ${df.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
            println(f"    Duration: $duration%.2f hours")
            println(s"    Price: $${flight.price}")
            println(s"    Current cabin: ${res.cabin}")
            
            // Check business class availability and price
            df.availableSeats.get("business") match {
              case Some(seats) if seats > 0 =>
                val businessPrice = df.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
                println(s"    Business class available: $seats seats, price: $$$businessPrice")
              case _ =>
                println(s"    Business class: Not available")
            }
            
          case None =>
            println(s"  - ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: ${flight.origin} → ${flight.destination}")
            println(s"    Status: $status")
            println(s"    Could not retrieve flight details for duration calculation")
        }
      }
      println()
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    println()
    
    // Check each reservation to find upcoming flights
    val allReservations = user.reservations.map { reservationId =>
      try {
        val reservation = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
        (reservationId, reservation)
      } catch {
        case e: Throwable => 
          println(s"Error getting reservation $reservationId: ${e.getMessage}")
          (reservationId, null)
      }
    }.filter(_._2 != null)
    
    println("Upcoming flights (excluding cancelled ones):")
    println("=" * 80)
    
    var totalCost = 0
    
    allReservations.foreach { case (reservationId, reservation) =>
      // Skip cancelled reservations
      if (reservation.status != Some("cancelled")) {
        // Calculate total cost for this reservation
        val reservationTotal = reservation.flights.map(_.price).sum
        
        println(s"Reservation ID: $reservationId")
        println(s"  Status: ${reservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
        println(s"  Cabin: ${reservation.cabin}")
        println(s"  Insurance: ${reservation.insurance}")
        println(s"  Passengers: ${reservation.passengers.length}")
        println(s"  Total cost: $$$reservationTotal")
        println(s"  Flights:")
        
        reservation.flights.foreach { flight =>
          println(s"    - ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination} ($$${flight.price})")
        }
        println()
        
        totalCost += reservationTotal
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Total cost of all upcoming flights: $$$totalCost")
  --- Error Output ---

    println(s"  Certificate_2765295: $$$cert3Amount")
    val remainingAfterCert3 = totalPerPassenger - cert3Amount
    println(s"  Remaining after certificate: $$$remainingAfterCert3")
    println(s"  Mastercard charge: $$$remainingAfterCert3")
    
    // Calculate total Mastercard charge
    val mastercardCharge1 = math.max(0, remainingAfterCert1 - giftCardTotal)
    val totalMastercardCharge = mastercardCharge1 + remainingAfterCert2 + remainingAfterCert3
    
    println(s"\n=== SUMMARY ===")
    println(s"Total per passenger: $$$totalPerPassenger")
    println(s"\nCertificates to be used:")
    println(s"  1. certificate_3765853: $$$cert1Amount (for Mohamed)")
    println(s"  2. certificate_9984806: $$$cert2Amount (for Aarav)")
    println(s"  3. certificate_2765295: $$$cert3Amount (for Evelyn)")
    println(s"\nGift cards to be used (for Mohamed's reservation only):")
    println(s"  gift_card_6136092: $$$129")
    println(s"  gift_card_8020792: $$$198")
    println(s"  Total gift cards: $$$giftCardTotal")

ERROR #205  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    23 (trial 2)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Prepare the booking
    val flightInfoList = List(
      FlightInfo("HAT023", "2024-05-26"),  // JFK → SFO
      FlightInfo("HAT204", "2024-05-28"),  // SFO → SEA
      FlightInfo("HAT100", "2024-05-28")   // SEA → JFK
    )
    
    val passengers = List(
      Passenger("Mohamed", "Silva", "1960-11-26"),
      Passenger("Raj", "Sanchez", "1986-09-12"),
      Passenger("Liam", "Wilson", "1980-03-27")
    )
    
    // Prepare payment methods
    val paymentMethods = List(
      Payment("certificate_3765853", 500),
      Payment("gift_card_8020792", 198),
      Payment("gift_card_6136092", 129),
      Payment("credit_card_2198526", 44)
    )
    
    // Calculate baggage: regular member business class = 2 free bags per passenger
    // 3 passengers × 2 free bags = 6 free bags total
    // You have 0 bags, so no additional bags needed
    val totalBaggages = 0
    val nonfreeBaggages = 0
    
    println("Booking details:")
    println(s"- User ID: mohamed_silva_9265")
    println(s"- Origin: JFK, Destination: SFO")
    println(s"- Flight Type: RoundTrip")
    println(s"- Cabin: Business")
    println(s"- Passengers: 3")
    println(s"- Total baggages: $totalBaggages (all free)")
    println(s"- Insurance: No")
    println(s"- Total cost: $871")
    println(s"- Payment: $500 certificate + $198 gift card + $129 gift card + $44 Mastercard")
    
    println("\nProceeding with booking...")
    
    // Book the reservation
    try {
      val newReservation = bookReservation(
        userId = "mohamed_silva_9265",
        origin = "JFK",
        destination = "SFO",
        flightType = FlightType.RoundTrip,
        cabin = Cabin.Business,
        flights = flightInfoList,
        passengers = passengers,
        paymentMethods = paymentMethods,
        totalBaggages = totalBaggages,
        nonfreeBaggages = nonfreeBaggages,
        insurance = Insurance.No
      )
      
      println("✅ Booking successful!")
      println(s"New Reservation ID: ${newReservation.reservationId}")
      println(s"Status: ${newReservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
      println(s"Cabin: ${newReservation.cabin}")
      println(s"Total paid: $${newReservation.paymentHistory.map(_.amount).sum}")
      println("\nFlights:")
      newReservation.flights.foreach { flight =>
        println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: ${flight.origin} → ${flight.destination}")
      }
      println("\nPassengers:")
      newReservation.passengers.foreach { p =>
        println(s"  ${p.firstName} ${p.lastName}")
      }
    } catch {
      case e: Exception => println(s"Error booking reservation: ${e.getMessage}")
    }

    // The error says total price is 2613, not 871!
    // Let me recalculate: $871 was for 3 passengers total, but maybe that's per passenger?
    // Let me check the actual prices again
    
    println("Checking actual flight prices:")
    
    // Get HAT023 price
    val hat023 = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "SFO", "2024-05-26").head
    val hat023BusinessPrice = hat023.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
    println(s"HAT023 (JFK→SFO) business price: $$$hat023BusinessPrice")
    
    // Get HAT204 price
    val hat204 = searchDirectFlight("SFO", "SEA", "2024-05-28").head
    val hat204BusinessPrice = hat204.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
    println(s"HAT204 (SFO→SEA) business price: $$$hat204BusinessPrice")
    
    // Get HAT100 price
    val hat100 = searchDirectFlight("SEA", "JFK", "2024-05-28").find(_.flightNumber == "HAT100")
    val hat100BusinessPrice = hat100.map(_.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)).getOrElse(0)
    println(s"HAT100 (SEA→JFK) business price: $$$hat100BusinessPrice")
    
    val totalPerPassenger = hat023BusinessPrice + hat204BusinessPrice + hat100BusinessPrice
    println(s"\nTotal per passenger: $$$totalPerPassenger")
    println(s"Total for 3 passengers: $$${totalPerPassenger * 3}")
    println(s"Error said total price: $$$2613")
    println(s"Our calculation: $$${totalPerPassenger * 3}")
    println(s"Difference: $$${2613 - (totalPerPassenger * 3)}")

    // Search for flights from BOS to MSP on different dates
    println("Checking for business class options with different dates...")
    
    // Check if we can fly on 2024-05-17 instead
    val bosToMspFlightsMay17 = searchOnestopFlight("BOS", "MSP", "2024-05-17")
    println(s"Found ${bosToMspFlightsMay17.size} one-stop options on 2024-05-17")
    
    // Calculate cheapest business option for 2024-05-17
    val may17Options = bosToMspFlightsMay17.map { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      val firstBusinessPrice = firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)
      val secondBusinessPrice = secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)
      val totalPrice = (firstBusinessPrice + secondBusinessPrice) * 2
      
      (firstFlight.flightNumber, secondFlight.flightNumber, totalPrice)
    }
    
    println("\n2024-05-17 one-stop business class options (total for 2 passengers):")
    may17Options.take(5).foreach { case (first, second, total) =>
      println(s"  $first + $second: $$$total")
    }
    
    // Now let's check what we can do within your $650 budget
    println("\n--- ANALYSIS WITHIN $650 BUDGET ---")
    println(s"Your current reservation total: $$$originalTotalPrice")
    println(s"Your budget for changes: $$$650")
    println(s"Maximum new total you can afford: $$${originalTotalPrice + 650}")
    
    // Check economy prices for your current flights
    println("\nCurrent flights economy prices:")
    println(s"  HAT235 (BOS-MCO): $${firstFlightOption.get.prices("economy")}")
    println(s"  HAT298 (MCO-MSP): $${secondFlightOption.get.prices("economy")}")
    
    // Check if changing to different economy flights could save money
    println("\nAlternative BOS to MCO economy flights (2024-05-18):")
    bosToMcoFlights.foreach { flight =>
      val economyPrice = flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", Int.MaxValue)
      val availableSeats = flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      if (availableSeats > 0 && flight.flightNumber != "HAT235") {
        println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: Economy price = $$$economyPrice (current: $${firstFlightOption.get.prices("economy")})")
      }
    }
    
    // Also check what adding just baggage would cost (without cabin change)
    println("\n--- BAGGAGE-ONLY OPTION ---")
    println("If we just add 2 checked bags without changing cabin:")
    println(s"  Current baggage: $currentTotalBags bags")
    println(s"  Desired baggage: $desiredTotalBags bags")
    
    // Gold member with economy class: 3 free checked bags per passenger
    val goldEconomyFreeBags = 3
    val totalFreeBagsEconomy = goldEconomyFreeBags * totalPassengers
    
    println(s"\nBaggage allowance (Gold member, Economy class):")
    println(s"  Free bags per passenger: $goldEconomyFreeBags")
    println(s"  Total free bags: $totalFreeBagsEconomy")
    
    if (desiredTotalBags <= totalFreeBagsEconomy) {
      println(s"  Adding $desiredTotalBags bags: All bags are free")
    } else {
      val nonFreeBags = desiredTotalBags - totalFreeBagsEconomy
      val baggageCost = nonFreeBags * 50
      println(s"  Adding $desiredTotalBags bags: $nonFreeBags bags will cost $$$baggageCost")
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    // Search for ALL business options more systematically
    // First, let's get all possible flights on May 26 from JFK
    println("Searching for all JFK departures on May 26, 2024:")
    val allAirports = listAllAirports()
    val jfkAirports = allAirports.filter(_.iata == "JFK")
    
    // Get all direct flights from JFK on May 26
    val allJFKDepartures = allAirports.flatMap { dest =>
      if (dest.iata != "JFK") {
        searchDirectFlight("JFK", dest.iata, "2024-05-26")
      } else {
        List.empty
      }
    }.filter(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0))
    
    println(s"Found ${allJFKDepartures.size} business class departures from JFK on May 26")
    
    // Get all return flights to JFK on May 28
    val allJFKReturns = allAirports.flatMap { origin =>
      if (origin.iata != "JFK") {
        searchDirectFlight(origin.iata, "JFK", "2024-05-28")
      } else {
        List.empty
      }
    }.filter(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0))
    
    println(s"Found ${allJFKReturns.size} business class returns to JFK on May 28")
    
    // Find the absolute cheapest round trip combination
    var cheapestCombination: Option[(DirectFlight, DirectFlight)] = None
    var minPrice = Int.MaxValue
    
    for (outbound <- allJFKDepartures) {
      for (returnFlight <- allJFKReturns) {
        if (returnFlight.origin == outbound.destination) {
          val total = outbound.prices("business") + returnFlight.prices("business")
          if (total < minPrice) {
            minPrice = total
            cheapestCombination = Some((outbound, returnFlight))
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    println("\nAbsolute cheapest business round trip:")
    cheapestCombination match {
      case Some((outbound, returnFlight)) =>
        println(s"Outbound: ${outbound.flightNumber} (JFK → ${outbound.destination}) - $${outbound.prices("business")}")
        println(s"Return: ${returnFlight.flightNumber} (${returnFlight.origin} → JFK) - $${returnFlight.prices("business")}")
        println(s"Total: $$$minPrice")
      case None =>
        println("No matching round trip found")
    }
    
    // Also check one-stop options more thoroughly
    println("\n\nChecking one-stop options more thoroughly...")
    
    // For JFK to various destinations with one-stop
    val possibleDests = allAirports.map(_.iata).filter(_ != "JFK")
    var cheapestOneStop: Option[(List[DirectFlight], List[DirectFlight])] = None
    var minOneStopPrice = Int.MaxValue
    
    for (dest <- possibleDests) {
      val oneStopOutbounds = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", dest, "2024-05-26")
      val businessOneStopOutbounds = oneStopOutbounds.filter(_.forall(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0)))
      
      val oneStopReturns = searchOnestopFlight(dest, "JFK", "2024-05-28")
      val businessOneStopReturns = oneStopReturns.filter(_.forall(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0)))
      
      for (outbound <- businessOneStopOutbounds) {
        for (returnTrip <- businessOneStopReturns) {
          val total = outbound.map(_.prices("business")).sum + returnTrip.map(_.prices("business")).sum
          if (total < minOneStopPrice) {
            minOneStopPrice = total
            cheapestOneStop = Some((outbound, returnTrip))
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\nCheapest one-stop business round trip: $$$minOneStopPrice")
    cheapestOneStop match {
      case Some((outbound, returnTrip)) =>
        println(s"Outbound: ${outbound.map(_.flightNumber).mkString(" + ")}")
        println(s"Return: ${returnTrip.map(_.flightNumber).mkString(" + ")}")
      case None =>
        println("No one-stop option found")
    }

    val jfkToOrdOutbound = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "ORD", "2024-05-26")
    val jfkToOrdBusiness = jfkToOrdOutbound.filter(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0))
    val ordToJfkReturn = searchDirectFlight("ORD", "JFK", "2024-05-28")
    val ordToJfkBusiness = ordToJfkReturn.filter(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0))
    
    if (jfkToOrdBusiness.nonEmpty && ordToJfkBusiness.nonEmpty) {
      val cheapestOutboundORD = jfkToOrdBusiness.minBy(_.prices("business"))
      val cheapestReturnORD = ordToJfkBusiness.minBy(_.prices("business"))
      val ordTotal = cheapestOutboundORD.prices("business") + cheapestReturnORD.prices("business")
      println(s"   Available: $$$ordTotal")
    } else {
      println("   Not available")
    }
    
    // Check JFK-DFW
    println("\n4. Checking JFK-DFW round trip:")
    val jfkToDfwOutbound = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "DFW", "2024-05-26")
    val jfkToDfwBusiness = jfkToDfwOutbound.filter(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0))
    val dfwToJfkReturn = searchDirectFlight("DFW", "JFK", "2024-05-28")
    val dfwToJfkBusiness = dfwToJfkReturn.filter(_.prices.get("business").exists(_ > 0))
    
    if (jfkToDfwBusiness.nonEmpty && dfwToJfkBusiness.nonEmpty) {
      val cheapestOutboundDFW = jfkToDfwBusiness.minBy(_.prices("business"))
      val cheapestReturnDFW = dfwToJfkBusiness.minBy(_.prices("business"))
      val dfwTotal = cheapestOutboundDFW.prices("business") + cheapestReturnDFW.prices("business")
      println(s"   Available: $$$dfwTotal")
    } else {
      println("   Not available")
    }
    
    println("\nConclusion: The cheapest business round trip appears to be JFK-SEA at $720")
  --- Error Output ---

    val remainingAfterCertificates = newBookingCost - certificatesUsed

        reservationId = "OBUT9V",
        totalBaggages = 2,
        nonfreeBaggages = 0,
        paymentId = paymentId

      val returnFlights = updatedReservation.flights.filter(_.date == "2024-05-28")
      if (returnFlights.size == 2) {
        val firstDeparture = "11:00:00" // HAT229 departure
        val secondArrival = "16:00:00" // HAT266 arrival
        
        val firstDepartHour = firstDeparture.substring(0, 2).toInt
        val firstDepartMin = firstDeparture.substring(3, 5).toInt
        val secondArrivalHour = secondArrival.substring(0, 2).toInt
        val secondArrivalMin = secondArrival.substring(3, 5).toInt
        
        val totalMinutes = (secondArrivalHour * 60 + secondArrivalMin) - (firstDepartHour * 60 + firstDepartMin)
        val hours = totalMinutes / 60
        val minutes = totalMinutes % 60
        
        println(s"\nReturn travel time: ${hours}h ${minutes}m (with 0h layover)")
      }

      case e: Exception => println(s"Error updating baggage: ${e.getMessage}")

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Calculate baggage allowances before and after downgrade
    println("Current baggage details and new allowances after downgrade to economy:")
    println("=" * 80)
    
    var totalExtraBagsNeeded = 0
    var totalExtraBagCost = 0
    
    for ((reservationId, reservation, _, _, _) <- reservationDetails) {
      println(s"\nReservation: $reservationId")
      println(s"  Current cabin: ${reservation.cabin}")
      println(s"  Current total bags: ${reservation.totalBaggages}")
      println(s"  Current paid bags: ${reservation.nonfreeBaggages}")
      println(s"  Number of passengers: ${reservation.passengers.size}")
      
      // Current free baggage allowance (business class, regular member)
      val currentFreeBags = reservation.passengers.size * 2 // 2 free bags per business passenger for regular member
      
      // New free baggage allowance (economy class, regular member)
      val newFreeBags = reservation.passengers.size * 1 // 1 free bag per economy passenger for regular member
      
      // Calculate if we need to add extra bags
      val currentPaidBags = reservation.nonfreeBaggages
      val currentTotalBags = reservation.totalBaggages
      val currentFreeBagsUsed = currentTotalBags - currentPaidBags
      
      // After downgrade, free bags decrease
      val freeBagsReduction = currentFreeBags - newFreeBags
      val newPaidBagsNeeded = if (freeBagsReduction > 0) {
        // Some previously free bags now need to be paid for
        math.max(0, currentPaidBags + freeBagsReduction)
      } else {
        currentPaidBags
      }
      
      val extraBagsNeeded = newPaidBagsNeeded - currentPaidBags
      val extraBagCost = extraBagsNeeded * 50
      
      println(s"  Current free bags allowed: $currentFreeBags")
      println(s"  New free bags allowed (economy): $newFreeBags")
      println(s"  Extra bags needed after downgrade: $extraBagsNeeded")
      println(s"  Extra bag cost: $$$extraBagCost")
      
      if (extraBagsNeeded > 0) {
        totalExtraBagsNeeded += extraBagsNeeded
        totalExtraBagCost += extraBagCost
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\n" + "=" * 80)
    println(s"SUMMARY:")
    println(s"Total extra bags needed across all reservations: $totalExtraBagsNeeded")
    println(s"Total extra bag cost: $$$totalExtraBagCost")

ERROR #246  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    18 (trial 3)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Calculate final totals
    println("=== FINAL SUMMARY ===")
    println("\nAll 5 reservations have been successfully downgraded from business to economy class.")
    
    // Get updated reservation details to verify
    val allReservationIds = List("2FBBAH", "JG7FMM", "X7BYG1", "EQ1G6C", "BOH180")
    var totalOriginalPrice = 0
    var totalEconomyPrice = 0
    var totalRefunds = 0
    var totalBagCharges = 0
    
    println("\nBreakdown by reservation:")
    println("=" * 80)
    
    for (resId <- allReservationIds) {
      val reservation = getReservationDetails(resId)
      
      // Calculate original business price (sum of flight prices from original data)
      val businessRes = businessReservations.find(_._1 == resId).get._2
      val originalPrice = businessRes.flights.map(_.price).sum
      
      // Calculate economy price from updated reservation
      val economyPrice = reservation.flights.map(_.price).sum
      
      // Calculate refund and bag charges from payment history
      val payments = reservation.paymentHistory
      val refund = payments.filter(_.amount < 0).map(_.amount).sum.abs
      val bagCharge = payments.filter(_.amount > 0 && _.amount < 200).map(_.amount).sum // Bag charges are < 200
      
      totalOriginalPrice += originalPrice
      totalEconomyPrice += economyPrice
      totalRefunds += refund
      totalBagCharges += bagCharge
      
      println(s"\n$resId:")
      println(s"  Original business price: $$$originalPrice")
      println(s"  New economy price: $$$economyPrice")
      println(s"  Refund amount: $$$refund")
      println(s"  Bag charge: $$$bagCharge")
      println(s"  Net to customer: $$${refund - bagCharge}")
      println(s"  Payment method: ${reservation.paymentHistory.head.paymentId}")
    }
    
    println("\n" + "=" * 80)
    println("TOTALS:")
    println(s"Total original business price: $$$totalOriginalPrice")
    println(s"Total new economy price: $$$totalEconomyPrice")
    println(s"Total refunds: $$$totalRefunds")
    println(s"Total bag charges: $$$totalBagCharges")
    println(s"Net savings: $$${totalRefunds - totalBagCharges}")
    
    // Verify the math matches our original calculation
    println("\n" + "=" * 80)
    println("VERIFICATION:")
    println(s"Original calculation: $16,513 - $1,548 - $400 = $14,565")
    println(s"Actual calculation: $totalRefunds - $totalBagCharges = $${totalRefunds - totalBagCharges}")
    
    if ((totalRefunds - totalBagCharges) == 14565) {
      println("✓ NET SAVINGS OF $14,565 CONFIRMED AND LOCKED!")
    } else {
      println("⚠ Calculation mismatch - please review")
    }

    var totalEconomyPrice = 0
    var totalRefunds = 0
    var totalBagCharges = 0

    for (resId <- allReservationIds) {
      val reservation = getReservationDetails(resId)

      // Calculate refund and bag charges from payment history

      val bagCharge = payments.filter(_.amount > 0 && _.amount < 200).map(_.amount).sum // Bag charges are < 200

      val businessTotal = flight1BusinessPrice.get + flight2BusinessPrice.get

      println(s"\nCurrent economy total: $$currentTotal")
      println(s"Business class total: $$businessTotal")
      println(s"Cabin upgrade cost: $$cabinUpgradeCost")
      
      // Calculate baggage cost
      // Gold member in economy: 3 free bags per passenger
      // Gold member in business: 4 free bags per passenger
      // Current: 0 bags, New: 2 bags
      // Since you're gold member, you get 4 free bags in business class
      // So 2 bags would be completely free!
      
      println("\nBaggage calculation:")
      println("Gold member in business class: 4 free checked bags per passenger")
      println("You want to add 2 checked bags")
      println("Result: 2 bags would be FREE (within the 4 free bag allowance)")
      println(s"\nTotal additional cost: $$cabinUpgradeCost (cabin upgrade only)")
    } else {
      println("\nBusiness class not available for one or both flights")
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    println("Finding best options within $1000 extra cost...")

    val maxTotalPrice = originalEconomyPrice + 1000 // $2671 maximum
    
    println(s"Original economy price: $$$originalEconomyPrice")
    println(s"Maximum total for upgrade + date change: $$$maxTotalPrice")
    println(s"Maximum additional cost allowed: $1000")
    
    // Best May 24 outbound option (cheapest with 3+ business seats)
    val bestMay24Outbound = 666 // HAT190 (01:00) + HAT047 (13:00 same day) - has 3 business seats
    
    // Cheapest return options found
    val cheapestSeaToJfk = 266 // HAT089 on May 26 at 10:00
    val cheapestJfkToIah = 217 // HAT279 on May 28 at 11:00
    val cheapestReturnTotal = cheapestSeaToJfk + cheapestJfkToIah

ERROR #273  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    10 (trial 4)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Calculate the exact fare difference more carefully
    println("Fare Difference Calculation:")
    
    // Current economy fares from reservation
    val currentEconomyFares = reservation.flights.map(_.price).sum
    println(s"Current economy fares total: $$${currentEconomyFares}")
    
    // Note: The $1671 paid includes insurance and potentially other fees
    // Insurance is $30 per passenger = $90 for 3 passengers
    val insuranceCost = 90
    println(s"Insurance cost: $$${insuranceCost}")
    
    // Calculate base fare (without insurance)
    val currentBaseFare = 1671 - insuranceCost
    println(s"Current base fare (without insurance): $$${currentBaseFare}")
    
    // New business fares
    val newBusinessFares = 666 + 531 // May 24 outbound + May 26-27 return (business)
    println(s"\nNew business fares total: $$${newBusinessFares}")
    
    // Keep same insurance ($90) and baggage (0 extra cost)
    val totalNewPrice = newBusinessFares + insuranceCost
    println(s"Total new price (business fares + insurance): $$${totalNewPrice}")
    
    val fareDifference = totalNewPrice - 1671
    println(s"\nFare difference (new total - original total): $$${fareDifference}")
    
    if (fareDifference > 0) {
      println(s"You would PAY: $$${fareDifference}")
    } else {
      println(s"You would GET REFUND: $$${math.abs(fareDifference)}")
    }
    
    println("\n" + "="*50)
    println("FINAL BREAKDOWN:")
    println("="*50)
    println(s"ORIGINAL BOOKING: $$${1671}")
    println(s"  - Economy fares: $$${currentEconomyFares}")

    // Search for one-stop flights from JFK to SEA on 2024-05-20
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", "SEA", "2024-05-20")
    println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.size} one-stop flight options from JFK to SEA on 2024-05-20:")
    
    // Filter for flights where the first segment departs at or after 11:00:00
    val lateDepartures = oneStopFlights.filter { flights =>
      val firstDeparture = flights.head.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      firstDeparture >= "11:00:00"
    }
    
    println(s"\nFound ${lateDepartures.size} options departing at or after 11:00 EST:")
    
    lateDepartures.foreach { flights =>
      val first = flights.head
      val second = flights(1)
      println(s"\nOption: ${first.flightNumber} + ${second.flightNumber}")
      println(s"First flight: ${first.flightNumber} (${first.origin} → ${first.destination})")
      println(s"  Departure: ${first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${first.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${first.availableSeats.get("economy")}")
      println(s"  Economy price: $${first.prices.get("economy")}")
      
      println(s"Second flight: ${second.flightNumber} (${second.origin} → ${second.destination})")
      println(s"  Departure: ${second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${second.availableSeats.get("economy")}")
      println(s"  Economy price: $${second.prices.get("economy")}")
      
      val totalPrice = first.prices.get("economy").getOrElse(0) + second.prices.get("economy").getOrElse(0)
