ERROR #290  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    18 (trial 4)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer
    
    case class PriceCheckResult(reservationId: String, flightNumber: String, date: String, currentBusinessPrice: Int, currentEconomyPrice: Option[Int], origin: String, destination: String)
    
    val priceResults = ListBuffer.empty[PriceCheckResult]
    
    // Check current economy prices for each flight
    businessReservations.foreach { case (id, res) =>
      res.flights.foreach { flight =>
        try {
          // Search for current flights to get economy price
          val currentFlights = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
          val currentFlight = currentFlights.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
          
          currentFlight match {
            case Some(f) =>
              val economyPrice = f.prices.get("economy")
              priceResults += PriceCheckResult(id, flight.flightNumber, flight.date, flight.price, economyPrice, flight.origin, flight.destination)
              println(s"Reservation $id, Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: Business=$$${flight.price}, Economy=$${economyPrice.getOrElse("Not available")}")
            case None =>
              priceResults += PriceCheckResult(id, flight.flightNumber, flight.date, flight.price, None, flight.origin, flight.destination)
              println(s"Reservation $id, Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: Business=$$${flight.price}, Economy=Not found")
          }
        } catch {
          case e: Exception =>
            priceResults += PriceCheckResult(id, flight.flightNumber, flight.date, flight.price, None, flight.origin, flight.destination)
            println(s"Reservation $id, Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: Business=$$${flight.price}, Error checking economy price")
        }
      }
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    19 |          println(s"Reservation $id, Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: Business=$$${flight.price}, Economy=$${economyPrice.getOrElse("Not available")}")
       |                  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
       |                  value Not is not a member of String

ERROR #295  [COMPILATION]  generic -- Error
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    21 (trial 4)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Search for one-stop flights from DEN to IAH on May 27, 2024
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("DEN", "IAH", "2024-05-27")
    
    println("ONE-STOP FLIGHTS from DEN to IAH on 2024-05-27:")
    println("=" * 60)
    println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.length} one-stop options")
    
    // Calculate total duration for each one-stop option
    val flightsWithDuration = oneStopFlights.map { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      
      // Parse departure time of first flight
      val dep1 = firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      val dep1Parts = dep1.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val dep1Minutes = dep1Parts(0) * 60 + dep1Parts(1)
      
      // Parse arrival time of second flight
      val arr2 = secondFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst
      val arr2Parts = arr2.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val arr2Minutes = arr2Parts(0) * 60 + arr2Parts(1)
      
      // Calculate layover time
      val arr1 = firstFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst
      val dep2 = secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      
      val arr1Parts = arr1.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val dep2Parts = dep2.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      
      val arr1Minutes = arr1Parts(0) * 60 + arr1Parts(1)
      val dep2Minutes = dep2Parts(0) * 60 + dep2Parts(1)
      
      var layover = dep2Minutes - arr1Minutes
      if (layover < 0) layover += 24 * 60
      
      // Total duration
      var totalDuration = arr2Minutes - dep1Minutes
      if (totalDuration < 0) totalDuration += 24 * 60
      
      (flightPair, totalDuration, layover)
    }
    
    // Sort by total duration (fastest first)
    val sortedFlights = flightsWithDuration.sortBy(_._2)
    
    // Display the fastest options (top 5)
    println("\nFASTEST ONE-STOP OPTIONS (sorted by total duration):")
    println("=" * 60)
    
    for ((flightPair, totalDuration, layover) <- sortedFlights.take(5)) {
      val first = flightPair(0)
      val second = flightPair(1)
      
      println(s"Option: ${first.flightNumber} (${first.origin} -> ${first.destination}) + ${second.flightNumber} (${second.origin} -> ${second.destination})")
      println(s"  First leg: ${first.flightNumber} departs ${first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST from ${first.origin}")
      println(s"            arrives ${first.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST at ${first.destination}")
      println(s"  Layover: ${layover} minutes")
      println(s"  Second leg: ${second.flightNumber} departs ${second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST from ${second.origin}")
      println(s"             arrives ${second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST at ${second.destination}")
      println(s"  TOTAL DURATION: ${totalDuration} minutes (${totalDuration / 60}h ${totalDuration % 60}m)")
      
      // Check availability in economy class
      val firstEconomySeats = first.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      val secondEconomySeats = second.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      val firstEconomyPrice = first.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      val secondEconomyPrice = second.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      val totalPrice = firstEconomyPrice + secondEconomyPrice
      
      println(s"  Economy seats available: ${firstEconomySeats} on ${first.flightNumber}, ${secondEconomySeats} on ${second.flightNumber}")
      println(s"  Economy price: \$${firstEconomyPrice} + \$${secondEconomyPrice} = \$${totalPrice}")
      println()
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    70 |  println(s"  Economy price: \$${firstEconomyPrice} + \$${secondEconomyPrice} = \$${totalPrice}")

    // Search for direct flights from ATL to PHL on 2024-10-19
    val directFlights = searchDirectFlight("ATL", "PHL", "2024-10-19")
    println(s"Found ${directFlights.size} direct flights from ATL to PHL on 2024-10-19")
    
    // Filter for available flights with economy class
    val economyFlights = directFlights.filter { flight =>
      flight.status == "available" && 
      flight.prices.contains("economy") && 
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0
    }
    
    println(s"\nAvailable economy flights:")
    economyFlights.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}:")
      println(s"  Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"  Price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
    }
    
    // Find the cheapest economy flight
    val cheapestFlight = economyFlights.minByOption(_.prices.getOrElse("economy", Int.MaxValue))
    cheapestFlight match {
      case Some(flight) =>
        println(s"\nCheapest economy flight: ${flight.flightNumber}")
        println(s"Price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      case None =>
        println("\nNo available economy flights found")
    }

    // First, let's get all airports to identify West Coast airports
    val allAirports = listAllAirports()
    println(s"Total airports: ${allAirports.size}")
    
    // Define West Coast states/cities (common West Coast airports)
    val westCoastStates = Set("CA", "OR", "WA", "NV")
    val westCoastCities = Set("Los Angeles", "San Francisco", "Seattle", "Portland", "Las Vegas", "San Diego", "Oakland", "San Jose", "Sacramento")
    
    val westCoastAirports = allAirports.filter { airport =>
      westCoastStates.exists(state => airport.city.contains(state)) ||
      westCoastCities.exists(city => airport.city.contains(city))
    }
    
    println(s"West Coast airports found: ${westCoastAirports.size}")
    westCoastAirports.take(10).foreach { airport =>
      println(s"  ${airport.iata}: ${airport.city}")
    }
    
    // New York airports
    val nyAirports = allAirports.filter { airport =>
      airport.city.contains("New York") || airport.iata == "JFK" || airport.iata == "EWR" || airport.iata == "LGA"

    // Check business class price for the direct outbound flight
    val outboundDirectPrice = outboundDirect.headOption.flatMap(_.prices.get("business"))
    println(s"Direct outbound business class price: ${outboundDirectPrice.getOrElse("N/A")}")
    
    // Find cheapest business class one-stop outbound
    val cheapestOutboundOneStop = outboundOneStop.flatMap { flights =>
      if (flights.size == 2) {
        val price1 = flights(0).prices.get("business")
        val price2 = flights(1).prices.get("business")
        (price1, price2) match {
          case (Some(p1), Some(p2)) => Some(p1 + p2)
          case _ => None
        }
      } else None
    }.minOption
    
    println(s"Cheapest one-stop outbound business class price: ${cheapestOutboundOneStop.getOrElse("N/A")}")
    
    // Find cheapest business class one-stop return
    val cheapestReturnOneStop = returnOneStop.flatMap { flights =>
      if (flights.size == 2) {
        val price1 = flights(0).prices.get("business")
        val price2 = flights(1).prices.get("business")
        (price1, price2) match {
          case (Some(p1), Some(p2)) => Some(p1 + p2)
          case _ => None
        }
      } else None
    }.minOption
    
    println(s"Cheapest one-stop return business class price: ${cheapestReturnOneStop.getOrElse("N/A")}")
    
    // Calculate total prices for different options
    val directOneStopTotal = for {
      outboundPrice <- outboundDirectPrice
      returnPrice <- cheapestReturnOneStop
    } yield outboundPrice + returnPrice

    // First, let's update the reservation with new flights and cabin upgrade
    // We need to use updateReservationFlights which requires:
    // - reservationId
    // - cabin (Business)
    // - flights (list of FlightInfo for ENTIRE new reservation)
    // - paymentId (gift_card_1646646)
    
    import Cabin.Business
    import FlightType.RoundTrip
    
    // Create FlightInfo objects for the new flights
    val newOutboundFlight = FlightInfo("HAT072", "2024-05-19")
    val newReturnFlight = FlightInfo("HAT082", "2024-05-23")
    val newFlights = List(newOutboundFlight, newReturnFlight)
    
    println("Updating reservation with new flights and cabin...")
    val updatedReservation = updateReservationFlights(
      reservationId = reservationId,
      cabin = Business,
      flights = newFlights,
      paymentId = "gift_card_1646646"
    )
    
    println(s"Reservation updated successfully!")
    println(s"New reservation ID: ${updatedReservation.reservationId}")
    println(s"New cabin: ${updatedReservation.cabin}")
    println(s"New flights:")
    updatedReservation.flights.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination} on ${flight.date} - $$${flight.price}")
    }
    println(s"Total price: $$${updatedReservation.flights.map(_.price).sum}")
    
    // Now update baggage to add 2 checked bags
    // Since we have 0 nonfree bags needed (Gold member with Business gets 4 free bags)
    // We just need to set totalBaggages = 2, nonfreeBaggages = 0
    println("\nUpdating baggage information...")
    val finalReservation = updateReservationBaggages(
      reservationId = reservationId,
      totalBaggages = 2,
      nonfreeBaggages = 0,
      paymentId = "gift_card_1646646"
    )
    
    println(s"Baggage updated successfully!")
    println(s"Total bags: ${finalReservation.totalBaggages}")
    println(s"Paid bags: ${finalReservation.nonfreeBaggages}")
    
    println("\n=== RESERVATION UPDATE COMPLETE ===")
    println(s"Reservation ID: ${finalReservation.reservationId}")
    println(s"Status: ${finalReservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
    println(s"Cabin: ${finalReservation.cabin}")
    println(s"Total bags: ${finalReservation.totalBaggages}")
    println(s"Insurance: ${finalReservation.insurance}")
    println(s"\nUpdated flights:")
    finalReservation.flights.foreach { flight =>

    // Let me check the exact payment amounts
    val payments = updatedReservation.paymentHistory
    println("Payment details from reservation:")
    payments.foreach { p =>
      println(s"Payment ID: ${p.paymentId}, Amount: ${p.amount}")
    }
    
    // Let me recalculate
    println("\nRecalculation:")
    println("Original flights: HAT202 ($94) + HAT232 ($80) = $174 total")
    println("New flight: HAT041 ($136) × 3 passengers = $408 total")
    println("Difference: $408 - $174 = $234 additional expected")
    
    // But looking at payment history:
    // gift_card_9823297: 522 (original payment)
    // gift_card_7344518: -114 (refund)
    
    // So total paid = 522 - 114 = 408
    println("\nActual calculation from payments:")
    println(s"Original payment: $522")
    println(s"Refund: -$114")
    println(s"Net paid: ${522 - 114} = $408")
    
    // This suggests the original payment was $522, not $174!
    // Maybe the original $522 was for all 3 passengers? Let me check:
    println("\nRe-evaluating original pricing:")
    println("If original was $174 total for 3 passengers, that's $58 per passenger")
    println("But new is $136 per passenger, which is $78 more per passenger")
    println("$78 × 3 = $234 difference - this matches!")
    
    println("\nSo the system processed:")
    println("1. Refunded $114 to gift_card_7344518")
    println("2. Kept original $522 payment from gift_card_9823297")
    println("3. Net result: $408 paid total")

ERROR #346  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    44 (trial 4)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let's get actual flight times for better duration estimation
    // We'll search for flights on their dates to get scheduled times
    
    val actualFlightTimes = flightStatuses.filterNot(_._5 == "landed").map { 
      case (flightNum, date, origin, dest, status, price, cabin) =>
        try {
          val flights = searchDirectFlight(origin, dest, date)
          val flightOpt = flights.find(_.flightNumber == flightNum)
          flightOpt match {
            case Some(flight) =>
              // Parse times and calculate duration
              val depTime = flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
              val arrTime = flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst
              // Calculate hours difference
              val depHours = depTime.substring(0,2).toInt + depTime.substring(3,5).toInt/60.0
              val arrHours = arrTime.substring(0,2).toInt + arrTime.substring(3,5).toInt/60.0
              var duration = arrHours - depHours
              if (duration < 0) duration += 24 // Handle overnight flights
              (flightNum, date, origin, dest, duration, flight.prices, cabin)
            case None =>
              (flightNum, date, origin, dest, 0.0, Map.empty[String, Int], cabin)
          }
        } catch {
          case e: Exception => (flightNum, date, origin, dest, 0.0, Map.empty[String, Int], cabin)
        }
    }
    
    println("Actual flight durations:")
    println("=" * 80)
    actualFlightTimes.foreach { case (flightNum, date, origin, dest, duration, prices, cabin) =>
      println(f"$flightNum on $date: $origin -> $dest ($duration%.1f hours)")
      println(s"  Cabin: $cabin, Business price: $${prices.getOrElse("business", "N/A")}")
    }

    val created = LocalDateTime.parse(reservation.createdAt, formatter)
    val current = LocalDateTime.parse("2024-05-15T15:00:00", formatter)
    val hoursDiff = Duration.between(created, current).toHours()
    val daysDiff = hoursDiff / 24.0
    println(s"3. Time since booking: ${hoursDiff} hours (${daysDiff} days)")
    
    // Check if there's any way this could be considered "within 24 hours" 
    // by any interpretation (business hours, etc.)
    println(s"4. Exactly 24 hours from booking would be: ${created.plusHours(24)}")
    
    // Check the payment amount and see if there's any certificate or special payment
    println(s"\n5. Payment details:")
    reservation.paymentHistory.foreach { p =>
      println(s"   - Payment ID: ${p.paymentId}, Amount: $${p.amount}")
      val pm = user.paymentMethods.get(p.paymentId)
      val pmType = pm match {
        case Some(c: CreditCard) => s"Credit Card (${c.brand} ***${c.lastFour})"
        case Some(g: GiftCard) => s"Gift Card ($${g.amount})"
        case Some(c: Certificate) => s"Certificate ($${c.amount})"
        case None => "Unknown"
      }
      println(s"     Type: $pmType")
    }
    
    // Check if any flight might be considered "cancelled by airline" in some way
    println(s"\n6. Flight HAT268 on 2024-05-24 details:")
    val flightDetails = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "ATL", "2024-05-24")
    flightDetails.find(_.flightNumber == "HAT268") match {
      case Some(f) => 
        println(s"   - Status: ${f.status}")
        println(s"   - Available seats: ${f.availableSeats}")
        val currentPrice = f.prices.get("basic_economy")
        println(s"   - Current price: $${currentPrice.getOrElse("N/A")}")
        println(s"   - Original price paid: $${reservation.flights.head.price}")
      case None => println("   - Flight not found in search")
    }
    
    // Check policy wording about "health reasons" - is there any flexibility?
    println("\n7. Policy interpretation:")
    println("   - Travel insurance covers: 'health or weather reasons'")
    println("   - Your reason: 'personal commitment/best friend's birthday'")
    println("   - These do not match health or weather reasons")
    
    // Check if there's any membership benefit for regular members
    println(s"\n8. Membership level: ${user.membership}")
    println("   - Regular members have standard cancellation policies")
    println("   - No special exceptions mentioned in policy for personal events")
    
    // Check if there's any other way - maybe the flight might be delayed or have issues?
    println("\n9. Checking for any flight irregularities:")
    val status = getFlightStatus("HAT268", "2024-05-24")
    println(s"   - Current status: $status")
    println(s"   - If status were 'delayed' or 'cancelled', different rules would apply")
    println(s"   - Current status is '$status', not 'delayed' or 'cancelled'")
    
    // Final assessment
    println("\n=== FINAL ASSESSMENT ===")
    println("Based on all checks, NONE of the cancellation conditions are met:")
    println("1. ❌ NOT within 24-hour booking window (287 hours ago)")
    println("2. ❌ NOT cancelled by airline (status: available)")
    println("3. ❌ NOT a business flight (basic_economy)")
    println("4. ❌ NOT a health/weather reason for insurance (personal event)")

    // Let me calculate the total costs precisely
    
    // Original total cost from payment history
    val originalTotal = reservation.paymentHistory.map(_.amount).sum
    println(s"Original total paid: $$$originalTotal")
    
    // New business class total for 2 passengers
    val newBusinessTotal = firstFlightBusinessPrice + secondFlightBusinessPrice
    println(s"Business class total for both flights: $$$newBusinessTotal")
    
    // Price difference
    val priceDifference = newBusinessTotal - originalTotal
    println(s"Price difference for cabin upgrade: $$$priceDifference")
    
    // Baggage calculation
    // With Gold membership + Business class: 4 free bags per passenger
    val freeBagsPerPassenger = 4
    val totalFreeBags = freeBagsPerPassenger * reservation.passengers.size
    println(s"\nFree baggage allowance:")
    println(s"  Gold membership + Business class = $freeBagsPerPassenger free bags per passenger")
    println(s"  With ${reservation.passengers.size} passengers = $totalFreeBags free bags total")

    val bagsWantedForYou = 6
    val bagsWantedForOther = 0
    val totalBagsWanted = bagsWantedForYou + bagsWantedForOther
    
    println(s"\nYour baggage request:")
    println(s"  Chen Lee wants: $bagsWantedForYou bags")
    println(s"  Noah Hernandez wants: $bagsWantedForOther bags")
    println(s"  Total wanted: $totalBagsWanted bags")
    
    // Calculate paid bags
    // Your free allowance: 4 bags
    // Additional bags needed: 6 - 4 = 2 bags
    val yourFreeAllowance = 4
    val yourAdditionalBags = math.max(0, bagsWantedForYou - yourFreeAllowance)
    val otherAdditionalBags = math.max(0, bagsWantedForOther - freeBagsPerPassenger)
    val totalAdditionalBags = yourAdditionalBags + otherAdditionalBags
    val baggageCost = totalAdditionalBags * 50
    
    println(s"\nBaggage cost calculation:")
    println(s"  Chen Lee's free allowance: $yourFreeAllowance bags")
    println(s"  Additional bags needed for Chen Lee: $yourAdditionalBags bags")
    println(s"  Additional bags needed for Noah: $otherAdditionalBags bags")
    println(s"  Total additional bags: $totalAdditionalBags bags")
    println(s"  Baggage cost: $$$baggageCost ($$50 per additional bag)")
    
    // Total cost
    val totalCost = priceDifference + baggageCost
    println(s"\nTotal cost to pay: $$$totalCost")
    println(s"  Cabin upgrade: $$$priceDifference")
    println(s"  Additional baggage: $$$baggageCost")
    println(s"  TOTAL: $$$totalCost")
    
    // Check if this is within your $650 limit
    if (totalCost <= 650) {
      println(s"\n✓ Total cost of $$$totalCost is within your $650 limit.")
    } else {
      println(s"\n✗ Total cost of $$$totalCost exceeds your $650 limit.")

    // The original payment was $498, but flight prices sum to $249
    // This suggests the $498 is for 2 passengers ($249 × 2)
    println(s"Original flight prices sum: ${122 + 127} = ${122 + 127}")
    println(s"Original total payment: ${reservation.paymentHistory.head.amount}")
    println(s"Ratio: ${reservation.paymentHistory.head.amount} / ${122 + 127} = ${reservation.paymentHistory.head.amount.toDouble / (122 + 127)}")
    
    // This confirms: the $498 is exactly 2 × $249
    // So flight prices in reservation are PER PASSENGER, not total
    println("\nConclusion: Flight prices in reservation are PER PASSENGER.")
    println(s"Each passenger paid: $122 + $127 = ${122 + 127} = $${122 + 127}")
    println(s"2 passengers paid: ${122 + 127} × 2 = ${(122 + 127) * 2}")
    
    // Therefore, the upgrade should be:
    println("\nCorrect upgrade calculation:")
    println(s"Per passenger upgrade: ($350 - $122) + ($499 - $127) = ${350-122} + ${499-127} = ${(350-122)+(499-127)}")
    println(s"For 2 passengers: ${(350-122)+(499-127)} × 2 = ${((350-122)+(499-127))*2}")
    println(s"Which matches the system charge: $${upgradePayment}")
    
    // So the correct total should be:
    val correctUpgradeCost = ((350-122)+(499-127)) * 2
    val correctBaggageCost = 100

    println(s"Upgrade: $${correctUpgradeCost}")

    import java.time.LocalDateTime
    import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    
    val currentTime = LocalDateTime.parse("2024-05-15T15:00:00")
    
    def parseDateTime(dateTimeStr: String): LocalDateTime = {
      LocalDateTime.parse(dateTimeStr, DateTimeFormatter.ISO_LOCAL_DATE_TIME)
    }
    
    val reservations = user.reservations.map { reservationId =>
      try {
        val reservation = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
        // Check if any flights have already been flown
        val hasFlownFlight = reservation.flights.exists { flight =>
          val flightStatus = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
          flightStatus == "flying"
        }
        (reservationId, reservation, hasFlownFlight)
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => (reservationId, null, false)
      }
    }
    
    // Filter for business class reservations
    val businessReservations = reservations.filter { case (_, reservation, _) =>
      reservation != null && reservation.cabin == "business"
    }
    
    println(s"Total reservations: ${reservations.size}")
    println(s"Business class reservations: ${businessReservations.size}")
    
    businessReservations.foreach { case (reservationId, reservation, hasFlownFlight) =>
      println(s"\n=== Reservation ID: $reservationId ===")
      println(s"Cabin: ${reservation.cabin}")
      println(s"Status: ${reservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
      println(s"Origin: ${reservation.origin} -> Destination: ${reservation.destination}")
      println(s"Flight type: ${reservation.flightType}")
      println(s"Created at: ${reservation.createdAt}")
      println(s"Number of passengers: ${reservation.passengers.size}")
      println(s"Has flown flights: $hasFlownFlight")
      println("Flights:")
      reservation.flights.foreach { flight =>
        val status = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
        println(s"  - ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: ${flight.origin} to ${flight.destination}, price: $$${flight.price}, status: $status")

    // Get details for JG7FMM
    val reservationJG7FMM = getReservationDetails("JG7FMM")
    println(s"Reservation JG7FMM details:")
    println(s"Original payment: ${reservationJG7FMM.paymentHistory}")
    println(s"Number of passengers: ${reservationJG7FMM.passengers.size}")
    println(s"Current baggage: total=${reservationJG7FMM.totalBaggages}, nonfree=${reservationJG7FMM.nonfreeBaggages}")
    
    // Check baggage allowance calculation
    // Regular member with business class: 2 free bags per passenger
    val currentFreeBagsBusiness = reservationJG7FMM.passengers.size * 2
    println(s"Current free baggage allowance (business): $currentFreeBagsBusiness bags")
    println(s"Current paid bags: ${reservationJG7FMM.nonfreeBaggages}")
    
    // After downgrade to economy: 1 free bag per passenger for regular member
    val newFreeBagsEconomy = reservationJG7FMM.passengers.size * 1
    println(s"New free baggage allowance (economy): $newFreeBagsEconomy bags")
    
    // Check if we need to add paid bags
    val currentTotalBags = reservationJG7FMM.totalBaggages
    if (currentTotalBags > newFreeBagsEconomy) {
      val bagsToPayFor = currentTotalBags - newFreeBagsEconomy
      println(s"Need to pay for $bagsToPayFor bags at $50 each = $$${bagsToPayFor * 50}")
    } else {
      println(s"No additional bags needed. You have $currentTotalBags bags, which is within the $newFreeBagsEconomy free bag limit.")
    }

      println(s"Reservation IDs: ${user.reservations.mkString(", ")}")
      
      // Check for Orlando to Charlotte flights
      println("\nChecking reservations for Orlando to Charlotte flights...")
      
      val mcoToCltReservations = user.reservations.map { reservationId =>
        try {
          val reservation = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
          (reservationId, reservation)
        } catch {
          case e: Exception => (reservationId, null)
        }
      }.filter(_._2 != null)
       .filter { case (_, reservation) =>
         reservation.origin == "MCO" && reservation.destination == "CLT"
       }

          println(s"Passengers: ${reservation.passengers.size}")
          println(s"Created at: ${reservation.createdAt}")
          println(s"Insurance: ${reservation.insurance}")

ERROR #375  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    20 (trial 5)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Filter one-stop flights where first flight departs at or after 11:00 AM EST
    val filteredOneStopFlights = allOneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair.head
      val departureTime = firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      // Parse time (format: "HH:MM:SS")
      val timeParts = departureTime.split(":")
      val hours = timeParts(0).toInt
      hours >= 11 // 11 AM or later
    }
    
    println(s"One-stop flights with first leg departing at or after 11:00 AM EST: ${filteredOneStopFlights.size}")
    
    // Filter further for economy class availability
    val economyOptions = filteredOneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      flightPair.forall(flight => flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0)
    }
    
    println(s"\nEconomy class options with seats available: ${economyOptions.size}")
    
    // Display the options
    println("\nAvailable one-stop options (departing after 11:00 AM EST, economy class):")
    economyOptions.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flights, idx) =>
      val firstFlight = flights(0)
      val secondFlight = flights(1)
      val totalEconomyPrice = flights.map(_.prices("economy")).sum
      
      println(s"\nOption ${idx + 1}:")
      println(s"  First flight: ${firstFlight.flightNumber} from ${firstFlight.origin} to ${firstFlight.destination}")
      println(s"    Departure: ${firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST on May 20")
      println(s"    Arrival: ${firstFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${firstFlight.prices("economy")}")
      
      println(s"  Second flight: ${secondFlight.flightNumber} from ${secondFlight.origin} to ${secondFlight.destination}")
      println(s"    Departure: ${secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST on May ${if (secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst == "23:00:00" && secondFlight.origin == "PHX") "20/21" else "20"}")
      println(s"    Arrival: ${secondFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${secondFlight.prices("economy")}")
      
      println(s"  Total economy price: $$$totalEconomyPrice")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------
    31 |  println(s"    Economy price: $${firstFlight.prices("economy")}")
       |                                                      ^^^^^^^
       |                      ',' or ')' expected, but string interpolator found
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------
    36 |  println(s"    Economy price: $${secondFlight.prices("economy")}")
       |                                                       ^^^^^^^
       |                      ',' or ')' expected, but string interpolator found

ERROR #380  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Filter one-stop flights where first flight departs at or after 11:00 AM EST
    val filteredOneStopFlights = allOneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair.head
      val departureTime = firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      // Parse time (format: "HH:MM:SS")
      val timeParts = departureTime.split(":")
      val hours = timeParts(0).toInt
      hours >= 11 // 11 AM or later
    }
    
    println(s"One-stop flights with first leg departing at or after 11:00 AM EST: ${filteredOneStopFlights.size}")
    
    // Filter further for economy class availability
    val economyOptions = filteredOneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      flightPair.forall(flight => flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0)
    }
    
    println(s"\nEconomy class options with seats available: ${economyOptions.size}")
    
    // Display the options
    println("\nAvailable one-stop options (departing after 11:00 AM EST, economy class):")
    economyOptions.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flights, idx) =>
      val firstFlight = flights(0)
      val secondFlight = flights(1)
      val totalEconomyPrice = flights.map(_.prices("economy")).sum
      
      println(s"\nOption ${idx + 1}:")
      println(s"  First flight: ${firstFlight.flightNumber} from ${firstFlight.origin} to ${firstFlight.destination}")
      println(s"    Departure: ${firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST on May 20")
      println(s"    Arrival: ${firstFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Economy price: $" + firstFlight.prices("economy"))
      
      println(s"  Second flight: ${secondFlight.flightNumber} from ${secondFlight.origin} to ${secondFlight.destination}")
      println(s"    Departure: ${secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST on May ${if (secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst == "23:00:00" && secondFlight.origin == "PHX") "20/21" else "20"}")
      println(s"    Arrival: ${secondFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Economy price: $" + secondFlight.prices("economy"))
      
      println(s"  Total economy price: $" + totalEconomyPrice)

    // Let's explore more date combinations to find the absolute cheapest
    println("Exploring different date combinations for business class...")
    
    // Check IAH to SEA on May 23 (current date) - maybe cheaper business class?
    val iahToSeaMay23 = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-23")
    val cheapestIahToSeaMay23 = if (iahToSeaMay23.nonEmpty) {
      iahToSeaMay23.map(f => f.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min
    } else {
      // Check one-stop
      val oneStopMay23 = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-23")
      if (oneStopMay23.nonEmpty) {
        oneStopMay23.map { pair =>
          pair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue) + pair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)
        }.min
      } else Int.MaxValue
    }
    println(s"Cheapest IAH→SEA business class on May 23: $${cheapestIahToSeaMay23}")
    
    // Check IAH to SEA on May 25
    val iahToSeaMay25 = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-25")
    val cheapestIahToSeaMay25 = if (iahToSeaMay25.nonEmpty) {
      iahToSeaMay25.map(f => f.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min
    } else {
      val oneStopMay25 = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-25")
      if (oneStopMay25.nonEmpty) {
        oneStopMay25.map { pair =>
          pair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue) + pair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)
        }.min
      } else Int.MaxValue
    }
    println(s"Cheapest IAH→SEA business class on May 25: $${cheapestIahToSeaMay25}")
    
    // Check SEA to JFK on May 27
    val seaToJfkMay27 = searchDirectFlight("SEA", "JFK", "2024-05-27")
    val cheapestSeaToJfkMay27 = if (seaToJfkMay27.nonEmpty) {
      seaToJfkMay27.map(f => f.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min
    } else Int.MaxValue
    println(s"Cheapest SEA→JFK business class on May 27: $${cheapestSeaToJfkMay27}")
    
    // Check JFK to IAH on May 26
    val jfkToIahMay26 = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "IAH", "2024-05-26")
    val cheapestJfkToIahMay26 = if (jfkToIahMay26.nonEmpty) {
      jfkToIahMay26.map(f => f.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min
    } else Int.MaxValue
    println(s"Cheapest JFK→IAH business class on May 26: $${cheapestJfkToIahMay26}")

      ("May 23-26-27", cheapestIahToSeaMay23 + cheapestSeaToJfkMay27 + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price),
      ("May 24-25-28", cheapestOneStopPrice + cheapestSeaToJfkMay25Price + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price),
      ("May 24-26-27", cheapestOneStopPrice + cheapestSeaToJfkMay25Price + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price), // Using May 26 SEA->JFK
      ("May 25-26-28", cheapestIahToSeaMay25 + cheapestSeaToJfkMay27 + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price)
    )
    
    println("\nCheapest combinations found:")
    dateCombinations.foreach { case (dates, total) =>
      if (total < Int.MaxValue) {
        val total3Passengers = total * 3
        val difference = total3Passengers - currentTotal3Passengers
        val outOfPocket = difference - (totalCertificateValue + totalGiftCardValue)
        println(s"  $dates: $${total} per passenger, out-of-pocket: $$$outOfPocket")
      }
    }
    
    // Check if any combination gets under $1,000 out-of-pocket
    val bestCombination = dateCombinations.filter(_._2 < Int.MaxValue).minBy { case (_, total) =>
      val total3Passengers = total * 3
      val difference = total3Passengers - currentTotal3Passengers
      difference - (totalCertificateValue + totalGiftCardValue)
    }
    
    val bestTotal = bestCombination._2
    val bestTotal3Passengers = bestTotal * 3
    val bestDifference = bestTotal3Passengers - currentTotal3Passengers
    val bestOutOfPocket = bestDifference - (totalCertificateValue + totalGiftCardValue)
    
    println(s"\nBest combination: ${bestCombination._1}")
    println(s"Out-of-pocket cost: $$$bestOutOfPocket")
    
    if (bestOutOfPocket <= 1000) {
      println("\n✓ Found a combination within your $1,000 budget!")
    } else {
      println(s"\n✗ Even the cheapest combination exceeds your $1,000 budget by $$${bestOutOfPocket - 1000}")
    }

    } else {
      // Check one-stop
      val oneStopMay23 = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-23")
      if (oneStopMay23.nonEmpty) {
        oneStopMay23.map { pair =>
          pair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue) + pair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)
        }.min
      } else Int.MaxValue
    }
    println(s"Cheapest IAH→SEA business class on May 23: $${cheapestIahToSeaMay23}")
    
    // Check IAH to SEA on May 25
    val iahToSeaMay25 = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-25")
    val cheapestIahToSeaMay25 = if (iahToSeaMay25.nonEmpty) {
      iahToSeaMay25.map(f => f.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min
    } else {
      val oneStopMay25 = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-25")
      if (oneStopMay25.nonEmpty) {
        oneStopMay25.map { pair =>
          pair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue) + pair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)
        }.min
      } else Int.MaxValue
    }
    println(s"Cheapest IAH→SEA business class on May 25: $${cheapestIahToSeaMay25}")
    
    // Check SEA to JFK on May 27
    val seaToJfkMay27 = searchDirectFlight("SEA", "JFK", "2024-05-27")
    val cheapestSeaToJfkMay27 = if (seaToJfkMay27.nonEmpty) {
      seaToJfkMay27.map(f => f.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min
    } else Int.MaxValue
    println(s"Cheapest SEA→JFK business class on May 27: $${cheapestSeaToJfkMay27}")
    
    // Check JFK to IAH on May 26
    val jfkToIahMay26 = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "IAH", "2024-05-26")
    val cheapestJfkToIahMay26 = if (jfkToIahMay26.nonEmpty) {
      jfkToIahMay26.map(f => f.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min
    } else Int.MaxValue
    println(s"Cheapest JFK→IAH business class on May 26: $${cheapestJfkToIahMay26}")
    
    // Find the absolute cheapest combination
    val dateCombinations = List(
      ("May 23-26-27", cheapestIahToSeaMay23 + cheapestSeaToJfkMay27 + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price),
      ("May 24-25-28", cheapestOneStopPrice + cheapestSeaToJfkMay25Price + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price),
      ("May 24-26-27", cheapestOneStopPrice + cheapestSeaToJfkMay25Price + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price), // Using May 26 SEA->JFK
      ("May 25-26-28", cheapestIahToSeaMay25 + cheapestSeaToJfkMay27 + cheapestJfkToIahMay28Price)
    )
    
    println("\nCheapest combinations found:")
    dateCombinations.foreach { case (dates, total) =>
      if (total < Int.MaxValue) {
        val total3Passengers = total * 3
        val difference = total3Passengers - currentTotal3Passengers
        val outOfPocket = difference - (totalCertificateValue + totalGiftCardValue)
        println(s"  $dates: $${total} per passenger, out-of-pocket: $${outOfPocket}")
      }
    }
    
    // Check if any combination gets under $1,000 out-of-pocket
    val bestCombination = dateCombinations.filter(_._2 < Int.MaxValue).minBy { case (_, total) =>
      val total3Passengers = total * 3
      val difference = total3Passengers - currentTotal3Passengers
      difference - (totalCertificateValue + totalGiftCardValue)
    }
    
    val bestTotal = bestCombination._2
    val bestTotal3Passengers = bestTotal * 3
    val bestDifference = bestTotal3Passengers - currentTotal3Passengers
    val bestOutOfPocket = bestDifference - (totalCertificateValue + totalGiftCardValue)
    
    println(s"\nBest combination: ${bestCombination._1}")
    println(s"Out-of-pocket cost: $${bestOutOfPocket}")
    
    if (bestOutOfPocket <= 1000) {
      println("\n✓ Found a combination within your $1,000 budget!")
    } else {
      val overBudget = bestOutOfPocket - 1000
      println(s"\n✗ Even the cheapest combination exceeds your $1,000 budget by $${overBudget}")
    }

    // Get actual numbers for the cheapest combinations

    println(s"Cheapest IAH→SEA May 25: $${actualCheapestIahToSeaMay25}")

    println(s"  2. May 24-25-28: $${combo2}")
    println(s"  3. May 24-26-28: $${combo3}")
    println(s"  4. May 25-27-28: $${combo4}")
    
    // Calculate out-of-pocket for each
    def calculateOutOfPocket(totalPerPassenger: Int): Double = {
      val total3Passengers = totalPerPassenger * 3
      val difference = total3Passengers - currentTotal3Passengers
      difference - (totalCertificateValue + totalGiftCardValue)
    }
    
    println(s"\nOut-of-pocket costs:")
    println(s"  1. May 23-27-28: $${calculateOutOfPocket(combo1)}")
    println(s"  2. May 24-25-28: $${calculateOutOfPocket(combo2)}")
    println(s"  3. May 24-26-28: $${calculateOutOfPocket(combo3)}")
    println(s"  4. May 25-27-28: $${calculateOutOfPocket(combo4)}")
    
    // Find the absolute minimum
    val allCombinations = List(combo1, combo2, combo3, combo4).filter(_ < Int.MaxValue)
    val minCombination = allCombinations.min
    val minOutOfPocket = calculateOutOfPocket(minCombination)

    // Let me recalculate everything in one go
    println("Searching for the absolute cheapest business class combination...")
    
    // Search for all needed flights
    val iahToSeaMay23Direct = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-23")
    val iahToSeaMay23OneStop = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-23")
    val cheapestIahToSeaMay23 = {
      val directPrice = if (iahToSeaMay23Direct.nonEmpty) iahToSeaMay23Direct.map(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min else Int.MaxValue
      val oneStopPrice = if (iahToSeaMay23OneStop.nonEmpty) iahToSeaMay23OneStop.map(pair => pair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue) + pair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min else Int.MaxValue
      math.min(directPrice, oneStopPrice)
    }
    
    val iahToSeaMay25Direct = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-25")
    val iahToSeaMay25OneStop = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-25")

      val oneStopPrice = if (iahToSeaMay25OneStop.nonEmpty) iahToSeaMay25OneStop.map(pair => pair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue) + pair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)).min else Int.MaxValue
      math.min(directPrice, oneStopPrice)
    }
    
    val seaToJfkMay27 = searchDirectFlight("SEA", "JFK", "2024-05-27")

    val minCombination = allCombinations.min
    val minOutOfPocket = calculateOutOfPocket(minCombination)
    
    println(s"\nMinimum out-of-pocket cost: $${minOutOfPocket}")
    
    // Check if under $1,000
    if (minOutOfPocket <= 1000) {
      println("\n✓ Found a combination within your $1,000 budget!")
    } else {
      val overBudget = minOutOfPocket - 1000
      println(s"\n✗ Even the cheapest combination exceeds your $1,000 budget by $${overBudget}")
    }

      println(s"  Status: ${flight.status}")

        println(s"Option:")

        val allEconomyAvailable = flightPair.forall(_.availableSeats.get("economy").exists(_ > 0))

          println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin}-${flight.destination} at ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")

    // Search for business class flights from JFK to SFO on May 26, 2024
    val date1 = "2024-05-26"
    val origin1 = "JFK"
    val destination1 = "SFO"
    
    println(s"Searching for flights from $origin1 to $destination1 on $date1...")
    val flightsToSFO = searchDirectFlight(origin1, destination1, date1)
    
    // Filter for business class availability and sort by price
    val businessFlightsToSFO = flightsToSFO.filter { flight =>
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 && 
      flight.status == "available"
    }.sortBy(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue))
    
    println(s"\nAvailable Business Class Flights from $origin1 to $destination1 on $date1:")
    if (businessFlightsToSFO.isEmpty) {
      println("No direct business class flights found.")
    } else {
      businessFlightsToSFO.foreach { flight =>
        println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}:")
        println(s"  Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Available seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
        println(s"  Price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
        println()
      }
    }
    
    // Now search for return flights from SFO to JFK on May 28, 2024
    val date2 = "2024-05-28"
    val origin2 = "SFO"
    val destination2 = "JFK"
    
    println(s"\nSearching for flights from $origin2 to $destination2 on $date2...")
    val flightsToJFK = searchDirectFlight(origin2, destination2, date2)
    
    // Filter for business class availability and sort by price
    val businessFlightsToJFK = flightsToJFK.filter { flight =>
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 && 
      flight.status == "available"
    }.sortBy(_.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue))
    
    println(s"\nAvailable Business Class Flights from $origin2 to $destination2 on $date2:")
    if (businessFlightsToJFK.isEmpty) {
      println("No direct business class flights found.")
    } else {
      businessFlightsToJFK.foreach { flight =>
        println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}:")
        println(s"  Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"  Available seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
        println(s"  Price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
        println()
      }
    }
    
    // Also check for one-stop options from SFO to JFK
    println(s"\nSearching for one-stop flights from $origin2 to $destination2 on $date2...")
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight(origin2, destination2, date2)
    
    // Filter for business class availability in both segments
    val businessOneStopFlights = oneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      flightPair.size == 2 && 
      flightPair(0).availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 &&
      flightPair(1).availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 &&
      flightPair(0).status == "available" &&
      flightPair(1).status == "available"
    }.map { flightPair =>
      val totalPrice = flightPair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", 0) + flightPair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
      (flightPair, totalPrice)
    }.sortBy(_._2)
    
    println(s"\nAvailable One-Stop Business Class Flights from $origin2 to $destination2 on $date2:")
    if (businessOneStopFlights.isEmpty) {
      println("No one-stop business class flights found.")
    } else {
      businessOneStopFlights.take(3).foreach { case (flightPair, totalPrice) =>
        println(s"Option: ${flightPair(0).flightNumber} (${flightPair(0).origin}->${flightPair(0).destination}) + ${flightPair(1).flightNumber} (${flightPair(1).origin}->${flightPair(1).destination})")
        println(s"  First leg: ${flightPair(0).flightNumber} ${flightPair(0).origin}->${flightPair(0).destination}")
        println(s"    Departure: ${flightPair(0).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Arrival: ${flightPair(0).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Price: $${flightPair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
        println(s"  Second leg: ${flightPair(1).flightNumber} ${flightPair(1).origin}->${flightPair(1).destination}")
        println(s"    Departure: ${flightPair(1).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Arrival: ${flightPair(1).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Price: $${flightPair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
        println(s"  Total Price: $$$totalPrice")
        println()
      }
    }

    println(s"\\nSearching for one-stop flights from $origin2 to $destination2 on $date2...")
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight(origin2, destination2, date2)
    
    // Filter for business class availability in both segments
    val businessOneStopFlights = oneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      flightPair.size == 2 && 
      flightPair(0).availableSeats.getOrElse(\"business\", 0) > 0 &&
      flightPair(1).availableSeats.getOrElse(\"business\", 0) > 0 &&
      flightPair(0).status == \"available\" &&
      flightPair(1).status == \"available\"
    }.map { flightPair =>
      val totalPrice = flightPair(0).prices.getOrElse(\"business\", 0) + flightPair(1).prices.getOrElse(\"business\", 0)
      (flightPair, totalPrice)
    }.sortBy(_._2)
    
    println(s"\\nAvailable One-Stop Business Class Flights from $origin2 to $destination2 on $date2:")
    if (businessOneStopFlights.isEmpty) {
      println(\"No one-stop business class flights found.\")
    } else {
      businessOneStopFlights.take(3).foreach { case (flightPair, totalPrice) =>
        println(s"Option: ${flightPair(0).flightNumber} (${flightPair(0).origin}->${flightPair(0).destination}) + ${flightPair(1).flightNumber} (${flightPair(1).origin}->${flightPair(1).destination})")
        println(s"  First leg: ${flightPair(0).flightNumber} ${flightPair(0).origin}->${flightPair(0).destination}")
        println(s"    Departure: ${flightPair(0).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Arrival: ${flightPair(0).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        val price1 = flightPair(0).prices.getOrElse(\"business\", 0)
        println(s"    Price: $$$price1")
        println(s"  Second leg: ${flightPair(1).flightNumber} ${flightPair(1).origin}->${flightPair(1).destination}")
        println(s"    Departure: ${flightPair(1).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Arrival: ${flightPair(1).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        val price2 = flightPair(1).prices.getOrElse(\"business\", 0)
        println(s"    Price: $$$price2")
        println(s"  Total Price: $$$totalPrice")
        println()
      }
    }

    var cheapestOneStop: Option[(List[DirectFlight], Int)] = None
    
    for (flightPair <- oneStopFlights) {
      if (flightPair.size == 2) {
        val first = flightPair(0)
        val second = flightPair(1)
        
        // Check if both flights have business class availability
        val firstBusinessPrice = first.prices.get("business")
        val secondBusinessPrice = second.prices.get("business")

            firstBusinessPrice.isDefined && secondBusinessPrice.isDefined &&
            firstBusinessPrice.get > 0 && secondBusinessPrice.get > 0) {

    println(s"\nCertificate Balance: $$$totalCertificateBalance")
    
    if (totalCertificateBalance >= totalFlightCost) {
      println(s"✓ Sufficient certificate balance available.")
    } else {
      val shortfall = totalFlightCost - totalCertificateBalance
      println(s"✗ Insufficient certificate balance. Shortfall: $$$shortfall")
      println(s"Available gift cards: $327")
      println(s"Available credit cards: Mastercard and Visa")

      // Also check if there are earlier arrival options
      println("\nAll available options (by arrival time):")
      availableOptions.sortBy(flights => flights(1).scheduledArrivalTimeEst).foreach { flights =>
        val f = flights(0)
        val s = flights(1)
        val time = calculateTravelTime(f.scheduledDepartureTimeEst, s.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
        val p = f.prices("economy") + s.prices("economy")
        println(s"  ${f.flightNumber}+${s.flightNumber}: Depart ${f.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}, Arrive ${s.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} (${"%.1f".format(time)}h, $$$p)")
      }
    } else {
      println("No available one-stop options with economy seats found.")
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    println("\n=== Baggage Information ===")
    val reservation = getReservationDetails("OBUT9V")
    val currentBags = reservation.totalBaggages
    val currentPaidBags = reservation.nonfreeBaggages
    val freeBagsPerPassenger = 2 // Silver member in economy
    val totalFreeBags = reservation.passengers.length * freeBagsPerPassenger
    
    println(s"Current baggage: $currentBags total, $currentPaidBags paid")

ERROR #424  [COMPILATION]  [E189] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    21 (trial 5)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Check user's payment methods to find gift card with smallest balance
    val user = getUserDetails("sofia_kim_7287")
    
    // Filter gift cards and find the one with smallest balance
    val giftCards = user.paymentMethods.collect {
      case (id, GiftCard(id, amount)) => (id, amount)
    }.toList
    
    println("Your gift cards:")
    giftCards.foreach { case (id, amount) =>
      println(s"  $id: $$$amount")
    }
    
    val smallestGiftCard = giftCards.minBy(_._2)
    println(s"\nGift card with smallest balance: ${smallestGiftCard._1} ($$${smallestGiftCard._2})")

    val allOutboundFlights = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SFO", outboundDate)
    val filteredOutbound = allOutboundFlights.filter { flight =>
      val depTime = flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      depTime >= "08:00:00" && depTime <= "21:00:00"
    }

      val basicPrice = flight.prices.get("basic_economy").getOrElse(0)
      val economyPrice = flight.prices.get("economy").getOrElse(0)
      val businessPrice = flight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"    Basic Economy: $${if (basicPrice > 0) basicPrice.toString else "N/A"}")
      println(s"    Economy: $${if (economyPrice > 0) economyPrice.toString else "N/A"}")
      println(s"    Business: $${if (businessPrice > 0) businessPrice.toString else "N/A"}")
      println()
    }
    
    // Return flights
    println(s"\nReturn (SFO to IAH on $returnDate):")

      depTime >= "08:00:00" && depTime <= "21:00:00"
    }

      val basicPrice = flight.prices.get("basic_economy").getOrElse(0)
      val economyPrice = flight.prices.get("economy").getOrElse(0)
      val businessPrice = flight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)

    // Check current business class prices for both flights
    val flights1 = searchDirectFlight("BOS", "MCO", "2024-05-18")
    val flights2 = searchDirectFlight("MCO", "MSP", "2024-05-19")
    
    val flight1Business = flights1.find(_.flightNumber == "HAT235").flatMap(f => f.prices.get("business"))
    val flight2Business = flights2.find(_.flightNumber == "HAT298").flatMap(f => f.prices.get("business"))
    
    val flight1BusinessPrice = flight1Business.getOrElse(-1)
    val flight2BusinessPrice = flight2Business.getOrElse(-1)
    
    println(s"Flight HAT235 on 2024-05-18 business price: $${if (flight1BusinessPrice == -1) "Not available" else flight1BusinessPrice}")
    println(s"Flight HAT298 on 2024-05-19 business price: $${if (flight2BusinessPrice == -1) "Not available" else flight2BusinessPrice}")
    
    // Calculate total upgrade cost
    val currentTotalPrice = reservation.flights.map(_.price).sum
    val businessTotalPrice = if (flight1BusinessPrice == -1 || flight2BusinessPrice == -1) 0 else flight1BusinessPrice + flight2BusinessPrice
    val upgradeCost = if (flight1BusinessPrice == -1 || flight2BusinessPrice == -1) 0 else businessTotalPrice - currentTotalPrice

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Search for one-stop flights from ATL to PHL on May 24, 2024
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("ATL", "PHL", "2024-05-24")
    println(s"One-stop flight combinations found: ${oneStopFlights.size}")
    
    // Filter for available flights and find cheapest economy option
    var cheapestOption: Option[(List[DirectFlight], Int)] = None
    
    for (flightPair <- oneStopFlights) {
      // Check if both flights are available
      if (flightPair.size == 2 && flightPair(0).status == "available" && flightPair(1).status == "available") {
        // Check if both flights have economy class
        if (flightPair(0).prices.contains("economy") && flightPair(1).prices.contains("economy")) {
          val totalPrice = flightPair(0).prices("economy") + flightPair(1).prices("economy")
          if (cheapestOption.isEmpty || totalPrice < cheapestOption.get._2) {
            cheapestOption = Some((flightPair, totalPrice))
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    println("\nCheapest one-stop economy option:")
    cheapestOption.foreach { case (flights, totalPrice) =>
      println(s"Total price: $$totalPrice")
      println("First flight:")
      println(s"  Flight: ${flights(0).flightNumber}")
      println(s"  Route: ${flights(0).origin} -> ${flights(0).destination}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${flights(0).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${flights(0).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Price: $${flights(0).prices("economy")}")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${flights(0).availableSeats("economy")}")
      println("Second flight:")
      println(s"  Flight: ${flights(1).flightNumber}")
      println(s"  Route: ${flights(1).origin} -> ${flights(1).destination}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${flights(1).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${flights(1).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Price: $${flights(1).prices("economy")}")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${flights(1).availableSeats("economy")}")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------

ERROR #463  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Now search for direct flights from New York airports to Seattle on May 20th 2024-05-20
    // New York airports: JFK, LGA, EWR
    // Seattle: SEA
    val date = "2024-05-20"
    val nyAirports = List("JFK", "LGA", "EWR")
    val destination = "SEA"
    
    val allFlights = nyAirports.flatMap { origin =>
      searchDirectFlight(origin, destination, date)
    }
    
    println(s"Found ${allFlights.size} direct flights from New York to Seattle on $date")
    
    // Filter flights with departure time after 11:00 AM EST
    // scheduledDepartureTimeEst is in format "HH:MM:SS"
    val filteredFlights = allFlights.filter { flight =>
      val depTime = flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      // Compare as string since format is fixed
      depTime >= "11:00:00"
    }
    
    println(s"${filteredFlights.size} flights depart at or after 11:00 AM EST")
    
    // Show available economy flights
    val economyFlights = filteredFlights.filter { flight =>
      flight.availableSeats.get("economy").exists(_ > 0) && flight.prices.contains("economy")
    }
    
    println(s"${economyFlights.size} economy flights available:")
    economyFlights.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber} from ${flight.origin} to ${flight.destination}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST, Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"  Price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println()
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------
    34 |  println(s"  Price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
       |                                                 ^^^^^^^
       |                      ',' or ')' expected, but string interpolator found

    // Check for one-stop flights from New York to Seattle on May 20th
    val oneStopFlights = nyAirports.flatMap { origin =>
      searchOnestopFlight(origin, destination, date)
    }
    
    println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.size} one-stop flight options from New York to Seattle on $date")
    
    // Filter for options where the first flight departs at or after 11:00 AM EST
    val filteredOneStopFlights = oneStopFlights.filter { flights =>
      val firstFlight = flights.head
      firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst >= "11:00:00"
    }
    
    println(s"${filteredOneStopFlights.size} one-stop options depart at or after 11:00 AM EST")
    
    // Show economy options
    val economyOneStopFlights = filteredOneStopFlights.filter { flights =>
      flights.forall { flight =>
        flight.availableSeats.get("economy").exists(_ > 0) && flight.prices.contains("economy")
      }
    }
    
    println(s"${economyOneStopFlights.size} one-stop economy options available:")
    economyOneStopFlights.foreach { flights =>
      val firstFlight = flights.head
      val secondFlight = flights(1)
      println(s"Option: ${firstFlight.flightNumber} (${firstFlight.origin}→${firstFlight.destination}) → ${secondFlight.flightNumber} (${secondFlight.origin}→${secondFlight.destination})")
      println(s"  First flight: ${firstFlight.flightNumber} from ${firstFlight.origin} to ${firstFlight.destination}")
      println(s"    Departure: ${firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST, Arrival: ${firstFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Available economy seats: ${firstFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"  Second flight: ${secondFlight.flightNumber} from ${secondFlight.origin} to ${secondFlight.destination}")
      println(s"    Departure: ${secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST, Arrival: ${secondFlight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Available economy seats: ${secondFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      val totalPrice = firstFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0) + secondFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
      println(s"  Total economy price: $$" + totalPrice)
      println()
    }

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Get the first reservation details
    val reservationJG7FMM = getReservationDetails("JG7FMM")
    println("Reservation JG7FMM details:")
    println(s"Total original price: $${reservationJG7FMM.flights.map(_.price).sum}")
    println(s"Flights: ${reservationJG7FMM.flights.map(f => s"${f.flightNumber} (${f.date}) - $$${f.price}").mkString(", ")}")
    
    // Check current economy prices for each flight
    val flightInfos = reservationJG7FMM.flights.map { flight =>
      val availableFlights = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
      val economyFlight = availableFlights.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
      (flight, economyFlight)
    }
    
    println("\nCurrent economy prices:")
    flightInfos.foreach { case (originalFlight, economyFlightOpt) =>
      economyFlightOpt match {
        case Some(economyFlight) =>
          val economyPrice = economyFlight.prices.get("economy")
          println(s"Flight ${originalFlight.flightNumber} on ${originalFlight.date}:")
          println(s"  Original business price: $${originalFlight.price}")
          println(s"  Current economy price: $${economyPrice.getOrElse("N/A")}")
          println(s"  Price difference: $${economyPrice.map(ep => originalFlight.price - ep).getOrElse("N/A")}")
        case None =>
          println(s"Flight ${originalFlight.flightNumber} on ${originalFlight.date}: Not available in economy")
      }
    }

    val returnFlight2 = FlightInfo("HAT021", "2024-05-28")
    
    val flights = List(outboundFlight, returnFlight1, returnFlight2)
    
    // Use the same passengers from the cancelled reservation
    val passengers = List(
      Passenger("Mohamed", "Silva", "1960-11-26"),
      Passenger("Raj", "Sanchez", "1986-09-12"),
      Passenger("Liam", "Wilson", "1980-03-27")
    )
    
    // Calculate payment: use certificates first, then gift cards
    // Total needed: $1173
    // Certificates available: $1000
    // Gift cards available: $327
    // Strategy: Use all certificates ($1000), then gift cards for remaining $173
    
    // We need to check which specific certificates and gift cards to use
    // Let me examine the user's payment methods again
    println("Available payment methods:")
    userDetails.paymentMethods.foreach { case (id, pm) =>

        case PaymentMethod.Certificate(_, amount) => println(s"  Certificate $id: $$$amount")
        case PaymentMethod.GiftCard(_, amount) => println(s"  Gift card $id: $$$amount")
        case _ => // skip credit cards
      }
    }
    
    // We have 3 certificates: $250, $250, $500 = $1000 total
    // We have 2 gift cards: $129, $198 = $327 total
    // Need $1173 total: use all certificates ($1000) + $173 from gift cards

    // But the API requires payment methods as List[Payment] with amounts
    // We need to split the payments appropriately
    val certificatePayments = List(
      Payment("certificate_2765295", 250),  // $250 certificate
      Payment("certificate_9984806", 250),  // $250 certificate  
      Payment("certificate_3765853", 500)   // $500 certificate
    )
    
    val giftCardPayments = List(
      Payment("gift_card_6136092", 129),   // $129 gift card (full)
      Payment("gift_card_8020792", 44)     // $44 from $198 gift card
    )
    
    val allPayments = certificatePayments ++ giftCardPayments
    val totalPayment = allPayments.map(_.amount).sum
    println(s"\nTotal payment calculated: $$$totalPayment (should be $1173)")
    
    // Now book the reservation
    println("\nBooking reservation...")
    val newReservation = bookReservation(
      userId = "mohamed_silva_9265",
      origin = "JFK",
      destination = "SFO",
      flightType = FlightType.RoundTrip,
      cabin = Cabin.Economy,
      flights = flights,
      passengers = passengers,
      paymentMethods = allPayments,
      totalBaggages = 0,
      nonfreeBaggages = 0,
      insurance = Insurance.No
    )

  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    10 (trial 6)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Breakdown of your current payment
    val currentFlightFares = currentTotalPerFlight
    val insuranceCost = 30 * 3 // $30 per passenger for 3 passengers
    val baggageCost = 0 // You have 1 total bag, 0 non-free bags
    
    val estimatedTaxesFees = currentTotal - (currentFlightFares + insuranceCost + baggageCost)
    
    println("Current payment breakdown:")
    println(s"  Flight fares: $$$currentFlightFares")
    println(s"  Travel insurance (3 passengers × $30): $$$insuranceCost")
    println(s"  Baggage fees: $$$baggageCost")
    println(s"  Estimated taxes & fees: $$$estimatedTaxesFees")
    println(s"  Total paid: $$$currentTotal")
    
    // For the new booking, insurance stays the same (cannot add/remove after booking)
    // Baggage stays the same (1 bag, 0 non-free)
    // Taxes/fees would be recalculated based on new fares
    
    println("\nFor the new booking:")
    println(s"  New business flight fares: $$$businessTotal")
    println(s"  Travel insurance (already included): $$$insuranceCost")
    println(s"  Baggage (unchanged): $$$baggageCost")
    println(s"  New estimated total: $$${businessTotal + insuranceCost + baggageCost + estimatedTaxesFees}")

    // Updated function to handle time strings with +1 (next day) notation
    def parseTimeWithOffset(timeStr: String): (LocalTime, Int) = {
      if (timeStr.contains("+1")) {
        val timePart = timeStr.take(8) // Take "HH:MM:SS"
        (LocalTime.parse(timePart), 1)
      } else {
        (LocalTime.parse(timeStr), 0)
      }
    }
    
    // Updated function to calculate duration
    def calculateDurationFixed(departureTime: String, arrivalTime: String): Duration = {
      val (depTime, depOffset) = parseTimeWithOffset(departureTime)
      val (arrTime, arrOffset) = parseTimeWithOffset(arrivalTime)
      
      // Calculate day difference
      val dayDiff = arrOffset - depOffset
      
      if (dayDiff > 0 || (dayDiff == 0 && arrTime.isBefore(depTime))) {
        // Overnight flight or arrival next day
        val hoursUntilMidnight = Duration.between(depTime, LocalTime.MAX).plus(Duration.ofSeconds(1))
        val hoursAfterMidnight = Duration.between(LocalTime.MIN, arrTime)
        hoursUntilMidnight.plus(hoursAfterMidnight).plus(Duration.ofHours(24 * dayDiff))
      } else {
        Duration.between(depTime, arrTime)
      }
    }
    
    // Let's re-run the flight duration check with the fixed function
    val flightDurations = scala.collection.mutable.Map[String, List[(String, Duration)]]()
    val flightStatuses = scala.collection.mutable.Map[(String, String), DirectFlight]()
    
    for ((resId, res) <- reservations) {
      println(s"\n=== Checking flight durations for reservation $resId ===")
      val durations = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, Duration)]()
      
      for (flight <- res.flights) {
        // Search for the flight to get scheduled times
        val flightsOnDate = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
        val matchingFlight = flightsOnDate.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
        
        matchingFlight match {
          case Some(f) =>
            // Store flight status for later use
            flightStatuses((flight.flightNumber, flight.date)) = f
            // Calculate duration
            val duration = calculateDurationFixed(f.scheduledDepartureTimeEst, f.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
            durations += ((flight.flightNumber, duration))
            println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin} to ${flight.destination} on ${flight.date}")
            println(s"  Departure: ${f.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}, Arrival: ${f.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
            println(s"  Duration: ${duration.toHours} hours ${duration.toMinutesPart} minutes")
            
          case None =>
            println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber} not found on ${flight.date} from ${flight.origin} to ${flight.destination}")
        }
      }
      
      flightDurations(resId) = durations.toList
    }

      println("Total price after upgrade: $" + updatedPrice)
      
      // Verify upgrade cost
      val upgradeCost = updatedPrice - h8q05lCurrentPrice
      println("\nPrice verification:")
      println("Original price: $" + h8q05lCurrentPrice)
      println("New business price: $" + updatedPrice)
      println("Upgrade cost: $" + upgradeCost)
      println("Paid with: gift_card_5094406")
      
    } catch {
      case e: Exception => 
        println("❌ H8Q05L UPGRADE FAILED: " + e.getMessage)
        println("This may be due to gift card balance or availability issues.")
        
        // Check gift card balance
        val user = getUserDetails("sophia_silva_7557")
        user.paymentMethods.get("gift_card_5094406") match {
          case Some(PaymentMethod.GiftCard(_, amount)) =>
            println("Gift card actual balance: $" + amount)
            if (amount < 163) {
              println("Insufficient balance for $163 upgrade")
            }
          case _ => println("Cannot verify gift card balance")
        }
    }

    // Filter for flights with business class availability on both segments
    val businessOneStopReturn = oneStopReturnFlights.filter { flightPair =>

      println("No one-stop business class flights available on return date.")
    } else {
      // Calculate total prices for each option
      val optionsWithPrices = businessOneStopReturn.map { flightPair =>
        val firstPrice = flightPair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
        val secondPrice = flightPair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
        val totalPrice = firstPrice + secondPrice
        (flightPair, totalPrice)
      }
      
      // Sort by price (cheapest first)
      val sortedOptions = optionsWithPrices.sortBy(_._2)
      
      sortedOptions.zipWithIndex.foreach { case ((flightPair, totalPrice), index) =>
        println(s"\nOption ${index + 1}: Total Price: $$$totalPrice")
        println(s"  Segment 1: ${flightPair(0).flightNumber} (${flightPair(0).origin} -> ${flightPair(0).destination})")
        println(s"    Departure: ${flightPair(0).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}, Arrival: ${flightPair(0).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Price: $${flightPair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
        println(s"  Segment 2: ${flightPair(1).flightNumber} (${flightPair(1).origin} -> ${flightPair(1).destination})")
        println(s"    Departure: ${flightPair(1).scheduledDepartureTimeEst}, Arrival: ${flightPair(1).scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"    Price: $${flightPair(1).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
      }
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------
    38 |    println(s"    Price: $${flightPair(0).prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}")

    val atlToPhlEconomy = atlToPhlDirect.filter(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0)
    val atlToEwrEconomy = atlToEwrDirect.filter(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0)
    
    println(s"\nAvailable economy flights ATL->PHL: ${atlToPhlEconomy.size}")
    println(s"Available economy flights ATL->EWR: ${atlToEwrEconomy.size}")
    
    // Find cheapest options
    val cheapestPhl = if (atlToPhlEconomy.nonEmpty) atlToPhlEconomy.minBy(_.prices.getOrElse("economy", Int.MaxValue)) else null
    val cheapestEwr = if (atlToEwrEconomy.nonEmpty) atlToEwrEconomy.minBy(_.prices.getOrElse("economy", Int.MaxValue)) else null
    
    if (cheapestPhl != null) {
      println(s"\nCheapest ATL->PHL economy flight: ${cheapestPhl.flightNumber}")
      println(s"  Price: $${cheapestPhl.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${cheapestPhl.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${cheapestPhl.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
    }
    
    if (cheapestEwr != null) {
      println(s"\nCheapest ATL->EWR economy flight: ${cheapestEwr.flightNumber}")
      println(s"  Price: $${cheapestEwr.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${cheapestEwr.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${cheapestEwr.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
    }

ERROR #511  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    35 (trial 6)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Search for one-stop flights from JFK to SFO on May 24
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", "SFO", "2024-05-24")
    println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.size} one-stop flight options from JFK to SFO on May 24")
    
    // Filter for economy class availability in both legs
    val validOneStopFlights = oneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      
      firstFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
      firstFlight.prices.contains("economy") &&
      secondFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
      secondFlight.prices.contains("economy")
    }
    
    println(s"\nValid one-stop flights with economy class availability:")
    validOneStopFlights.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flightPair, idx) =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      val totalPrice = firstFlight.prices("economy") + secondFlight.prices("economy")
      println(s"\nOption ${idx + 1}:")
      println(s"  First leg: ${firstFlight.flightNumber} (${firstFlight.origin} to ${firstFlight.destination})")
      println(s"    Departure: ${firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST, Price: $${firstFlight.prices("economy")}")
      println(s"  Second leg: ${secondFlight.flightNumber} (${secondFlight.origin} to ${secondFlight.destination})")
      println(s"    Departure: ${secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST, Price: $${secondFlight.prices("economy")}")
      println(s"  Total price: $$$totalPrice")
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    // Search for one-stop flights from JFK to SFO on May 24
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", "SFO", "2024-05-24")
    println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.size} one-stop flight options from JFK to SFO on May 24")
    
    // Filter for economy class availability in both legs
    val validOneStopFlights = oneStopFlights.filter { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      
      firstFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
      firstFlight.prices.contains("economy") &&
      secondFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 &&
      secondFlight.prices.contains("economy")
    }
    
    println(s"\nValid one-stop flights with economy class availability:")
    validOneStopFlights.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flightPair, idx) =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      val totalPrice = firstFlight.prices("economy") + secondFlight.prices("economy")
      println(s"\nOption " + (idx + 1) + ":")
      println(s"  First leg: " + firstFlight.flightNumber + " (" + firstFlight.origin + " to " + firstFlight.destination + ")")
      println(s"    Departure: " + firstFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst + " EST, Price: $" + firstFlight.prices("economy"))
      println(s"  Second leg: " + secondFlight.flightNumber + " (" + secondFlight.origin + " to " + secondFlight.destination + ")")
      println(s"    Departure: " + secondFlight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst + " EST, Price: $" + secondFlight.prices("economy"))
      println(s"  Total price: $" + totalPrice)
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    26 |  println(s"  Total price: $" + totalPrice)
       |           ^
       |           unclosed string literal

    // Function to calculate total price for a one-stop option in economy class
    def calculateEconomyPrice(flights: List[DirectFlight]): Int = {
      flights.map(_.prices.getOrElse("economy", Int.MaxValue)).sum
    }
    
    // Find cheapest economy option for ATL to PHL
    val atlToPhlCheapest = atlToPhlOneStop.map { flights => 
      (flights, calculateEconomyPrice(flights))
    }.minBy(_._2)
    
    println("Cheapest ATL to PHL economy option:")
    println(s"Total price: $${atlToPhlCheapest._2}")
    println("Flights:")
    atlToPhlCheapest._1.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination} at ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", "N/A")}")
    }
    println()
    
    // Find cheapest economy option for ATL to EWR
    val atlToEwrCheapest = atlToEwrOneStop.map { flights =>
      (flights, calculateEconomyPrice(flights))
    }.minBy(_._2)
    
    println("Cheapest ATL to EWR economy option:")
    println(s"Total price: $${atlToEwrCheapest._2}")
    println("Flights:")
    atlToEwrCheapest._1.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination} at ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", "N/A")}")
    }
    println()
    
    // Compare prices
    val cheapestPhlPrice = atlToPhlCheapest._2
    val cheapestEwrPrice = atlToEwrCheapest._2
    
    println(s"Price comparison:")
    println(s"ATL to PHL (cheapest): $${cheapestPhlPrice}")
    println(s"ATL to EWR (cheapest): $${cheapestEwrPrice}")
    println()
    
    if (cheapestPhlPrice < cheapestEwrPrice) {
      println(s"ATL to PHL is cheaper by $${cheapestEwrPrice - cheapestPhlPrice}")
    } else if (cheapestEwrPrice < cheapestPhlPrice) {
      println(s"ATL to EWR is cheaper by $${cheapestPhlPrice - cheapestEwrPrice}")
    } else {
      println("Both routes have the same price")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
