ERROR #543  [COMPILATION]  [E006] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    18 (trial 7)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.collection.mutable.ArrayBuffer
    
    case class ReservationChangeInfo(
      reservationId: String,
      currentTotal: Int,
      newTotal: Int,
      savings: Int,
      flights: List[ReservationFlight],
      passengers: List[Passenger],
      cabin: String,
      flightType: String,
      origin: String,
      destination: String,
      totalBaggages: Int,
      nonfreeBaggages: Int,
      insurance: String
    )
    
    val changeInfos = ArrayBuffer.empty[ReservationChangeInfo]
    var totalCurrentPrice = 0
    var totalNewPrice = 0
    var totalSavings = 0
    
    for ((reservationId, reservation) <- businessReservations) {
      println(s"\nProcessing reservation: $reservationId")
      println(s"Origin: ${reservation.origin} -> Destination: ${reservation.destination}")
      println(s"Cabin: ${reservation.cabin}, Flight type: ${reservation.flightType}")
      println(s"Current total price: ${reservation.flights.map(_.price).sum}")
      
      var newTotal = 0
      var allFlightsAvailable = true
      
      // Check each flight segment for current economy prices
      for (flight <- reservation.flights) {
        println(s"  Checking flight ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination}")
        
        try {
          val searchResults = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
          val matchingFlight = searchResults.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
          
          matchingFlight match {
            case Some(currentFlight) =>
              val economyPrice = currentFlight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)
              if (economyPrice == 0) {
                println(s"    WARNING: No economy price available for this flight!")
                allFlightsAvailable = false
              } else {
                println(s"    Current business price: ${flight.price}, Current economy price: $economyPrice")
                newTotal += economyPrice
              }
            case None =>
              println(s"    WARNING: Flight ${flight.flightNumber} not found in search results!")
              allFlightsAvailable = false
          }
        } catch {
          case e: Exception =>
            println(s"    ERROR searching for flight: ${e.getMessage}")
            allFlightsAvailable = false
        }
      }
      
      if (allFlocksAvailable) {
        val currentTotal = reservation.flights.map(_.price).sum
        val savings = currentTotal - newTotal
        
        totalCurrentPrice += currentTotal
        totalNewPrice += newTotal
        totalSavings += savings
        
        changeInfos += ReservationChangeInfo(
          reservationId = reservationId,
          currentTotal = currentTotal,
          newTotal = newTotal,
          savings = savings,
          flights = reservation.flights,
          passengers = reservation.passengers,
          cabin = reservation.cabin,
          flightType = reservation.flightType,
          origin = reservation.origin,
          destination = reservation.destination,
          totalBaggages = reservation.totalBaggages,
          nonfreeBaggages = reservation.nonfreeBaggages,
          insurance = reservation.insurance
        )
        
        println(s"  Estimated savings for this reservation: $$ $savings")
      } else {
        println(s"  Cannot calculate savings for reservation $reservationId due to missing flight/pricing data")
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\n=== SUMMARY ===")
    println(s"Total current price (business): $$ $totalCurrentPrice")
    println(s"Total new price (economy): $$ $totalNewPrice")
    println(s"Total estimated savings: $$ $totalSavings")
    
    println(s"\nReservations that can be changed: ${changeInfos.size}")
    changeInfos.foreach { info =>
      println(s"Reservation ${info.reservationId}: Current $$ ${info.currentTotal} -> New $$ ${info.newTotal} (Savings: $$ ${info.savings})")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E006] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    62 |  if (allFlocksAvailable) {
       |      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
       |      Not found: allFlocksAvailable
       |
       | longer explanation available when compiling with `-explain`
    1 error found

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Check current baggage details
    val reservation = getReservationDetails("PEP4E0")
    println(s"Current baggage: ${reservation.totalBaggages} total, ${reservation.nonfreeBaggages} non-free")
    
    // Check user membership for baggage allowance
    val user = getUserDetails("sophia_taylor_9065")
    println(s"User membership: ${user.membership}")
    
    // Calculate baggage allowance
    val cabin = reservation.cabin
    val membership = user.membership
    val numPassengers = reservation.passengers.size
    
    // Calculate free baggage allowance based on policy
    val freeBagsPerPassenger = (cabin, membership) match {
      case ("basic_economy", "regular") => 0
      case ("basic_economy", "silver") => 1
      case ("basic_economy", "gold") => 2
      case ("economy", "regular") => 1
      case ("economy", "silver") => 2
      case ("economy", "gold") => 3
      case ("business", "regular") => 2
      case ("business", "silver") => 3
      case ("business", "gold") => 4
      case _ => 0
    }
    
    val totalFreeBags = freeBagsPerPassenger * numPassengers
    println(s"\nBaggage allowance:")
    println(s"  Cabin: $cabin")
    println(s"  Membership: $membership")
    println(s"  Passengers: $numPassenger")
    println(s"  Free bags per passenger: $freeBagsPerPassenger")
    println(s"  Total free bags: $totalFreeBags")
    println(s"  Current total bags: ${reservation.totalBaggages}")
    println(s"  Current non-free bags: ${reservation.nonfreeBaggages}")
    
    // Check if we can add bags
    if (reservation.totalBaggages < totalFreeBags) {
      println(s"\nYou can add ${totalFreeBags - reservation.totalBaggages} free bags.")
    } else {
      println(s"\nYou would need to pay for any additional bags ($50 each).")
    }

ERROR #558  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    29 (trial 7)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Search for DTW to JFK on 2024-05-17
    val outboundFlights = searchDirectFlight("DTW", "JFK", "2024-05-17")
    println(s"Found ${outboundFlights.size} direct flights from DTW to JFK on 2024-05-17")
    
    // Filter for Economy (not Basic Economy) with arrival before 7am EST
    val earlyOutboundFlights = outboundFlights.filter { flight =>
      flight.status == "available" && 
      flight.prices.contains("economy") &&
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0
    }.map { flight =>
      val arrivalTime = flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst
      val arrivalHour = arrivalTime.take(2).toInt
      (flight, arrivalHour < 7)
    }.filter(_._2).map(_._1)
    
    println(s"\nEarly outbound flights (arrival before 7am EST):")
    earlyOutboundFlights.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: Depart ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST, Arrive ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Economy price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}, Seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      println(s"  Business price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)}, Seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)}")
      println()
    }
    
    // Search for JFK to DTW on 2024-05-20
    val returnFlights = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "DTW", "2024-05-20")
    println(s"\nFound ${returnFlights.size} direct flights from JFK to DTW on 2024-05-20")
    
    // Filter for Economy (not Basic Economy) with arrival before 7am EST
    val earlyReturnFlights = returnFlights.filter { flight =>
      flight.status == "available" && 
      flight.prices.contains("economy") &&
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0
    }.map { flight =>
      val arrivalTime = flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst
      val arrivalHour = arrivalTime.take(2).toInt
      (flight, arrivalHour < 7)
    }.filter(_._2).map(_._1)
    
    println(s"\nEarly return flights (arrival before 7am EST):")

    val earlyReturnFlightsMay19 = returnFlightsMay19.filter { flight =>
      flight.status == "available" && 
      flight.prices.contains("economy") &&
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0

    val currentOutgoingPrice = 130
    val currentReturnPrice = 187
    
    val outgoingUpgradeCost = outgoingBusinessPrice.getOrElse(0) - currentOutgoingPrice
    val returnUpgradeCost = returnBusinessPrice.getOrElse(0) - currentReturnPrice
    
    println(s"\nUpgrade cost for HAT072: $" + outgoingUpgradeCost)
    println(s"Upgrade cost for HAT278: $" + returnUpgradeCost)
    println(s"Total upgrade cost for both flights: $" + (outgoingUpgradeCost + returnUpgradeCost))

ERROR #570  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    41 (trial 7)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import java.time.LocalDateTime
    import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    
    val formatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss")
    
    // Get current time (2024-05-15 15:00:00 EST as per policy)
    val currentTime = LocalDateTime.parse("2024-05-15T15:00:00", formatter)
    
    val reservations = userDetails.reservations.map { id =>
      try {
        val res = getReservationDetails(id)
        // Check if reservation is cancelled
        val isCancelled = res.status.contains("cancelled")
        // Check if any flight has been flown
        val hasFlownFlight = res.flights.exists { flight =>
          val flightDate = LocalDateTime.parse(flight.date + "T00:00:00", formatter)
          // For simplicity, assume if flight date is today or earlier, it might have been flown
          // We need to check actual flight status
          flightDate.isBefore(currentTime) || flightDate.isEqual(currentTime)
        }
        (id, res, isCancelled, hasFlownFlight)
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => (id, null, true, true) // Error means can't process
      }
    }.filter(_._2 != null) // Filter out errors
    
    println("Reservation details:")
    reservations.foreach { case (id, res, isCancelled, hasFlownFlight) =>
      println(s"\nReservation ID: $id")
      println(s"  - Status: ${if (isCancelled) "cancelled" else "active"}")
      println(s"  - Number of passengers: ${res.passengers.length}")
      println(s"  - Flights: ${res.flights.map(f => s"${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}").mkString(", ")}")
      println(s"  - Cabin: ${res.cabin}")
      println(s"  - Created at: ${res.createdAt}")
      println(s"  - Has potentially flown flights: $hasFlownFlight")
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    // Find the cheapest business class one-stop option
    val businessOneStopOptionsMay26 = oneStopFlightsMay26.flatMap { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair.head
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      
      // Check if both flights have business class available
      if (firstFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 && 
          secondFlight.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 &&
          firstFlight.prices.contains("business") &&
          secondFlight.prices.contains("business")) {
        
        val totalPrice = firstFlight.prices("business") + secondFlight.prices("business")
        Some((flightPair, totalPrice))
      } else {
        None
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\nBusiness class one-stop options available: ${businessOneStopOptionsMay26.length}")
    if (businessOneStopOptionsMay26.nonEmpty) {
      val cheapestOneStopMay26 = businessOneStopOptionsMay26.minBy(_._2)
      println(s"\nCheapest business class one-stop option:")
      println(s"Total price: $${cheapestOneStopMay26._2}")
      println(s"First flight: ${cheapestOneStopMay26._1.head.flightNumber} (${cheapestOneStopMay26._1.head.origin} to ${cheapestOneStopMay26._1.head.destination})")
      println(s"  Business price: $${cheapestOneStopMay26._1.head.prices("business")}")
      println(s"Second flight: ${cheapestOneStopMay26._1(1).flightNumber} (${cheapestOneStopMay26._1(1).origin} to ${cheapestOneStopMay26._1(1).destination})")
      println(s"  Business price: $${cheapestOneStopMay26._1(1).prices("business")}")
    }

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Create optimized split booking strategy
    println("OPTIMIZED SPLIT BOOKING STRATEGY:")
    println("=" * 50)
    
    // We have $516 in gift cards after refund
    // We need to allocate across bookings to minimize Mastercard charges
    
    // Strategy: Use gift cards where they reduce Mastercard charges most
    // Booking 1: $871 - $500 cert = $371 remaining → use $371 gift cards
    // Booking 2: $871 - $250 cert = $621 remaining → use remaining $145 gift cards ($516 - $371 = $145)
    // Booking 3: $871 - $250 cert = $621 remaining → no gift cards left, all on Mastercard
    
    val cert500 = 500.0
    val cert250a = 250.0
    val cert250b = 250.0
    val totalGiftCards = 516.0
    
    println(s"\nAvailable resources:")
    println(s"- Certificate 1: $$$cert500")
    println(s"- Certificate 2: $$$cert250a")
    println(s"- Certificate 3: $$$cert250b")
    println(s"- Gift cards after refund: $$$totalGiftCards")
    
    println("\nOptimized allocation:")
    println("\nBooking 1 (Mohamed): $871")
    val booking1GiftCards = math.min(371.0, totalGiftCards)  // Need $371 after $500 cert
    val booking1Mastercard = math.max(0, 871 - cert500 - booking1GiftCards)
    println(s"  - certificate_3765853: $$$cert500")
    println(s"  - gift cards: $$$booking1GiftCards")
    println(s"  - Mastercard: $$$booking1Mastercard")
    
    println("\nBooking 2 (Aarav): $871")
    val remainingGiftCards = totalGiftCards - booking1GiftCards  // $145 left
    val booking2GiftCards = math.min(621.0, remainingGiftCards)  // Need $621 after $250 cert
    val booking2Mastercard = math.max(0, 871 - cert250a - booking2GiftCards)
    println(s"  - certificate_9984806: $$$cert250a")
    println(s"  - gift cards: $$$booking2GiftCards")
    println(s"  - Mastercard: $$$booking2Mastercard")
    
    println("\nBooking 3 (Evelyn): $871")
    val booking3GiftCards = 0.0  // No gift cards left
    val booking3Mastercard = 871 - cert250b  // $621
    println(s"  - certificate_2765295: $$$cert250b")
    println(s"  - gift cards: $$$booking3GiftCards")
    println(s"  - Mastercard: $$$booking3Mastercard")
    
    val totalMastercardOpt = booking1Mastercard + booking2Mastercard + booking3Mastercard
    println(s"\nTotal Mastercard charge (optimized): $$$totalMastercardOpt")
    
    // Compare with single booking
    println("\n" + "=" * 50)
    println("COMPARISON:")
    println(s"Single booking Mastercard charge: $$$1786")
    println(s"3 separate bookings Mastercard charge: $$$totalMastercardOpt")
    println(s"Savings with split bookings: $$${1786 - totalMastercardOpt}")

ERROR #589  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    44 (trial 7)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import java.time.LocalTime
    import java.time.Duration
    import java.time.LocalDateTime
    
    // Helper function to parse time strings
    def parseTime(timeStr: String): LocalTime = {
      LocalTime.parse(timeStr)
    }
    
    // Function to calculate duration between two EST times (both on same date)
    def calculateDuration(departureTime: String, arrivalTime: String): Duration = {
      val dep = parseTime(departureTime)
      val arr = parseTime(arrivalTime)
      
      if (arr.isBefore(dep)) {
        // Arrival is next day
        Duration.between(dep, arr.plusHours(24))
      } else {
        Duration.between(dep, arr)
      }
    }
    
    // Get details for each reservation
    val reservationDetails = user.reservations.map { reservationId =>
      try {
        val reservation = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
        (reservationId, Some(reservation))
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => 
          println(s"Error getting reservation $reservationId: ${e.getMessage}")
          (reservationId, None)
      }
    }.collect { case (id, Some(res)) => (id, res) }
    
    println(s"Successfully retrieved ${reservationDetails.size} reservations")
    
    // Check each flight in each reservation
    val flightAnalysis = reservationDetails.flatMap { case (resId, reservation) =>
      reservation.flights.map { flight =>
        // Get flight status to check if it's available and get scheduled times
        val status = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
        val searchResults = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
        
        val flightInfo = searchResults.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
        
        (resId, flight, status, flightInfo)
      }
    }
    
    // Print analysis
    flightAnalysis.foreach { case (resId, flight, status, flightInfo) =>
      println(s"\nReservation: $resId")
      println(s"  Flight: ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}")
      println(s"  Route: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination}")
      println(s"  Status: $status")
      println(s"  Cabin: ${flightInfo.flatMap(_.availableSeats.get("business")).getOrElse(0)} business seats available")
      println(s"  Price: $${flightInfo.flatMap(_.prices.get("business")).getOrElse(0)} for business")
      
      flightInfo match {

ERROR #590  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    44 (trial 7)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import java.time.LocalTime
    import java.time.Duration
    
    // Helper function to parse time strings, handling the +1 notation
    def parseTime(timeStr: String): LocalTime = {
      // Remove any timezone offset like "+1"
      val cleanTime = if (timeStr.contains("+")) timeStr.substring(0, 8) else timeStr
      LocalTime.parse(cleanTime)
    }
    
    // Function to calculate duration between two EST times
    def calculateDuration(departureTime: String, arrivalTime: String): Duration = {
      val dep = parseTime(departureTime)
      val arr = parseTime(arrivalTime)
      
      if (arr.isBefore(dep)) {
        // Arrival is next day
        Duration.between(dep, arr.plusHours(24))
      } else {
        Duration.between(dep, arr)
      }
    }
    
    // Get details for each reservation again
    val reservationDetails = user.reservations.map { reservationId =>
      try {
        val reservation = getReservationDetails(reservationId)
        (reservationId, Some(reservation))
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => 
          println(s"Error getting reservation $reservationId: ${e.getMessage}")
          (reservationId, None)
      }
    }.collect { case (id, Some(res)) => (id, res) }
    
    println(s"Successfully retrieved ${reservationDetails.size} reservations")
    
    // Check each flight in each reservation
    val flightAnalysis = reservationDetails.flatMap { case (resId, reservation) =>
      reservation.flights.map { flight =>
        // Get flight status to check if it's available and get scheduled times
        val status = getFlightStatus(flight.flightNumber, flight.date)
        val searchResults = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
        
        val flightInfo = searchResults.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
        
        (resId, flight, status, flightInfo)
      }
    }
    
    // Print analysis and categorize flights
    println("\n=== FLIGHT DURATION ANALYSIS ===\n")
    
    var totalUpgradeCost = 0
    val longFlights = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, ReservationFlight, String, Duration)]()
    val shortFlights = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, ReservationFlight, String, Duration, Int)]()
    val mediumFlights = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, ReservationFlight, String, Duration)]()
    val flightDetails = scala.collection.mutable.Map[String, List[(ReservationFlight, String, Duration, Int, Int, Int)]]()
    
    flightAnalysis.foreach { case (resId, flight, status, flightInfo) =>
      println(s"Reservation: $resId")
      println(s"  Flight: ${flight.flightNumber} on ${flight.date}")
      println(s"  Route: ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination}")
      println(s"  Status: $status")
      println(s"  Current price paid: $${flight.price}")
      
      flightInfo match {
        case Some(info) =>
          val duration = calculateDuration(info.scheduledDepartureTimeEst, info.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
          val hours = duration.toHours
          val minutes = duration.toMinutes % 60
          println(s"  Duration: ${hours}h ${minutes}m")
          println(s"  Departure: ${info.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
          println(s"  Arrival: ${info.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
          
          // Check business class availability and price
          val businessSeats = info.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)
          val businessPrice = info.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
          val currentPrice = flight.price
          
          println(s"  Business cabin price: $${businessPrice}")
          println(s"  Business seats available: $businessSeats")
          
          // Categorize flights
          if (duration.toHours > 4) {
            println("  CATEGORY: LONG FLIGHT (> 4 hours) - Eligible for cancellation")
            longFlights += ((resId, flight, status, duration))
          } else if (duration.toHours <= 3) {
            println("  CATEGORY: SHORT FLIGHT (≤ 3 hours) - Eligible for upgrade")
            val upgradeCost = businessPrice - currentPrice
            if (upgradeCost > 0) {
              totalUpgradeCost += upgradeCost
              println(s"  Upgrade cost for this flight: $${upgradeCost}")
            } else if (upgradeCost < 0) {
              println(s"  Upgrade would refund: $${-upgradeCost} (business is cheaper)")
            } else {
              println(s"  Upgrade cost: $0 (same price)")
            }
            shortFlights += ((resId, flight, status, duration, businessPrice))
            
            // Store details for cost calculation
            val currentList = flightDetails.getOrElse(resId, List())
            flightDetails(resId) = currentList :+ (flight, status, duration, currentPrice, businessPrice, businessSeats)
          } else {
            println("  CATEGORY: MEDIUM FLIGHT (3-4 hours) - Not eligible for cancellation or upgrade")
            mediumFlights += ((resId, flight, status, duration))
          }
          
        case None =>
          println(s"  Duration: Could not find flight information")
      }
      println()
    }
    
    println("\n=== SUMMARY ===")
    println(s"\nLONG FLIGHTS (> 4 hours): ${longFlights.size} flights")
    if (longFlights.isEmpty) {
      println("  No long flights found")
    } else {
      longFlights.foreach { case (resId, flight, status, duration) =>
        println(s"  - Reservation $resId: ${flight.flightNumber} (${duration.toHours}h ${duration.toMinutes % 60}m)")
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\nSHORT FLIGHTS (≤ 3 hours): ${shortFlights.size} flights")
    if (shortFlights.isEmpty) {
      println("  No short flights found")
    } else {
      shortFlights.foreach { case (resId, flight, status, duration, businessPrice) =>
        println(s"  - Reservation $resId: ${flight.flightNumber} (${duration.toHours}h ${duration.toMinutes % 60}m)")
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\nMEDIUM FLIGHTS (3-4 hours): ${mediumFlights.size} flights")
    if (mediumFlights.isEmpty) {
      println("  No medium flights found")
    } else {
      mediumFlights.foreach { case (resId, flight, status, duration) =>
        println(s"  - Reservation $resId: ${flight.flightNumber} (${duration.toHours}h ${duration.toMinutes % 60}m)")
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\nTOTAL UPGRADE COST for all short flights: $${totalUpgradeCost}")
    
    // Calculate per-reservation upgrade costs
    println("\n=== PER-RESERVATION UPGRADE COST BREAKDOWN ===")
    flightDetails.foreach { case (resId, flights) =>
      val reservation = reservationDetails.find(_._1 == resId).map(_._2).get
      val totalCurrentCost = flights.map(_._4).sum
      val totalBusinessCost = flights.map(_._5).sum
      val upgradeCost = totalBusinessCost - totalCurrentCost
      val allBusinessAvailable = flights.forall(_._6 > 0)
      
      println(s"\nReservation $resId:")
      println(s"  Current cabin: ${reservation.cabin}")
      println(s"  Number of flights: ${flights.size}")
      println(s"  Total current cost: $${totalCurrentCost}")
      println(s"  Total business cost: $${totalBusinessCost}")
      println(s"  Upgrade cost: $${upgradeCost}")
      println(s"  Business seats available for all flights: $allBusinessAvailable")
      println(s"  Status: ${reservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
    }
    
    // Check reservation statuses
    println("\n=== RESERVATION STATUSES ===")
    reservationDetails.foreach { case (resId, reservation) =>
      println(s"\nReservation $resId:")
      println(s"  Origin: ${reservation.origin}")
      println(s"  Destination: ${reservation.destination}")
      println(s"  Flight type: ${reservation.flightType}")
      println(s"  Cabin: ${reservation.cabin}")
      println(s"  Status: ${reservation.status.getOrElse("active")}")
      println(s"  Created: ${reservation.createdAt}")
      println(s"  Passengers: ${reservation.passengers.size}")

ERROR #605  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    14 (trial 8)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Check one-stop options for each segment to see if any are cheaper
    
    // 1. JFK to SFO on May 26 (one-stop)
    println("=== Checking one-stop options JFK→SFO on May 26 ===")
    val oneStopJFKtoSFO = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", "SFO", "2024-05-26")
    var cheapestOneStopJFKtoSFO = Int.MaxValue
    var cheapestOneStopOption1 = ""
    
    oneStopJFKtoSFO.foreach { flightPair =>
      val first = flightPair(0)
      val second = flightPair(1)
      val firstBusinessSeats = first.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)
      val secondBusinessSeats = second.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)
      
      if (firstBusinessSeats > 0 && secondBusinessSeats > 0) {
        val totalPrice = first.prices.getOrElse("business", 0) + second.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
        if (totalPrice < cheapestOneStopJFKtoSFO) {
          cheapestOneStopJFKtoSFO = totalPrice
          cheapestOneStopOption1 = s"${first.flightNumber}+${second.flightNumber}"
        }
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Cheapest one-stop business: ${if (cheapestOneStopOption1.nonEmpty) s"$$$cheapestOneStopJFKtoSFO ($cheapestOneStopOption1)" else "None"}")
    println(s"Direct business: $364")
    
    // 2. SFO to SEA on May 28 (one-stop) - though this is a short flight, unlikely to have cheaper one-stop
    println("\n=== Checking one-stop options SFO→SEA on May 28 ===")
    val oneStopSFOtoSEA = searchOnestopFlight("SFO", "SEA", "2024-05-28")
    var cheapestOneStopSFOtoSEA = Int.MaxValue
    var cheapestOneStopOption2 = ""
    
    oneStopSFOtoSEA.foreach { flightPair =>
      val first = flightPair(0)
      val second = flightPair(1)
      val firstBusinessSeats = first.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)
      val secondBusinessSeats = second.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)
      
      if (firstBusinessSeats > 0 && secondBusinessSeats > 0) {
        val totalPrice = first.prices.getOrElse("business", 0) + second.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
        if (totalPrice < cheapestOneStopSFOtoSEA) {
          cheapestOneStopSFOtoSEA = totalPrice
          cheapestOneStopOption2 = s"${first.flightNumber}+${second.flightNumber}"
        }
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Cheapest one-stop business: ${if (cheapestOneStopOption2.nonEmpty) s"$$$cheapestOneStopSFOtoSEA ($cheapestOneStopOption2)" else "None"}")
    println(s"Direct business: $248")
    
    // 3. SEA to JFK on May 28 (one-stop)
    println("\n=== Checking one-stop options SEA→JFK on May 28 ===")
    val oneStopSEAtoJFK = searchOnestopFlight("SEA", "JFK", "2024-05-28")
    var cheapestOneStopSEAtoJFK = Int.MaxValue
    var cheapestOneStopOption3 = ""
    
    oneStopSEAtoJFK.foreach { flightPair =>
      val first = flightPair(0)
      val second = flightPair(1)
      val firstBusinessSeats = first.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)
      val secondBusinessSeats = second.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)
      
      if (firstBusinessSeats > 0 && secondBusinessSeats > 0) {
        val totalPrice = first.prices.getOrElse("business", 0) + second.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
        if (totalPrice < cheapestOneStopSEAtoJFK) {
          cheapestOneStopSEAtoJFK = totalPrice
          cheapestOneStopOption3 = s"${first.flightNumber}+${second.flightNumber}"
        }
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Cheapest one-stop business: ${if (cheapestOneStopOption3.nonEmpty) s"$$$cheapestOneStopSEAtoJFK ($cheapestOneStopOption3)" else "None"}")
    println(s"Direct business: $259")
    
    // Calculate best possible total
    val bestJFKtoSFO = Math.min(364, cheapestOneStopJFKtoSFO)
    val bestSFOtoSEA = Math.min(248, cheapestOneStopSFOtoSEA)
    val bestSEAtoJFK = Math.min(259, cheapestOneStopSEAtoJFK)
    
    println(s"\n=== Best Possible Business Prices ===")
    println(s"JFK→SFO: $$$bestJFKtoSFO")
    println(s"SFO→SEA: $$$bestSFOtoSEA")
    println(s"SEA→JFK: $$$bestSEAtoJFK")
    println(s"Per passenger total: $$${bestJFKtoSFO + bestSFOtoSEA + bestSEAtoJFK}")
    println(s"For 3 passengers: $$${(bestJFKtoSFO + bestSFOtoSEA + bestSEAtoJFK) * 3}")

    // Check for cheaper business class options on different dates
    // Let's check May 25 for outbound and May 28 for return
    
    println("Checking May 25 outbound (IAH to SEA) business class options:")
    val may25Outbound = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-25")
    var may25Cheapest = Int.MaxValue
    var may25BestOption: List[DirectFlight] = List()
    
    may25Outbound.foreach { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      
      val firstBusinessSeats = firstFlight.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      val firstBusinessPrice = firstFlight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      val secondBusinessSeats = secondFlight.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      val secondBusinessPrice = secondFlight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      
      if (firstBusinessSeats >= 3 && secondBusinessSeats >= 3) {
        val totalPrice = firstBusinessPrice + secondBusinessPrice
        if (totalPrice < may25Cheapest) {
          may25Cheapest = totalPrice
          may25BestOption = flightPair
        }
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Cheapest May 25 outbound business class option: $$$may25Cheapest per passenger")
    if (may25BestOption.nonEmpty) {
      println(s"  First leg: ${may25BestOption(0).flightNumber} ($${may25BestOption(0).prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)})")
      println(s"  Second leg: ${may25BestOption(1).flightNumber} ($${may25BestOption(1).prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)})")
    }
    
    println("\nChecking May 28 return (SEA to IAH) business class options:")
    val may28Return = searchOnestopFlight("SEA", "IAH", "2024-05-28")
    var may28Cheapest = Int.MaxValue
    var may28BestOption: List[DirectFlight] = List()
    
    may28Return.foreach { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      
      val firstBusinessSeats = firstFlight.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      val firstBusinessPrice = firstFlight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      val secondBusinessSeats = secondFlight.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      val secondBusinessPrice = secondFlight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      
      if (firstBusinessSeats >= 3 && secondBusinessSeats >= 3) {
        val totalPrice = firstBusinessPrice + secondBusinessPrice
        if (totalPrice < may28Cheapest) {
          may28Cheapest = totalPrice
          may28BestOption = flightPair
        }
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Cheapest May 28 return business class option: $$$may28Cheapest per passenger")
    if (may28BestOption.nonEmpty) {
      println(s"  First leg: ${may28BestOption(0).flightNumber} ($${may28BestOption(0).prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)})")
      println(s"  Second leg: ${may28BestOption(1).flightNumber} ($${may28BestOption(1).prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)})")
    }
    
    val totalNewPrice = (may25Cheapest + may28Cheapest) * 3
    val currentTotal = 1581 // From earlier calculation
    val difference = totalNewPrice - currentTotal
    println(s"\nTotal for 3 passengers with May 25 outbound and May 28 return: $$$totalNewPrice")
    println(s"Current total: $$$currentTotal")

    println("\n2. HAT047: LAS → SEA")
    val hat047Details = searchDirectFlight("LAS", "SEA", "2024-05-23").find(_.flightNumber == "HAT047")
    hat047Details.foreach { flight =>
      val businessPrice = flight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      println(s"   Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"   Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"   Business price: $$$businessPrice")
      println(s"   Business seats available: ${flight.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)}")
    }
    
    println("\nReturn (May 26-27):")
    println("1. HAT021: SEA → JFK (May 26)")
    val hat021Details = searchDirectFlight("SEA", "JFK", "2024-05-26").find(_.flightNumber == "HAT021")
    hat021Details.foreach { flight =>
      val businessPrice = flight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)
      println(s"   Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"   Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"   Business price: $$$businessPrice")
      println(s"   Business seats available: ${flight.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)}")
    }
    
    println("\n2. HAT279: JFK → IAH (May 27)")
    val hat279Details = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "IAH", "2024-05-27").find(_.flightNumber == "HAT279")
    hat279Details.foreach { flight =>
      val businessPrice = flight.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)

      println(s"   Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"   Business price: $$$businessPrice")
      println(s"   Business seats available: ${flight.availableSeats.get("business").getOrElse(0)}")
    }
    
    // Calculate total for Option 1
    val option1OutboundPrice = hat190Details.map(_.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)).getOrElse(0) + 
                              hat047Details.map(_.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)).getOrElse(0)
    val option1ReturnPrice = hat021Details.map(_.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)).getOrElse(0) +
                            hat279Details.map(_.prices.get("business").getOrElse(0)).getOrElse(0)
    val option1TotalPerPassenger = option1OutboundPrice + option1ReturnPrice
    val option1TotalFor3 = option1TotalPerPassenger * 3
    val currentTotal = 1581
    val option1Additional = option1TotalFor3 - currentTotal
    
    println(s"\nOPTION 1 TOTAL:")

    println(s"Total for 3 passengers: $$$option1TotalFor3")

    println(s"Additional cost: $$$option1Additional")

    // Search for one-stop flights from DEN to IAH on May 27
    val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("DEN", "IAH", "2024-05-27")
    println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.size} one-stop flight options from DEN to IAH on 2024-05-27:")
    
    // Let's find the fastest options
    val fastestOptions = oneStopFlights.map { flightPair =>
      val firstFlight = flightPair(0)
      val secondFlight = flightPair(1)
      val totalTime = calculateTravelTime(firstFlight, secondFlight)
      (flightPair, totalTime)
    }.sortBy(_._2).take(5) // Get top 5 fastest options
    
    def calculateTravelTime(first: DirectFlight, second: DirectFlight): String = {
      // Calculate total travel time (simplified - just show departure/arrival times)
      s"${first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} → ${second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}"
    }
    
    fastestOptions.zipWithIndex.foreach { case ((flightPair, timeRange), index) =>
      val first = flightPair(0)
      val second = flightPair(1)
      println(s"\nOption ${index + 1}: ${timeRange}")
      println(s"  First leg: ${first.flightNumber} DEN → ${first.destination}")
      println(s"    Departure: ${first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"    Arrival: ${first.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${first.prices.getOrElse("economy", "N/A")}")
      println(s"  Second leg: ${second.flightNumber} ${second.origin} → IAH")
      println(s"    Departure: ${second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
      println(s"    Arrival: ${second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
      println(s"    Economy price: $${second.prices.getOrElse("economy", "N/A")}")
      println(s"  Total economy price: $${first.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0) + second.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")

    println("\n=== FINAL RESERVATION SUMMARY ===")
    println(s"Reservation ID: ${baggageUpdatedReservation.reservationId}")
    println(s"User: ${baggageUpdatedReservation.passengers.head.firstName} ${baggageUpdatedReservation.passengers.head.lastName}")
    println(s"Cabin: ${baggageUpdatedReservation.cabin}")
    println(s"Total price: $${baggageUpdatedReservation.flights.map(_.price).sum}")
    println(s"\nOutbound flights (May 27):")
    baggageUpdatedReservation.flights.take(2).foreach { flight =>
      println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin} → ${flight.destination} (${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst})")
    }
    println(s"\nReturn flights (May 27):")
    baggageUpdatedReservation.flights.drop(2).foreach { flight =>
      println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.origin} → ${flight.destination} (${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst})")
    }
    println(s"\nArrival time in Houston: 16:00")
    println(s"\nBaggage: ${baggageUpdatedReservation.totalBaggages} checked bags (all free)")
    println(s"Refund: $11 credited to gift_card_7480005")
  --- Error Output ---

    val allReservationIds = List("JG7FMM", "2FBBAH", "X7BYG1", "EQ1G6C", "BOH180")
    val finalReservations = allReservationIds.map(id => getReservationDetails(id))
    
    println("FINAL SUMMARY OF ALL DOWNGRADED RESERVATIONS")
    println("=" * 60)
    
    // Calculate totals
    var totalOriginalPaid = 0
    var totalRefunds = 0
    var totalBaggageFees = 0
    
    println("\nRESERVATION BREAKDOWN:")
    println("-" * 60)
    println(f"${"Reservation ID"} | ${"Passengers"} | ${"Original Payment"} | ${"Refund Amount"} | ${"Net Refund"} | ${"Payment Method"}")
    println("-" * 60)
    
    finalReservations.foreach { res =>
      val originalPayment = res.paymentHistory.filter(_.amount > 0).map(_.amount).sum
      val refunds = res.paymentHistory.filter(_.amount < 0).map(_.amount).sum.abs
      val paymentMethodId = res.paymentHistory.head.paymentId
      
      // Get payment method details from user profile
      val paymentMethod = user.paymentMethods.get(paymentMethodId) match {
        case Some(CreditCard(_, brand, lastFour)) => s"$brand ending in $lastFour"
        case Some(GiftCard(_, amount)) => s"Gift Card ($$$amount remaining)"
        case Some(Certificate(_, amount)) => s"Certificate ($$$amount remaining)"
        case None => paymentMethodId
      }
      
      // Check for baggage fees
      val baggageFee = if (res.nonfreeBaggages > 0) res.nonfreeBaggages * 50 else 0
      val netRefund = refunds - baggageFee
      
      totalOriginalPaid += originalPayment
      totalRefunds += refunds
      totalBaggageFees += baggageFee
      
      println(f"${res.reservationId}%13s | ${res.passengers.length}%10d | $$$originalPayment%15.2f | $$$refunds%13.2f | $$$netRefund%11.2f | $paymentMethod")
    }
    
    println("-" * 60)
    
    // Calculate final totals

    println(f"Total Refunds Issued: $$$totalRefunds%.2f")

      val baggageFee = if (res.nonfreeBaggages > 0) res.nonfreeBaggages * 50 else 0
      val netRefund = refunds - baggageFee

        case Some(GiftCard(_, _)) => s"Gift Card ($paymentId)"

ERROR #660  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Group by reservation and calculate totals
    val priceData = flightPriceChecks.groupBy(_._1).map { case (resId, flights) =>
      // Get reservation details
      val res = businessResDetails.find(_.reservationId == resId).get
      
      // Calculate original total (business prices from reservation)
      val originalTotal = res.flights.map(_.price).sum
      
      // Calculate new total (economy prices from current search)
      val newTotal = flights.flatMap(_._6).sum // _._6 is economy price
      
      // Calculate price difference (positive = refund, negative = additional payment)
      val difference = newTotal - originalTotal
      
      // Get number of passengers
      val passengerCount = res.passengers.size
      
      (resId, originalTotal, newTotal, difference, passengerCount, res)
    }.toList
    
    println("Price analysis for each reservation:")
    priceData.foreach { case (resId, original, newTotal, diff, passengers, res) =>
      println(s"\nReservation: $resId")
      println(s"  Original business total: $$${original}")
      println(s"  New economy total: $$${newTotal}")
      println(s"  Difference: $${if (diff > 0) s"+$diff (you would PAY)" else s"$diff (you would GET REFUND)"}")
      println(s"  Passengers: $passengers")
      println(s"  Flight segments: ${res.flights.size}")
      println(s"  Trip type: ${res.flightType}")
    }
    
    // Calculate overall totals
    val totalOriginal = priceData.map(_._2).sum
    val totalNew = priceData.map(_._3).sum
    val totalDiff = totalNew - totalOriginal
    
    println(s"\n=== OVERALL SUMMARY ===")
    println(s"Total original business cost: $$$totalOriginal")
    println(s"Total new economy cost: $$$totalNew")
    println(s"Overall difference: $${if (totalDiff > 0) s"+$totalDiff (you would PAY)" else s"$totalDiff (you would GET REFUND)"}")
    
    priceData

    // Search for direct flights from JFK to West Coast airports on May 20
    val departureDate = "2024-05-20"
    val westCoastDestinations = List("SFO", "LAX", "SEA", "LAS")
    
    // Store flight options
    var flightOptions = List.empty[(String, DirectFlight, DirectFlight)] // (destination, outbound, return)
    
    for (dest <- westCoastDestinations) {
      println(s"\nSearching JFK to $dest on $departureDate:")

      }
      
      if (outboundBasicEconomy.nonEmpty) {
        // Search for return flights on May 25
        val returnDate = "2024-05-25"
        println(s"Searching $dest to JFK on $returnDate:")
        val returnFlights = searchDirectFlight(dest, "JFK", returnDate)
        
        val returnBasicEconomy = returnFlights.filter { flight =>
          flight.status == "available" && flight.availableSeats.get("basic_economy").exists(_ > 0)
        }
        
        if (returnBasicEconomy.nonEmpty) {
          // Find cheapest combination
          val cheapestOutbound = outboundBasicEconomy.minBy(_.prices("basic_economy"))
          val cheapestReturn = returnBasicEconomy.minBy(_.prices("basic_economy"))
          
          val totalPrice = cheapestOutbound.prices("basic_economy") + cheapestReturn.prices("basic_economy")
          println(s"Found round-trip to $dest: $${totalPrice}")
          println(s"  Outbound: ${cheapestOutbound.flightNumber} at $${cheapestOutbound.prices("basic_economy")}")
          println(s"  Return: ${cheapestReturn.flightNumber} at $${cheapestReturn.prices("basic_economy")}")
          
          flightOptions = flightOptions :+ (dest, cheapestOutbound, cheapestReturn)
        } else {
          println(s"No available basic economy return flights from $dest to JFK on $returnDate")
        }
      } else {
        println(s"No available basic economy outbound flights from JFK to $dest on $departureDate")
      }
    }
    
    // Sort by total price
    val sortedOptions = flightOptions.sortBy { case (dest, outbound, ret) => 
      outbound.prices("basic_economy") + ret.prices("basic_economy")
    }
    
    println("\n=== CHEAPEST OPTIONS ===")
    sortedOptions.foreach { case (dest, outbound, ret) =>
      val total = outbound.prices("basic_economy") + ret.prices("basic_economy")
      println(s"$dest: $${total} total")
      println(s"  Outbound: ${outbound.flightNumber} on ${outbound.date.getOrElse("N/A")} at ${outbound.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - $${outbound.prices("basic_economy")}")
      println(s"  Return: ${ret.flightNumber} on ${ret.date.getOrElse("N/A")} at ${ret.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - $${ret.prices("basic_economy")}")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------
    34 |      println(s"  Outbound: ${cheapestOutbound.flightNumber} at $${cheapestOutbound.prices("basic_economy")}")
       |                                                                                            ^^^^^^^^^^^^^
       |                      ',' or ')' expected, but string interpolator found
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------

    val outboundFlights = List(

      FlightInfo("HAT118", "2024-05-27")  // ORD -> DEN
    )

ERROR #674  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    35 (trial 9)
  --- Scala Code ---
    val flights = searchDirectFlight("JFK", "SFO", "2024-05-24")
    println(s"Found ${flights.length} direct flights")
    
    // Filter for economy class availability and sort by price
    val economyFlights = flights.filter(flight => 
      flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0) > 0 && 
      flight.prices.contains("economy")
    ).sortBy(flight => flight.prices("economy"))
    
    if (economyFlights.isEmpty) {
      println("No direct economy flights found. Checking for one-stop flights...")
      val oneStopFlights = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", "SFO", "2024-05-24")
      println(s"Found ${oneStopFlights.length} one-stop flight options")
    } else {
      println(s"Found ${economyFlights.length} direct economy flights")
      
      // Show all economy flights with prices
      economyFlights.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flight, index) =>
        val price = flight.prices("economy")
        val seats = flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)
        println(s"${index + 1}. Flight ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}, Price: $$$price, Available seats: $seats")
      }
      
      // Get the second cheapest option
      if (economyFlights.length >= 2) {
        val secondCheapest = economyFlights(1)
        println(s"\nSecond cheapest option:")
        println(s"Flight ${secondCheapest.flightNumber}")
        println(s"Departure: ${secondCheapest.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"Arrival: ${secondCheapest.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"Price: $${secondCheapest.prices("economy")}")
        println(s"Available seats: ${secondCheapest.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      } else if (economyFlights.length == 1) {
        println("\nOnly one economy flight available:")
        val flight = economyFlights.head
        println(s"Flight ${flight.flightNumber}")
        println(s"Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}")
        println(s"Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}")
        println(s"Price: $${flight.prices("economy")}")
        println(s"Available seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)}")
      }
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------

    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------

       |                      ',' or ')' expected, but string interpolator found

ERROR #683  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_airline.json
  Task:    10 (trial 9)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Calculate cost to upgrade only outbound on May 23 to business
    // Cheapest options:
    val cheapestIahToLas = 220 // HAT286
    val cheapestLasToSea = 333 // HAT047
    
    val outboundBusinessPerPassenger = cheapestIahToLas + cheapestLasToSea
    val outboundBusinessTotal3Passengers = outboundBusinessPerPassenger * 3
    
    // Current outbound economy prices from reservation
    val currentIahToLasPrice = 126 // HAT190
    val currentLasToSeaPrice = 139 // HAT047
    val currentOutboundPerPassenger = currentIahToLasPrice + currentLasToSeaPrice
    val currentOutboundTotal3Passengers = currentOutboundPerPassenger * 3

    // Calculate cost for: Move outbound to May 24 + upgrade outbound to business, keep return in economy
    // Current outbound economy (May 23): $126 + $139 = $265 per passenger
    // Cheapest May 24 outbound with business class
    val may24Options = searchOnestopFlight("IAH", "SEA", "2024-05-24")
    
    var cheapestMay24Business = Int.MaxValue
    var cheapestMay24Details = ""
    
    may24Options.foreach { flightPair =>
      var totalPrice = 0
      var details = ""
      flightPair.foreach { flight =>
        val businessPrice = flight.prices.getOrElse("business", Int.MaxValue)
        if (businessPrice < Int.MaxValue) {
          totalPrice += businessPrice
          details += s"${flight.flightNumber} ($$$businessPrice) "
        }
      }
      if (totalPrice < cheapestMay24Business) {
        cheapestMay24Business = totalPrice
        cheapestMay24Details = details
      }
    }
    
    println("Scenario 1: Move outbound to May 24 + upgrade outbound to business (keep return economy)")
    println(s"Current outbound economy (May 23): $265 per passenger")
    println(s"New outbound business (May 24): $$$cheapestMay24Business per passenger")
    println(s"Outbound fare difference: $$${cheapestMay24Business - 265} per passenger")
    println(s"Details: $cheapestMay24Details")
    
    // Total for 3 passengers
    val totalCostScenario1 = (cheapestMay24Business - 265) * 3
    println(s"Total additional cost for 3 passengers: $$$totalCostScenario1")
    println(s"Within $1,000 budget? ${totalCostScenario1 <= 1000}")

    // Search for nonstop flights from IAH to SFO on May 19
    val outgoingFlights = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SFO", "2024-05-19")
    println(s"Found ${outgoingFlights.size} nonstop flights from IAH to SFO on May 19, 2024")
    
    // Filter for flights departing between 8am and 9pm (08:00-21:00)
    val filteredOutgoingFlights = outgoingFlights.filter { flight =>
      val departureTime = flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      // Parse time (format is HH:MM:SS)
      val timeParts = departureTime.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val hour = timeParts(0)
      hour >= 8 && hour < 21
    }
    
    println(s"\nFiltered to ${filteredOutgoingFlights.size} flights departing between 8am and 9pm:")
    
    filteredOutgoingFlights.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"\nFlight: ${flight.flightNumber}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${flight.availableSeats.getOrElse("economy", 0)} in economy")
      println(s"  Price: $${flight.prices.getOrElse("economy", 0)} for economy")
    }

    // Search for nonstop flights from IAH to SFO on May 19
    val outgoingFlights = searchDirectFlight("IAH", "SFO", "2024-05-19")
    println(s"Found ${outgoingFlights.size} nonstop flights from IAH to SFO on May 19, 2024")
    
    // Filter for flights departing between 8am and 9pm (08:00-21:00)
    val filteredOutgoingFlights = outgoingFlights.filter { flight =>
      val departureTime = flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst
      // Parse time (format is HH:MM:SS)
      val timeParts = departureTime.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val hour = timeParts(0)
      hour >= 8 && hour < 21
    }
    
    println(s"\nFiltered to ${filteredOutgoingFlights.size} flights departing between 8am and 9pm:")
    
    filteredOutgoingFlights.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"\nFlight: ${flight.flightNumber}")
      println(s"  Departure: ${flight.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Arrival: ${flight.scheduledArrivalTimeEst} EST")
      println(s"  Available seats: ${flight.availableSeats.get("economy")} in economy")
      println(s"  Price: $${flight.prices.get("economy")} for economy")

    val businessPrices = reservation.flights.map { flight =>
      val flightDetails = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
      flightDetails.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber) match {
        case Some(details) => 
          val businessPrice = details.prices.get("business")
          (flight.flightNumber, flight.date, businessPrice)
        case None => 
          (flight.flightNumber, flight.date, None)
      }

        case Some(price) =>

          totalBusinessPrice += price
        case None => 
          println(s"  $flightNum on $date: Business class price not available")
      }
    }

    println(s"\nCurrent economy total: $$$currentEconomyTotal")

    println("\nBaggage Information:")
    println("As a gold member, you get free checked baggage allowance:")
    println("  - Basic economy: 2 free checked bags per passenger")
    println("  - Economy: 3 free checked bags per passenger")
    println("  - Business: 4 free checked bags per passenger")
    println("Each extra baggage is $50")
    
    // Current baggage situation
    println(s"\nCurrent baggage status:")
    println(s"  Total baggages: ${reservation.totalBaggages}")
    println(s"  Non-free baggages: ${reservation.nonfreeBaggages}")
    println(s"  Number of passengers: ${reservation.passengers.size}")
    
    // Calculate baggage costs
    val goldMemberBusinessFreeBags = 4  // per passenger for business class
    val currentPassengers = reservation.passengers.size
    val totalFreeBags = goldMemberBusinessFreeBags * currentPassengers
    println(s"\nIf upgraded to business class, you would get:")
    println(s"  Free bags allowance: $goldMemberBusinessFreeBags bags per passenger × $currentPassengers passenger(s) = $totalFreeBags free bags")
    
    // You want to add 2 checked bags
    val desiredTotalBags = 2
    val currentTotalBags = reservation.totalBaggages
    val bagsToAdd = desiredTotalBags - currentTotalBags
    
    println(s"\nYou want to have $desiredTotalBags checked bags total.")
    println(s"Currently you have $currentTotalBags checked bags.")
    println(s"You need to add $bagsToAdd checked bags.")
    
    if (bagsToAdd > 0) {
      val freeBagsAfterUpgrade = totalFreeBags
      val bagsToPayFor = math.max(0, desiredTotalBags - freeBagsAfterUpgrade)
      val baggageCost = bagsToPayFor * 50
      println(s"\nAfter upgrading to business class, you would have $freeBagsAfterUpgrade free bags.")
      println(s"You want $desiredTotalBags bags, so you need to pay for $bagsToPayFor bags.")
      println(s"Baggage cost: $bagsToPayFor bags × $50 = $$$baggageCost")
    } else {
      println("\nNo additional bags needed - you already have enough bags.")
    }

    val jfkToSfoOneStop = searchOnestopFlight("JFK", "SFO", "2024-05-26")

      pair.forall(_.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0)
    }
    
    if (jfkToSfoBusinessOneStop.nonEmpty) {
      val cheapestOneStop = jfkToSfoBusinessOneStop.map { pair =>

        (pair, totalPrice)
      }.minBy(_._2)
      
      println(s"Cheapest one-stop business class JFK->SFO: $$${cheapestOneStop._2}")

      println(s"  Second: ${cheapestOneStop._1(1).flightNumber} (${cheapestOneStop._1(1).origin}->${cheapestOneStop._1(1).destination})")

    // Prepare data for Miami booking
    import FlightType._, Cabin._, Insurance._
    
    val userId = "mohamed_silva_9265"
    val origin = "JFK"
    val destination = "MIA"
    val flightType = FlightType.RoundTrip
    val cabin = Cabin.Business
    
    // Flight information
    val flights = List(
      FlightInfo("HAT014", "2024-05-26"),  // JFK -> MIA
      FlightInfo("HAT198", "2024-05-28")   // MIA -> JFK
    )
    
    // Passengers
    val passengers = List(
      Passenger("Mohamed", "Silva", "1960-11-26"),
      Passenger("Raj", "Sanchez", "1986-09-12"),
      Passenger("Liam", "Wilson", "1980-03-27")
    )
    
    // Payment methods
    val paymentMethods = List(
      Payment("certificate_3765853", 500),
      Payment("gift_card_6136092", 129),
      Payment("gift_card_8020792", 198),
      Payment("credit_card_2198526", 613)
    )
    
    val totalBaggages = 0
    val nonfreeBaggages = 0
    val insurance = Insurance.No
    
    println("Booking Miami business class trip...")
    println(s"Route: $origin -> $destination ($flightType)")
    println(s"Cabin: $cabin")
    println(s"Flights: ${flights.map(f => s"${f.flightNumber} on ${f.date}").mkString(", ")}")
    println(s"Passengers: ${passengers.size}")
    println(s"Total price: $1440")
    
    // Book the reservation
    val miamiReservation = bookReservation(
      userId = userId,
      origin = origin,
      destination = destination,
      flightType = flightType,
      cabin = cabin,
      flights = flights,
      passengers = passengers,
      paymentMethods = paymentMethods,
      totalBaggages = totalBaggages,
      nonfreeBaggages = nonfreeBaggages,
      insurance = insurance
    )
    
    println("\n✅ Booking successful!")
    println(s"New reservation ID: ${miamiReservation.reservationId}")
    println(s"Created at: ${miamiReservation.createdAt}")
    println(s"Cabin: ${miamiReservation.cabin}")
    println(s"Total price paid: ${miamiReservation.flights.map(_.price).sum}")
    
    // Show reservation details
    println("\nReservation details:")
    println(s"Origin: ${miamiReservation.origin}")
    println(s"Destination: ${miamiReservation.destination}")
    println(s"Flight type: ${miamiReservation.flightType}")
    println(s"Insurance: ${miamiReservation.insurance}")
    println(s"Baggages: ${miamiReservation.totalBaggages} (${miamiReservation.nonfreeBaggages} paid)")

    // Book Miami itinerary with HAT014 and HAT292
    import FlightType._, Cabin._, Insurance._
    
    val userId = "mohamed_silva_9265"
    val origin = "JFK"
    val destination = "MIA"
    val flightType = FlightType.RoundTrip
    val cabin = Cabin.Business
    
    // Flight information
    val flights = List(
      FlightInfo("HAT014", "2024-05-26"),  // JFK -> MIA
      FlightInfo("HAT292", "2024-05-28")   // MIA -> JFK
    )
    
    // Passengers
    val passengers = List(
      Passenger("Mohamed", "Silva", "1960-11-26"),
      Passenger("Raj", "Sanchez", "1986-09-12"),
      Passenger("Liam", "Wilson", "1980-03-27")
    )
    
    // Payment methods - total $1,617
    val paymentMethods = List(
      Payment("certificate_3765853", 500),
      Payment("gift_card_6136092", 129),
      Payment("gift_card_8020792", 198),
      Payment("credit_card_2198526", 790)  // $1,617 - $500 - $129 - $198 = $790
    )
    
    val totalBaggages = 0
    val nonfreeBaggages = 0
    val insurance = Insurance.No
    
    println("Booking Miami business class trip with updated flights...")
    println(s"Route: $origin -> $destination ($flightType)")
    println(s"Cabin: $cabin")
    println(s"Outbound: HAT014 on 2024-05-26 (JFK->MIA)")
    println(s"Return: HAT292 on 2024-05-28 (MIA->JFK)")
    println(s"Passengers: ${passengers.size}")
    println(s"Total price: $1,617")
    
    // Book the reservation
    val miamiReservation = bookReservation(
      userId = userId,
      origin = origin,
      destination = destination,
      flightType = flightType,
      cabin = cabin,
      flights = flights,
      passengers = passengers,
      paymentMethods = paymentMethods,
      totalBaggages = totalBaggages,
      nonfreeBaggages = nonfreeBaggages,
      insurance = insurance
    )
    
    println("\n✅ Booking successful!")
    println(s"New reservation ID: ${miamiReservation.reservationId}")
    println(s"Created at: ${miamiReservation.createdAt}")
    println(s"Cabin: ${miamiReservation.cabin}")
    
    // Calculate total price
    val totalFlightPrice = miamiReservation.flights.map(_.price).sum
    println(s"Total flight price: $totalFlightPrice")
    
    // Show reservation details
    println("\nReservation details:")
    println(s"Origin: ${miamiReservation.origin}")
    println(s"Destination: ${miamiReservation.destination}")
    println(s"Flight type: ${miamiReservation.flightType}")
    println(s"Insurance: ${miamiReservation.insurance}")
    println(s"Baggages: ${miamiReservation.totalBaggages} (${miamiReservation.nonfreeBaggages} paid)")
    
    println("\nFlights:")
    miamiReservation.flights.foreach { flight =>
      println(s"  ${flight.flightNumber}: ${flight.date}, ${flight.origin} -> ${flight.destination}, Price: $${flight.price}")
    }
    
    println("\nPayment summary:")
    println("  certificate_3765853: $500")
    println("  gift_card_6136092: $129")
    println("  gift_card_8020792: $198")
    println("  credit_card_2198526: $790")
    println(s"  Total: $1,617")
    
    // Verify the payment amounts match
    val totalPaid = 500 + 129 + 198 + 790
    println(s"Total paid: $$$totalPaid (matches reservation total: ${totalPaid == totalFlightPrice})")

ERROR #754  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    37 (trial 1)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let me create a function to find the cheapest available variant for each product
    def findCheapestVariant(productId: String): (String, Double) = {
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(productId)
      
      // Parse the product details to find cheapest available variant
      val lines = productDetails.split("\n").toList
      
      // Find the Variant lines and extract price and availability
      var cheapestItemId = ""
      var cheapestPrice = Double.MaxValue
      
      for (line <- lines) {
        if (line.contains("Variant(")) {
          // Extract item ID and price
          val itemIdPattern = """(\d+) -> Variant\(""".r
          val pricePattern = """,(\d+\.\d+)\)""".r
          
          itemIdPattern.findFirstMatchIn(line).foreach { m =>
            val itemId = m.group(1)
            
            // Check if available (contains "true" in the line)
            val isAvailable = line.contains("true,")
            
            pricePattern.findFirstMatchIn(line).foreach { priceMatch =>
              val price = priceMatch.group(1).toDouble
              
              if (isAvailable && price < cheapestPrice) {
                cheapestPrice = price
                cheapestItemId = itemId
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
      
      (cheapestItemId, cheapestPrice)
    }
    
    // Find cheapest variants for each product
    val currentItems = orderDetails.items
    var currentTotal = 0.0
    var newTotal = 0.0
    val modifications = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, String, Double, Double, String)]()
    
    println("Current items and their cheapest alternatives:")
    println("=" * 80)
    
    for (item <- currentItems) {
      currentTotal += item.price
      val (cheapestItemId, cheapestPrice) = findCheapestVariant(item.productId)
      
      println(s"Product: ${item.name}")
      println(s"  Current: Item ID: ${item.itemId}, Price: $${item.price}")
      println(s"  Cheapest available: Item ID: $cheapestItemId, Price: $$$cheapestPrice")
      
      modifications.append((item.itemId, cheapestItemId, item.price, cheapestPrice, item.name))
      
      newTotal += cheapestPrice
      println()
    }
    
    println("=" * 80)
    println(f"Current total: $$$currentTotal%.2f")
    println(f"New total with cheapest variants: $$$newTotal%.2f")
    println(f"Difference: $${newTotal - currentTotal}%.2f")
    println(f"Savings: $${currentTotal - newTotal}%.2f")
    
    // Check if the new total is within the $1150 limit
    if (newTotal <= 1150.0) {
      println("\n✓ The new total of $" + f"$newTotal%.2f" + " is within your $1150 credit limit.")
    } else {
      println("\n✗ The new total of $" + f"$newTotal%.2f" + " is still above your $1150 credit limit.")
    }
    
    modifications.toList
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    6 |  val lines = productDetails.split("\n").toList
      |              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
      |              value split is not a member of library.facade.retail.Product
    1 error found

ERROR #755  [COMPILATION]  [E209] Interpolation Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    37 (trial 1)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Now I understand the structure - let me analyze all products properly
    val currentItems = orderDetails.items
    
    var currentTotal = 0.0
    var newTotal = 0.0
    val modifications = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, String, Double, Double, String)]()
    
    println("Current items and their cheapest alternatives:")
    println("=" * 80)
    
    for (item <- currentItems) {
      currentTotal += item.price
      
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(item.productId)
      val variants = productDetails.variants
      
      // Find cheapest available variant
      var cheapestVariant: Option[Variant] = None
      var cheapestPrice = Double.MaxValue
      
      for ((itemId, variant) <- variants) {
        if (variant.available && variant.price < cheapestPrice) {
          cheapestPrice = variant.price
          cheapestVariant = Some(variant)
        }
      }
      
      cheapestVariant match {
        case Some(variant) =>
          println(s"Product: ${item.name}")
          println(s"  Current: Item ID: ${item.itemId}, Price: $${item.price}")
          println(s"  Cheapest available: Item ID: ${variant.itemId}, Price: $$${variant.price}")
          println(s"  Options: ${variant.options}")
          
          modifications.append((item.itemId, variant.itemId, item.price, variant.price, item.name))
          newTotal += variant.price
          
        case None =>
          println(s"Product: ${item.name}")
          println(s"  Current: Item ID: ${item.itemId}, Price: $${item.price}")
          println(s"  WARNING: No available variants found!")
          // Keep the current item if no available variant
          modifications.append((item.itemId, item.itemId, item.price, item.price, item.name))
          newTotal += item.price
      }
      println()
    }
    
    println("=" * 80)
    println(f"Current total: $$$currentTotal%.2f")
    println(f"New total with cheapest variants: $$$newTotal%.2f")
    println(f"Difference: $${newTotal - currentTotal}%.2f")
    println(f"Savings: $${currentTotal - newTotal}%.2f")
    
    // Check if the new total is within the $1150 limit
    if (newTotal <= 1150.0) {
      println("\n✓ The new total of $" + f"$newTotal%.2f" + " is within your $1150 credit limit.")
    } else {
      println("\n✗ The new total of $" + f"$newTotal%.2f" + " is still above your $1150 credit limit.")
    }
    
    // Prepare data for potential modification
    val oldItemIds = modifications.map(_._1).toList
    val newItemIds = modifications.map(_._2).toList
    val oldPrices = modifications.map(_._3).toList
    val newPrices = modifications.map(_._4).toList
    val productNames = modifications.map(_._5).toList
    
    println("\nSummary of modifications needed:")
    for (i <- modifications.indices) {
      val (oldId, newId, oldPrice, newPrice, name) = modifications(i)
      println(s"${i+1}. $name: ${oldId} ($$$oldPrice) -> ${newId} ($$$newPrice)")
    }
  --- Error Output ---

       |                                                ^^^^

    -- [E209] Interpolation Error: -------------------------------------------------
    53 |println(f"Savings: $${currentTotal - newTotal}%.2f")
       |                                             ^^^^
       |  conversions must follow a splice; use %% for literal %, %n for newline

    // Check Headphones variants
    val headphonesVariants = headphonesProduct.variants
    val availableHeadphones = headphonesVariants.filter { case (_, v) => v.available }
    val cheapHeadphones = availableHeadphones.filter { case (_, v) => v.price < 100.0 }
    
    println("=== HEADPHONES ===")
    println(s"Product: ${headphonesProduct.name}")
    println(s"Total variants: ${headphonesVariants.size}")
    println(s"Available variants: ${availableHeadphones.size}")
    println(s"Available under 100: ${cheapHeadphones.size}")
    
    // Check Wireless Earbuds variants  
    val earbudsVariants = earbudsProduct.variants
    val availableEarbuds = earbudsVariants.filter { case (_, v) => v.available }
    val cheapEarbuds = availableEarbuds.filter { case (_, v) => v.price < 100.0 }
    
    println("\n=== WIRELESS EARBUDS ===")
    println(s"Product: ${earbudsProduct.name}")
    println(s"Total variants: ${earbudsVariants.size}")
    println(s"Available variants: ${availableEarbuds.size}")
    println(s"Available under 100: ${cheapEarbuds.size}")
    
    // Check all products for any under $100
    println("\n=== CHECKING ALL PRODUCT TYPES FOR ITEMS UNDER $100 ===")
    var foundCheapProducts = List.empty[(String, String, Double)] // (product name, item id, price)
    
    // Check a few more products that might be cheaper
    val potentialCheapProducts = List(
      "Water Bottle" -> "8310926033",
      "T-Shirt" -> "9523456873", 
      "Notebook" -> "2892623495",
      "Yoga Mat" -> "4635925001",
      "Desk Lamp" -> "6817146515",
      "LED Light Bulb" -> "2696197613"
    )
    
    for ((name, id) <- potentialCheapProducts) {
      try {
        val product = getProductDetails(id)
        val cheapVariants = product.variants.values.filter(v => v.available && v.price < 100.0)
        if (cheapVariants.nonEmpty) {
          val cheapest = cheapVariants.minBy(_.price)
          foundCheapProducts = foundCheapProducts :+ (name, cheapest.itemId, cheapest.price)
          println(s"Found: $name has variants under $100 (cheapest: $${cheapest.price})")
        } else {
          println(s"$name: No variants under $100")
        }
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => println(s"Error checking $name: $e")
      }
    }
    
    println("\nFound cheap products:")
    foundCheapProducts.foreach { case (name, itemId, price) =>
      println(s"  $name - Item ID: $itemId - Price: $${price}")
    }

ERROR #780  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    20 (trial 2)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let me parse the product details to find the most expensive AVAILABLE variant for each product
    // First, let me create a function to parse the product string and find the most expensive available variant
    
    def findMostExpensiveAvailableVariant(productDetails: String): (String, Double, Map[String, String]) = {
      // Parse the product details to extract variants
      val lines = productDetails.split("\n")
      var maxPrice = 0.0
      var maxVariantId = ""
      var maxOptions = Map[String, String]()
      
      // Look for variant lines in the output
      for (line <- lines) {
        if (line.contains("-> Variant(")) {
          // Extract variant information
          val pattern = """(\d+) -> Variant\((\d+),Map\((.*)\),(\w+),(\d+\.\d+)\)""".r
          pattern.findFirstMatchIn(line) match {
            case Some(m) =>
              val variantId = m.group(2)
              val available = m.group(4) == "true"
              val price = m.group(5).toDouble
              val optionsStr = m.group(3)
              
              // Parse options
              val options = optionsStr.split(", ").map { pair =>
                val keyValue = pair.split(" -> ")
                keyValue(0) -> keyValue(1)
              }.toMap
              
              if (available && price > maxPrice) {
                maxPrice = price
                maxVariantId = variantId
                maxOptions = options
              }
            case None =>
          }
        }
      }
      (maxVariantId, maxPrice, maxOptions)
    }
    
    // Now apply this to each product
    val waterBottleResult = findMostExpensiveAvailableVariant(waterBottleDetails.toString())
    val keyboardResult = findMostExpensiveAvailableVariant(keyboardDetails.toString())
    val shoesResult = findMostExpensiveAvailableVariant(shoesDetails.toString())
    val makeupResult = findMostExpensiveAvailableVariant(makeupDetails.toString())
    
    println("Water Bottle - Most expensive available variant:")
    println(s"Item ID: ${waterBottleResult._1}, Price: ${waterBottleResult._2}, Options: ${waterBottleResult._3}")
    
    println("\nMechanical Keyboard - Most expensive available variant:")
    println(s"Item ID: ${keyboardResult._1}, Price: ${keyboardResult._2}, Options: ${keyboardResult._3}")
    
    println("\nRunning Shoes - Most expensive available variant:")
    println(s"Item ID: ${shoesResult._1}, Price: ${shoesResult._2}, Options: ${shoesResult._3}")
    
    println("\nMakeup Kit - Most expensive available variant:")
    println(s"Item ID: ${makeupResult._1}, Price: ${makeupResult._2}, Options: ${makeupResult._3}")
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    20 |          val price = m.group(5).toDouble
       |                      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
       |      value toDouble is not a member of String | Null.
       |      An extension method was tried, but could not be fully constructed:
       |
       |          augmentString(m.group(5))
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------

       |                        ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    // Get all product IDs from the order items
    val productIds = order.items.map(_.productId).distinct
    println("Product IDs in your order:")
    productIds.foreach(println)
    
    // Get product details for each and find cheapest variants
    var cheapestOptions = Map[String, (String, Double)]() // productId -> (itemId, price)
    
    for (productId <- productIds) {
      val product = getProductDetails(productId)
      println(s"\nProduct: ${product.name} (ID: $productId)")
      println("Available variants:")
      
      var cheapestItemId = ""
      var cheapestPrice = Double.MaxValue
      
      for ((itemId, variant) <- product.variants) {
        if (variant.available) {
          println(s"  Item ID: $itemId, Price: $${variant.price}, Options: ${variant.options}")
          if (variant.price < cheapestPrice) {
            cheapestPrice = variant.price
            cheapestItemId = itemId
          }
        }
      }
      
      if (cheapestItemId.nonEmpty) {
        cheapestOptions = cheapestOptions + (productId -> (cheapestItemId, cheapestPrice))
        println(s"\nCheapest variant for ${product.name}: Item ID $cheapestItemId, Price $$$cheapestPrice")
      }
    }
    
    println("\n" + "=" * 50)
    println("Current order items vs cheapest alternatives:")
    println("=" * 50)
    
    var currentTotal = 0.0
    var newTotal = 0.0
    
    for (item <- order.items) {
      val productId = item.productId
      val currentPrice = item.price
      currentTotal += currentPrice
      
      val (cheapestItemId, cheapestPrice) = cheapestOptions(productId)
      newTotal += cheapestPrice
      
      println(s"${item.name}:")
      println(s"  Current: Item ID ${item.itemId}, Price $$$currentPrice, Options: ${item.options}")
      println(s"  Cheapest: Item ID $cheapestItemId, Price $$$cheapestPrice")
      println()
    }
    
    println(s"Current total: $$$currentTotal")
    println(s"New total with cheapest variants: $$$newTotal")
    println(s"Difference: $${newTotal - currentTotal}")
    if (newTotal - currentPrice < 0) {
      println(s"You would get a refund of $${math.abs(newTotal - currentTotal)}")

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Function to find the most expensive variant for a product
    def findMostExpensiveVariant(productId: String, currentItemId: String, currentOptions: Map[String, String]): (String, Double, Map[String, String]) = {
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(productId)
      
      // Parse the product details to extract variants
      // The product details string contains variant information
      // We need to extract all variants and find the most expensive one
      // For shoes, we need to keep the same size
      
      // First, let's extract the variant information from the product details string
      val variantPattern = """Variant\((\d+),Map\(([^)]+)\),(true|false),([\d.]+)\)""".r
      
      // Parse the string to find all variants
      val variants = variantPattern.findAllMatchIn(productDetails.toString).map { m =>
        val itemId = m.group(1)
        val optionsStr = m.group(2)
        val price = m.group(4).toDouble
        
        // Parse options string into a map
        val options = optionsStr.split(", ").map { pair =>
          val parts = pair.split(" -> ")
          if (parts.length == 2) parts(0) -> parts(1) else "" -> ""
        }.filter(_._1.nonEmpty).toMap
        
        (itemId, price, options)
      }.toList
      
      // Filter variants based on constraints
      val filteredVariants = if (productId == "6938111410") { // Running Shoes
        // For shoes, keep the same size
        val currentSize = currentOptions.getOrElse("size", "")
        variants.filter { case (_, _, options) =>
          options.getOrElse("size", "") == currentSize
        }
      } else {
        variants
      }
      
      // Find the most expensive variant
      val mostExpensive = filteredVariants.maxBy(_._2)
      
      mostExpensive
    }
    
    // Test for each item in the pending order
    println("Finding most expensive variants for pending order #W9911714:")
    println("=" * 60)
    
    val upgrades = pendingOrderItems.map { item =>
      val (newItemId, newPrice, newOptions) = findMostExpensiveVariant(item.productId, item.itemId, item.options)
      
      println(s"\nProduct: ${item.name}")
      println(s"Current item ID: ${item.itemId}, Price: $${item.price}")
      println(s"Current options: ${item.options}")
      println(s"New item ID: $newItemId, New price: $$$newPrice")
      println(s"New options: $newOptions")
      println(s"Price difference: $$${newPrice - item.price}")
      
      (item.itemId, newItemId, item.price, newPrice, newPrice - item.price)
    }
    
    val totalPriceDiff = upgrades.map(_._5).sum
    println(s"\nTotal price difference for order #W9911714: $$$totalPriceDiff")
