ERROR #843  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    36 (trial 4)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Find cheapest available variant for each product
    println("Finding cheapest available variants for each product...")
    println("=" * 50)
    
    var totalSavings = 0.0
    var newTotal = total
    val currentItems = items
    val itemModifications = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, String, Double, Double)]() // (oldItemId, newItemId, oldPrice, newPrice)
    
    for (currentItem <- currentItems) {
      val productId = currentItem.productId
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(productId)
      
      // Find cheapest available variant
      val cheapestVariant = productDetails.variants.values
        .filter(_.available)
        .minBy(_.price)
      
      val oldPrice = currentItem.price
      val newPrice = cheapestVariant.price
      val savings = oldPrice - newPrice
      
      println(s"\n${currentItem.name}:")
      println(s"  Current: Item ${currentItem.itemId} - $$$oldPrice")
      println(s"  Cheapest: Item ${cheapestVariant.itemId} - $$$newPrice (saves: $$$savings)")
      println(s"  Options: ${cheapestVariant.options}")
      
      if (currentItem.itemId != cheapestVariant.itemId) {
        itemModifications += ((currentItem.itemId, cheapestVariant.itemId, oldPrice, newPrice))
        totalSavings += savings
      } else {
        println(s"  (Already the cheapest option)")
      }
    }
    
    newTotal = total - totalSavings
    println("\n" + "=" * 50)
    println(s"Current order total: $$$total")
    println(s"Total savings if switching to cheapest options: $$$totalSavings")
    println(s"New total would be: $$$newTotal")
    println(s"Your card limit: $$$1131")
    println(s"Difference: $$${newTotal - 1131}")
    
    if (itemModifications.nonEmpty) {
      println("\nItems that would be modified:")
      itemModifications.foreach { case (oldId, newId, oldPrice, newPrice) =>
        println(s"  Item $oldId ($$$oldPrice) -> Item $newId ($$$newPrice)")
      }
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    41 |println(s"Your card limit: $$$1131")
       |                             ^
       |invalid string interpolation: `$$`, `$"`, `$`ident or `$`BlockExpr expected

  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    36 (trial 4)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Find cheapest available variant for each product
    println("Finding cheapest available variants for each product...")
    println("=" * 50)
    
    var totalSavings = 0.0
    var newTotal = total
    val currentItems = items
    val itemModifications = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, String, Double, Double)]() // (oldItemId, newItemId, oldPrice, newPrice)
    
    for (currentItem <- currentItems) {
      val productId = currentItem.productId
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(productId)
      
      // Find cheapest available variant
      val cheapestVariant = productDetails.variants.values
        .filter(_.available)
        .minBy(_.price)
      
      val oldPrice = currentItem.price
      val newPrice = cheapestVariant.price
      val savings = oldPrice - newPrice
      
      println(s"\n${currentItem.name}:")
      println(s"  Current: Item ${currentItem.itemId} - $$$oldPrice")
      println(s"  Cheapest: Item ${cheapestVariant.itemId} - $$$newPrice (saves: $$$savings)")
      println(s"  Options: ${cheapestVariant.options}")
      
      if (currentItem.itemId != cheapestVariant.itemId) {
        itemModifications += ((currentItem.itemId, cheapestVariant.itemId, oldPrice, newPrice))
        totalSavings += savings
      } else {
        println(s"  (Already the cheapest option)")
      }
    }
    
    newTotal = total - totalSavings
    println("\n" + "=" * 50)
    println(s"Current order total: $$$total")
    println(s"Total savings if switching to cheapest options: $$$totalSavings")
    println(s"New total would be: $$$newTotal")
    println(s"Your card limit: $$$1131")
    println(s"Difference: $$${newTotal - 1131}")
    
    if (itemModifications.nonEmpty) {
      println("\nItems that would be modified:")
      itemModifications.foreach { case (oldId, newId, oldPrice, newPrice) =>
        println(s"  Item $oldId ($$$oldPrice) -> Item $newId ($$$newPrice)")
      }
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    41 |println(s"Your card limit: $$$1131")
       |                             ^
       |invalid string interpolation: `$$`, `$"`, `$`ident or `$`BlockExpr expected

    // Find cheapest available variant for each product
    println("Finding cheapest available variants for each product...")
    println("=" * 50)
    
    var totalSavings = 0.0
    var newTotal = total
    val currentItems = items
    val itemModifications = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, String, Double, Double)]() // (oldItemId, newItemId, oldPrice, newPrice)
    
    for (currentItem <- currentItems) {
      val productId = currentItem.productId
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(productId)
      
      // Find cheapest available variant
      val cheapestVariant = productDetails.variants.values
        .filter(_.available)
        .minBy(_.price)
      
      val oldPrice = currentItem.price
      val newPrice = cheapestVariant.price
      val savings = oldPrice - newPrice
      
      println(s"\n${currentItem.name}:")
      println(s"  Current: Item ${currentItem.itemId} - $${oldPrice}")
      println(s"  Cheapest: Item ${cheapestVariant.itemId} - $${newPrice} (saves: $${savings})")
      println(s"  Options: ${cheapestVariant.options}")
      
      if (currentItem.itemId != cheapestVariant.itemId) {
        itemModifications += ((currentItem.itemId, cheapestVariant.itemId, oldPrice, newPrice))
        totalSavings += savings
      } else {
        println(s"  (Already the cheapest option)")
      }
    }
    
    newTotal = total - totalSavings
    println("\n" + "=" * 50)
    println(s"Current order total: $${total}")
    println(s"Total savings if switching to cheapest options: $${totalSavings}")
    println(s"New total would be: $${newTotal}")
    println(s"Your card limit: \$$1131")
    println(s"Difference: $${newTotal - 1131}")

      println("\nItems that would be modified:")

      println(s"Item ID: $id, Options: $options, Price: $$$price (${sign}$$${"%.2f".format(math.abs(diff))})")
    }
    
    println()
    println("Other available bookshelves (sorted by price):")

    }

ERROR #874  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    20 (trial 5)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse the product details to find most expensive available variants
    case class VariantInfo(itemId: String, price: Double, options: Map[String, String], available: Boolean)
    
    // Helper function to parse variants from product details
    def parseVariants(productDetails: String): List[VariantInfo] = {
      // Extract the variants part from the product details string
      val variantsStart = productDetails.indexOf("HashMap(")
      if (variantsStart == -1) return List()
      
      val variantsStr = productDetails.substring(variantsStart + 8, productDetails.length - 1)
      val variantStrings = variantsStr.split(",\\s*")
      
      variantStrings.map { variantStr =>
        // Parse each variant string like: "6777246137 -> Variant(6777246137,Map(...),true,47.76)"
        val itemIdMatch = """(\d+)\s*->\s*Variant\((\d+),Map""".r.findFirstMatchIn(variantStr)
        if (itemIdMatch.isEmpty) return List()
        
        val itemId = itemIdMatch.get.group(1)
        
        // Find price - it's the last number before the closing parenthesis
        val priceMatch = """([\d.]+)\)""".r.findFirstMatchIn(variantStr)
        if (priceMatch.isEmpty) return List()
        
        val price = priceMatch.get.group(1).toDouble
        
        // Find availability
        val available = variantStr.contains(",true,") || variantStr.endsWith(",true)")
        
        VariantInfo(itemId, price, Map(), available)
      }.toList
    }
    
    // Get most expensive available variant for each product
    val waterBottleVariants = parseVariants(waterBottleDetails.toString())
    val mechanicalKeyboardVariants = parseVariants(mechanicalKeyboardDetails.toString())
    val runningShoesVariants = parseVariants(runningShoesDetails.toString())
    val makeupKitVariants = parseVariants(makeupKitDetails.toString())
    
    println("Water Bottle Variants:")
    waterBottleVariants.filter(_.available).sortBy(-_.price).take(5).foreach(v => println(s"  Item ID: ${v.itemId}, Price: ${v.price}"))
    
    println("\nMechanical Keyboard Variants:")
    mechanicalKeyboardVariants.filter(_.available).sortBy(-_.price).take(5).foreach(v => println(s"  Item ID: ${v.itemId}, Price: ${v.price}"))
    
    println("\nRunning Shoes Variants (size 9 only):")
    runningShoesVariants.filter(_.available).sortBy(-_.price).take(5).foreach(v => println(s"  Item ID: ${v.itemId}, Price: ${v.price}"))
    
    println("\nMakeup Kit Variants:")
    makeupKitVariants.filter(_.available).sortBy(-_.price).take(5).foreach(v => println(s"  Item ID: ${v.itemId}, Price: ${v.price}"))
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    24 |    val price = priceMatch.get.group(1).toDouble
       |                ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
       |      value toDouble is not a member of String | Null.
       |      An extension method was tried, but could not be fully constructed:
       |
       |          augmentString(priceMatch.get.group(1))
    -- [E007] Type Mismatch Error: -------------------------------------------------
    29 |    VariantInfo(itemId, price, Map(), available)
       |                ^^^^^^
       |                Found:    (itemId : String | Null)
       |                Required: String
       |
       | longer explanation available when compiling with `-explain`
    2 errors found

ERROR #879  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    36 (trial 5)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let me parse the product details to find the cheapest available variant for each product
    import scala.util.parsing.json.JSON
    
    // Parse the product details to extract available variants and find cheapest for each
    def findCheapestVariant(productDetails: String): (String, Double) = {
      // Extract the variants map from the product string
      val lines = productDetails.split("\n")
      val variantLines = lines.filter(_.contains("Variant("))
      
      var cheapestPrice = Double.MaxValue
      var cheapestItemId = ""
      
      for (line <- variantLines) {
        try {
          // Parse the variant line - format: Variant(itemId, Map(options), available, price)
          val parts = line.split(",")
          val itemId = parts(0).replace("Variant(", "").trim
          val available = parts(2).trim == "true"
          val price = parts(3).replace(")", "").trim.toDouble
          
          if (available && price < cheapestPrice) {
            cheapestPrice = price
            cheapestItemId = itemId
          }
        } catch {
          case e: Exception => // Skip parsing errors
        }
      }
      
      (cheapestItemId, cheapestPrice)
    }
    
    // Get cheapest variants for each product
    println("Cheapest available variants for each product:")
    println("=" * 50)
    
    var totalCheapestPrice = 0.0
    val currentItems = Map(
      "3377618313" -> "6117189161", // Action Camera (current: silver 4K waterproof)
      "9743693396" -> "9879255677", // Patio Umbrella (current: green 6ft olefin auto tilt)
      "6817146515" -> "7453605304", // Desk Lamp (current: silver low battery)
      "9523456873" -> "3799046073", // T-Shirt (current: black XXL cotton crew neck)
      "2524789262" -> "9851293632"  // Backpack (current: green small polyester camera)
    )
    
    for (productId <- productIds) {
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(productId)
      val (cheapestItemId, cheapestPrice) = findCheapestVariant(productDetails)
      
      val currentItemId = currentItems(productId)
      val currentPrice = {
        val details = getProductDetails(productId)
        val lines = details.split("\n")
        val variantLine = lines.find(_.contains(s"$currentItemId -> Variant")).getOrElse("")
        if (variantLine.nonEmpty) {
          val parts = variantLine.split(",")
          parts(3).replace(")", "").trim.toDouble
        } else 0.0
      }
      
      println(s"Product ID: $productId")
      println(s"Current item: $currentItemId, price: $$${currentPrice}")
      println(s"Cheapest available item: $cheapestItemId, price: $$$cheapestPrice")
      println(s"Potential savings: $${currentPrice - cheapestPrice}")
      println("-" * 30)
      
      totalCheapestPrice += cheapestPrice
    }
    
    println(s"\nTotal current price: $$${1166.98}")
    println(s"Total with cheapest variants: $$$totalCheapestPrice")
    println(s"Difference: $${1166.98 - totalCheapestPrice}")
  --- Error Output ---

    // Current items and prices from the order
    val currentItems = Map(

    // Function to find cheapest available variant for a product
    def findCheapestAvailable(product: Product): (String, Double) = {
      var cheapestPrice = Double.MaxValue
      var cheapestItemId = ""
      
      for ((itemId, variant) <- product.variants) {
        if (variant.available && variant.price < cheapestPrice) {
          cheapestPrice = variant.price
          cheapestItemId = itemId
        }
      }
      
      (cheapestItemId, cheapestPrice)

ERROR #883  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    38 (trial 5)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse the product details to find cheapest available variants
    import scala.util.Try
    
    case class ProductSummary(name: String, productId: String, currentItemId: String, currentPrice: Double, cheapestItemId: String, cheapestPrice: Double)
    
    // Helper function to parse product details
    def parseProductDetails(productDetails: (String, Any)): ProductSummary = {
      val (pid, details) = productDetails
      
      // Get current item for this product
      val currentItem = items.find(_.productId == pid).get
      
      // Parse the product details string to extract variants
      val detailsStr = details.toString
      
      // Extract variant information using regex
      val variantPattern = """Variant\((\d+),.*?available = (true|false), price = (\d+\.?\d*)\)""".r
      
      val variants = variantPattern.findAllMatchIn(detailsStr).map { m =>
        (m.group(1), m.group(2).toBoolean, m.group(3).toDouble)
      }.toList
      
      // Find cheapest available variant
      val cheapestAvailable = variants.filter(_._2 == true).minByOption(_._3)
      
      ProductSummary(
        name = currentItem.name,
        productId = pid,
        currentItemId = currentItem.itemId,
        currentPrice = currentItem.price,
        cheapestItemId = cheapestAvailable.map(_._1).getOrElse(currentItem.itemId),
        cheapestPrice = cheapestAvailable.map(_._3).getOrElse(currentItem.price)
      )
    }
    
    // Parse each product
    val productSummaries = productDetails.collect {
      case (pid, prod: Product) => parseProductDetails((pid, prod.toString))
    }
    
    println("Current vs Cheapest Available Prices:")
    println("=" * 80)
    productSummaries.foreach { ps =>
      val savings = ps.currentPrice - ps.cheapestPrice
      println(s"${ps.name}:")
      println(s"  Current: $${ps.currentPrice} (Item ID: ${ps.currentItemId})")
      println(s"  Cheapest available: $${ps.cheapestPrice} (Item ID: ${ps.cheapestItemId})")
      println(s"  Potential savings: $$$savings")
      println()
    }
    
    // Calculate total savings and new total
    val currentTotal = items.map(_.price).sum
    val newTotalWithCheapest = productSummaries.map(_.cheapestPrice).sum
    val totalSavings = currentTotal - newTotalWithCheapest
    
    println("=" * 80)
    println(s"Current order total: $$$currentTotal")
    println(s"Total with cheapest variants: $$$newTotalWithCheapest")
    println(s"Total potential savings: $$$totalSavings")
    println()
    
    // Check if new total is $950 or below
    if (newTotalWithCheapest <= 950) {
      println(s"✓ YES! By switching to cheapest variants, the total would be $$$newTotalWithCheapest (≤ $950)")
    } else {
      println(s"✗ NO. Even with cheapest variants, the total would be $$$newTotalWithCheapest (> $950)")
    }

    // Parse the product details to find cheapest available variants
    import scala.util.Try
    
    case class ProductSummary(name: String, productId: String, currentItemId: String, currentPrice: Double, cheapestItemId: String, cheapestPrice: Double)
    
    // Helper function to parse product details
    def parseProductDetails(productDetails: (String, Any)): ProductSummary = {
      val (pid, details) = productDetails
      
      // Get current item for this product
      val currentItem = items.find(_.productId == pid).get
      
      // Parse the product details string to extract variants
      val detailsStr = details.toString
      
      // Extract variant information using regex
      val variantPattern = """Variant\((\d+),.*?available = (true|false), price = (\d+\.?\d*)\)""".r
      
      val variants = variantPattern.findAllMatchIn(detailsStr).map { m =>
        (m.group(1), m.group(2).toBoolean, m.group(3).toDouble)
      }.toList

        name = currentItem.name,
        productId = pid,
        currentItemId = currentItem.itemId,
        currentPrice = currentItem.price,

    case class ProductSummary(name: String, productId: String, currentItemId: String, currentPrice: Double, cheapestItemId: String, cheapestPrice: Double)

    // Let me check each order for wireless earbuds
    def checkOrderForEarbuds(orderId: String): Boolean = {
      try {
        val orderDetails = getOrderDetails(orderId)
        // Check if order details contain "earbud" or "wireless" in item names
        orderDetails match {
          case order: Order => 
            order.items.exists(item => item.name.toLowerCase.contains("earbud") || item.name.toLowerCase.contains("wireless"))
          case _ => false
        }
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => false
      }
    }
    
    // Check all orders
    val ordersWithEarbuds = orders.filter(checkOrderForEarbuds)
    println(s"Orders with earbuds: $ordersWithEarbuds")

    ordersWithEarbuds.foreach(orderId => {
      println(s"\n=== Order $orderId details ===")

        val order = getOrderDetails(orderId)
        println(order)
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => println(s"Error: ${e.getMessage}")

ERROR #918  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    20 (trial 6)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse the product details to find most expensive available variants
    import scala.util.parsing.json._
    
    // Function to extract variants from product string
    def extractVariants(productStr: String): List[(String, Map[String, String], Boolean, Double)] = {
      val pattern = """Variant\(([^,]+),Map\(([^)]+)\),([^,]+),([^)]+)\)""".r
      val variants = pattern.findAllMatchIn(productStr).map { m =>
        val itemId = m.group(1)
        val optionsStr = m.group(2)
        val available = m.group(3).trim == "true"
        val price = m.group(4).toDouble
        
        // Parse options string like "capacity -> 750ml, material -> stainless steel, color -> red"
        val options = optionsStr.split(",").map(_.trim).map { pair =>
          val parts = pair.split("->").map(_.trim)
          parts(0) -> parts(1)
        }.toMap
        
        (itemId, options, available, price)
      }.toList
      variants
    }
    
    // Get variants for each product
    val waterBottleVariants = extractVariants(waterBottleDetails.toString)
    val keyboardVariants = extractVariants(keyboardDetails.toString)
    val runningShoesVariants = extractVariants(runningShoesDetails.toString)
    val makeupKitVariants = extractVariants(makeupKitDetails.toString)
    
    // Find most expensive available Water Bottle variant
    val mostExpensiveWaterBottle = waterBottleVariants.filter(_._3).maxBy(_._4)
    println(s"Most expensive available Water Bottle: Item ID: ${mostExpensiveWaterBottle._1}, Options: ${mostExpensiveWaterBottle._2}, Price: ${mostExpensiveWaterBottle._4}")
    
    // Find most expensive available Mechanical Keyboard variant
    val mostExpensiveKeyboard = keyboardVariants.filter(_._3).maxBy(_._4)
    println(s"Most expensive available Mechanical Keyboard: Item ID: ${mostExpensiveKeyboard._1}, Options: ${mostExpensiveKeyboard._2}, Price: ${mostExpensiveKeyboard._4}")
    
    // Find most expensive available Running Shoes variant in size 9
    val mostExpensiveRunningShoesSize9 = runningShoesVariants.filter { case (_, options, available, _) => 
      available && options.get("size").contains("9")
    }.maxBy(_._4)
    println(s"Most expensive available Running Shoes (size 9): Item ID: ${mostExpensiveRunningShoesSize9._1}, Options: ${mostExpensiveRunningShoesSize9._2}, Price: ${mostExpensiveRunningShoesSize9._4}")
    
    // Find most expensive available Makeup Kit variant with skin tone "dark"
    val mostExpensiveMakeupKitDark = makeupKitVariants.filter { case (_, options, available, _) => 
      available && options.get("skin tone").contains("dark")
    }.maxBy(_._4)
    println(s"Most expensive available Makeup Kit (dark skin tone): Item ID: ${mostExpensiveMakeupKitDark._1}, Options: ${mostExpensiveMakeupKitDark._2}, Price: ${mostExpensiveMakeupKitDark._4}")
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    2 |import scala.util.parsing.json._
      |       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
      |value parsing is not a member of util - did you mean util.Sorting? or perhaps util.Using or util.hashing?
    1 error found

ERROR #927  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    37 (trial 6)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse the product details to find cheapest available variants
    import scala.util.Try
    
    case class ProductInfo(productId: String, name: String, cheapestVariant: Variant, currentItemId: String, currentPrice: Double)
    
    // Helper function to parse variant from string
    def parseVariant(str: String): Variant = {
      val pattern = """Variant\(itemId = (\d+), options = Map\(([^)]+)\), available = (true|false), price = ([\d.]+)\)""".r
      str match {
        case pattern(itemId, optionsStr, availableStr, priceStr) =>
          val available = availableStr.toBoolean
          val price = priceStr.toDouble
          // Parse options map
          val options = optionsStr.split(", ").map { opt =>
            val parts = opt.split(" -> ")
            if (parts.length == 2) parts(0) -> parts(1).replace("\"", "")
            else opt -> ""
          }.toMap
          Variant(itemId, options, available, price)
        case _ => throw new RuntimeException(s"Cannot parse variant: $str")
      }
    }
    
    // Helper function to parse product from string
    def parseProduct(str: String): (String, Product) = {
      val lines = str.split("\n")
      val name = lines(0).split("\\(")(0).trim
      val productId = lines(0).split("\\(")(1).split(",")(0).trim
      val variants = str.split("HashMap\\(")(1).split("\\)\\)")(0)
      
      val variantStrings = variants.split(",\\s+").toList
      val variantMap = variantStrings.map { v =>
        val variant = parseVariant(v)
        variant.itemId -> variant
      }.toMap
      
      (name, Product(name, productId, variantMap))
    }
    
    // Parse each product
    val parsedProducts = productDetails.map { case (id, details) =>
      val (name, product) = parseProduct(details.toString)
      (id, name, product)
    }
    
    // Find current items and their prices
    val currentItems = res3.items.map(item => (item.productId, item.itemId, item.name, item.price))
    
    println("Current items in order:")
    currentItems.foreach { case (prodId, itemId, name, price) =>
      println(s"  - $name (Product ID: $prodId, Item ID: $itemId): $$$price")
    }
    
    println("\nFinding cheapest available variants:")
    
    var newTotal = 0.0
    val modifications = scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer[(String, String, String, Double, Double, String)]()
    
    for ((prodId, itemId, name, currentPrice) <- currentItems) {
      parsedProducts.find(_._1 == prodId) match {
        case Some((_, prodName, product)) =>
          // Find cheapest available variant
          val cheapestVariant = product.variants.values
            .filter(_.available)
            .minByOption(_.price)
          
          cheapestVariant match {
            case Some(variant) =>
              val priceDiff = variant.price - currentPrice
              newTotal += variant.price
              modifications += ((prodId, itemId, variant.itemId, currentPrice, variant.price, variant.options.toString))
              println(s"  - $name: Current ($$$currentPrice) -> Cheapest variant ($$${variant.price}): ${variant.options}")
            case None =>
              println(s"  - $name: No available variants found!")
              newTotal += currentPrice
          }
        case None =>
          println(s"  - $name: Product not found!")
          newTotal += currentPrice
      }
    }
    
    println(s"\nCurrent total: $$$currentTotal")
    println(s"New total with cheapest variants: $$$newTotal")
    println(s"Difference: $$${newTotal - currentTotal}")
    
    // Check if new total is under $1150
    if (newTotal < 1150) {
      println(s"\nSUCCESS: New total ($$$newTotal) is under $$1150!")
    } else {
      println(s"\nFAILURE: New total ($$$newTotal) is still over $$1150.")
    }
    
    // Show all modifications needed
    println("\nModifications needed:")
    modifications.foreach { case (prodId, oldItemId, newItemId, oldPrice, newPrice, options) =>
      println(s"  Product $prodId: Item $oldItemId ($$$oldPrice) -> Item $newItemId ($$$newPrice)")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    11 |      val available = availableStr.toBoolean
       |                      ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
       |      value toBoolean is not a member of String | Null.
       |      An extension method was tried, but could not be fully constructed:
       |
       |          augmentString(availableStr)
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------

       |                  ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    println(s"Action Camera: Current $$${currentActionCameraPrice} -> Alternative $$${cheapestActionCamera.price} (Item ID: ${cheapestActionCamera.itemId}, Options: ${cheapestActionCamera.options})")
    
    // Desk Lamp  
    val cheapestDeskLamp = cheaperDeskLamps.minBy(_.price)
    println(s"Desk Lamp: Current $$${currentDeskLampPrice} -> Alternative $$${cheapestDeskLamp.price} (Item ID: ${cheapestDeskLamp.itemId}, Options: ${cheapestDeskLamp.options})")
    
    // T-Shirt
    val cheapestTshirt = cheaperTshirts.minBy(_.price)
    println(s"T-Shirt: Current $$${currentTshirtPrice} -> Alternative $$${cheapestTshirt.price} (Item ID: ${cheapestTshirt.itemId}, Options: ${cheapestTshirt.options})")

    // Calculate potential savings if we switch all possible items
    val actionCameraSavings = currentActionCameraPrice - cheapestActionCamera.price
    val deskLampSavings = currentDeskLampPrice - cheapestDeskLamp.price
    val tshirtSavings = currentTshirtPrice - cheapestTshirt.price
    val totalPossibleSavings = actionCameraSavings + deskLampSavings + tshirtSavings
    val newPotentialTotal = currentTotal - totalPossibleSavings
    
    println(s"\nPotential savings:")
    println(s"  Action Camera: $${actionCameraSavings}")
    println(s"  Desk Lamp: $${deskLampSavings}")
    println(s"  T-Shirt: $${tshirtSavings}")
    println(s"  Total possible savings: $${totalPossibleSavings}")
    println(s"  New potential total: $${newPotentialTotal}")
    
    // Check if this gets us under $1131
    if (newPotentialTotal <= 1131) {
      println("\n✓ Switching to these cheaper alternatives would bring your total under $1131!")
    } else {
      println(s"\n✗ Even with these changes, your total would be $$${newPotentialTotal}, which is still above $1131.")

ERROR #952  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    37 (trial 7)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Now let's analyze the cheapest available options for each product
    case class CheapestOption(productId: String, productName: String, currentItemId: String, cheapestItemId: String, currentPrice: Double, cheapestPrice: Double, options: Map[String, String])
    
    val currentOrder = getOrderDetails("#W9348897")
    
    // For each item in the order, find the cheapest available variant
    val cheapestOptions = currentOrder.items.map { item =>
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(item.productId)
      val variants = productDetails.variants.values.toList
      
      // Filter to only available variants
      val availableVariants = variants.filter(_.available)
      
      // Find the cheapest available variant
      val cheapestVariant = availableVariants.minBy(_.price)
      
      CheapestOption(
        productId = item.productId,
        productName = item.name,
        currentItemId = item.itemId,
        cheapestItemId = cheapestVariant.itemId,
        currentPrice = item.price,
        cheapestPrice = cheapestVariant.price,
        options = cheapestVariant.options
      )
    }
    
    println("Current order items and their cheapest available alternatives:")
    println("-" * 80)
    cheapestOptions.foreach { opt =>
      println(s"\n${opt.productName}:")
      println(s"  Current: Item ${opt.currentItemId}, Price: $$${opt.currentPrice}")
      println(s"  Cheapest: Item ${opt.cheapestItemId}, Price: $$${opt.cheapestPrice}")
      println(s"  Options: ${opt.options.map { case (k, v) => s"$k=$v" }.mkString(", ")}")
      println(s"  Savings: $${opt.currentPrice - opt.cheapestPrice}")
    }
    
    val currentTotal = currentOrder.items.map(_.price).sum
    val potentialTotal = cheapestOptions.map(_.cheapestPrice).sum
    val potentialSavings = currentTotal - potentialTotal
    
    println("\n" + "-" * 80)
    println(s"Current total: $$$currentTotal")
    println(s"Potential total with cheapest options: $$$potentialTotal")
    println(s"Potential savings: $$$potentialSavings")
    println(s"Would be under $$$1150: ${potentialTotal < 1150}")
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    46 |println(s"Would be under $$$1150: ${potentialTotal < 1150}")
       |                           ^
       |invalid string interpolation: `$$`, `$"`, `$`ident or `$`BlockExpr expected

    // Now let's analyze the cheapest available options for each product
    case class CheapestOption(productId: String, productName: String, currentItemId: String, cheapestItemId: String, currentPrice: Double, cheapestPrice: Double, options: Map[String, String])
    
    val currentOrder = getOrderDetails("#W9348897")
    
    // For each item in the order, find the cheapest available variant
    val cheapestOptions = currentOrder.items.map { item =>
      val productDetails = getProductDetails(item.productId)
      val variants = productDetails.variants.values.toList

      // Find the cheapest available variant
      val cheapestVariant = availableVariants.minBy(_.price)
      
      CheapestOption(
        productId = item.productId,
        productName = item.name,
        currentItemId = item.itemId,
        cheapestItemId = cheapestVariant.itemId,
        currentPrice = item.price,
        cheapestPrice = cheapestVariant.price,
        options = cheapestVariant.options
      )
    }
    
    println("Current order items and their cheapest available alternatives:")
    println("-" * 80)

    // Let me filter for available Bluetooth speakers under $300
    val variants = productDetails.variants
    println("Available Bluetooth Speakers under $300:")
    println("=" * 50)
    
    var count = 0
    variants.foreach { case (itemId, variant) =>
      if (variant.available && variant.price < 300.0) {
        count += 1
        println(s"${count}. Item ID: $itemId")
        println(s"   Price: $${variant.price}")
        println(s"   Options: ${variant.options}")
        println()
      }
    }

      println("No available Bluetooth speakers under $300 found.")
    } else {

ERROR #977  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    38 (trial 8)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse the product details to find cheapest available variants
    import scala.util.Using
    import java.io.StringReader
    import play.api.libs.json._
    
    // Helper function to parse product details
    def parseProductDetails(productDetails: String): (String, List[(String, Double, Map[String, String])]) = {
      // Extract product name and variants
      val lines = productDetails.split("\n")
      val productName = lines.head.split("\\(")(1).split(",")(0)
      
      // Parse variants - looking for lines with "Variant("
      val variants = lines.filter(_.contains("Variant(")).map { line =>
        val variantPattern = """Variant\((\d+),Map\(([^)]+)\),([^,]+),([^)]+)\)""".r
        line match {
          case variantPattern(itemId, optionsStr, availability, price) =>
            val isAvailable = availability.trim == "true"
            val priceValue = price.trim.toDouble
            val options = optionsStr.split(",").map { opt =>
              val parts = opt.split(" -> ")
              if (parts.length == 2) parts(0).trim -> parts(1).trim
              else "" -> ""
            }.filter(_._1.nonEmpty).toMap
            
            (itemId, priceValue, options, isAvailable)
        }
      }.filter(_._4).map(v => (v._1, v._2, v._3)).toList
      
      (productName, variants)
    }
    
    // Get cheapest variants for each product
    val productDetailsList = List(
      getProductDetails("3377618313"),
      getProductDetails("9743693396"),
      getProductDetails("6817146515"),
      getProductDetails("9523456873"),
      getProductDetails("2524789262")
    )
    
    var totalCheapestPrice = 0.0
    val cheapestVariants = productDetailsList.map { details =>
      val (productName, variants) = parseProductDetails(details)
      if (variants.isEmpty) {
        (productName, None, 0.0)
      } else {
        val cheapest = variants.minBy(_._2)
        totalCheapestPrice += cheapest._2
        (productName, Some(cheapest._1), cheapest._2)
      }
    }
    
    println("Cheapest available variants for each product:")
    println("=" * 50)
    cheapestVariants.foreach { case (productName, itemIdOpt, price) =>
      itemIdOpt match {
        case Some(itemId) => println(f"$productName: Item ID $itemId - $$$price%.2f")
        case None => println(s"$productName: No available variants")
      }
    }
    println("=" * 50)
    println(f"Total with cheapest variants: $$$totalCheapestPrice%.2f")
    println(f"Current order total: $1166.98")
    println(f"Difference: $$${1166.98 - totalCheapestPrice}%.2f")
  --- Error Output ---
    -- Error: ----------------------------------------------------------------------
    63 |println(f"Current order total: $1166.98")
       |                               ^
       |invalid string interpolation: `$$`, `$"`, `$`ident or `$`BlockExpr expected

====================================================================================================
ERROR #978  [COMPILATION]  [E006] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    38 (trial 8)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse the product details to find cheapest available variants
    import scala.util.Using
    import java.io.StringReader
    import play.api.libs.json._
    
    // Helper function to parse product details
    def parseProductDetails(productDetails: String): (String, List[(String, Double, Map[String, String])]) = {
      // Extract product name and variants
      val lines = productDetails.split("\n")
      val productName = lines.head.split("\\(")(1).split(",")(0)
      
      // Parse variants - looking for lines with "Variant("
      val variants = lines.filter(_.contains("Variant(")).map { line =>
        val variantPattern = """Variant\((\d+),Map\(([^)]+)\),([^,]+),([^)]+)\)""".r
        line match {
          case variantPattern(itemId, optionsStr, availability, price) =>
            val isAvailable = availability.trim == "true"
            val priceValue = price.trim.toDouble
            val options = optionsStr.split(",").map { opt =>
              val parts = opt.split(" -> ")
              if (parts.length == 2) parts(0).trim -> parts(1).trim
              else "" -> ""
            }.filter(_._1.nonEmpty).toMap
            
            (itemId, priceValue, options, isAvailable)
        }
      }.filter(_._4).map(v => (v._1, v._2, v._3)).toList
      
      (productName, variants)
    }
    
    // Get cheapest variants for each product
    val productDetailsList = List(
      getProductDetails("3377618313"),
      getProductDetails("9743693396"),
      getProductDetails("6817146515"),
      getProductDetails("9523456873"),
      getProductDetails("2524789262")
    )
    
    var totalCheapestPrice = 0.0
    val cheapestVariants = productDetailsList.map { details =>
      val (productName, variants) = parseProductDetails(details)
      if (variants.isEmpty) {
        (productName, None, 0.0)
      } else {
        val cheapest = variants.minBy(_._2)
        totalCheapestPrice += cheapest._2
        (productName, Some(cheapest._1), cheapest._2)
      }
    }
    
    println("Cheapest available variants for each product:")
    println("=" * 50)
    cheapestVariants.foreach { case (productName, itemIdOpt, price) =>
      itemIdOpt match {
        case Some(itemId) => println(f"$productName: Item ID $itemId - $$$price%.2f")
        case None => println(s"$productName: No available variants")
      }
    }

ERROR #979  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    38 (trial 8)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse product details manually
    def parseProductDetailsSimple(productDetails: String): (String, List[(String, Double, Boolean)]) = {
      val lines = productDetails.split("\n")
      val productName = lines.head.split("\\(")(1).split(",")(0)
      
      val variants = lines.filter(_.contains("Variant(")).map { line =>
        // Extract Variant(id,Map(...),availability,price)
        val pattern = """Variant\((\d+),Map\([^)]+\),([^,]+),([^)]+)\)""".r
        line match {
          case pattern(itemId, availability, price) =>
            val isAvailable = availability.trim == "true"
            val priceValue = price.trim.toDouble
            (itemId, priceValue, isAvailable)
          case _ => ("", 0.0, false)
        }
      }.filter(_._1.nonEmpty).toList
      
      (productName, variants)
    }
    
    // Get cheapest variants for each product
    val productDetailsList = List(
      getProductDetails("3377618313"),
      getProductDetails("9743693396"),
      getProductDetails("6817146515"),
      getProductDetails("9523456873"),
      getProductDetails("2524789262")
    )
    
    var totalCheapestPrice = 0.0
    val cheapestVariants = productDetailsList.map { details =>
      val (productName, variants) = parseProductDetailsSimple(details)
      val availableVariants = variants.filter(_._3)
      if (availableVariants.isEmpty) {
        (productName, None, 0.0)
      } else {
        val cheapest = availableVariants.minBy(_._2)
        totalCheapestPrice += cheapest._2
        (productName, Some(cheapest._1), cheapest._2)
      }
    }
    
    println("Cheapest available variants for each product:")
    println("=" * 50)
    cheapestVariants.foreach { case (productName, itemIdOpt, price) =>
      itemIdOpt match {
        case Some(itemId) => println(f"$productName: Item ID $itemId - $$$price%.2f")
        case None => println(s"$productName: No available variants")
      }
    }
    println("=" * 50)
    println(f"Total with cheapest variants: $$$totalCheapestPrice%.2f")
    println(f"Current order total: $$${1166.98}%.2f")
    println(f"Difference: $$${1166.98 - totalCheapestPrice}%.2f")
    println(f"Your budget: $$${950.00}%.2f")
    println(f"Would be over budget by: $$${totalCheapestPrice - 950.00}%.2f")
  --- Error Output ---

ERROR #993  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    deepseek-v3.2_scala_retail.json
  Task:    36 (trial 9)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Parse the product details to find cheapest available variants
    case class CheapestVariant(productId: String, currentItemId: String, cheapestItemId: String, currentPrice: Double, cheapestPrice: Double)
    
    val orderItems = List(
      ("Action Camera", "3377618313", "6117189161", 481.5),
      ("Patio Umbrella", "9743693396", "9879255677", 288.82),
      ("Desk Lamp", "6817146515", "7453605304", 150.01),
      ("T-Shirt", "9523456873", "3799046073", 53.27),
      ("Backpack", "2524789262", "9851293632", 193.38)
    )
    
    val cheapestVariants = orderItems.map { case (name, productId, currentItemId, currentPrice) =>
      val product = productDetails.find(_._1 == productId).get._2
      val availableVariants = product.variants.filter { case (_, variant) => variant.available }
      val cheapestVariant = availableVariants.values.minBy(_.price)
      
      CheapestVariant(productId, currentItemId, cheapestVariant.itemId, currentPrice, cheapestVariant.price)
    }
    
    println("Current items and cheapest available alternatives:")
    println("-" * 80)
    cheapestVariants.foreach { cv =>
      println(s"Product: ${orderItems.find(_._2 == cv.productId).get._1}")
      println(s"  Current item: ${cv.currentItemId} - Price: $$${cv.currentPrice}")
      println(s"  Cheapest available: ${cv.cheapestItemId} - Price: $$${cv.cheapestPrice}")
      println(s"  Savings: $${cv.currentPrice - cv.cheapestPrice}")
      println()
    }
    
    val currentTotal = orderItems.map(_._4).sum
    val newTotal = cheapestVariants.map(_.cheapestPrice).sum
    val totalSavings = currentTotal - newTotal
    
    println(s"Current total: $$$currentTotal")
    println(s"New total with cheapest variants: $$$newTotal")
    println(s"Total savings: $$$totalSavings")
    println(s"Your credit limit: $$$1131")
    println(s"Difference: $${1131 - newTotal}")

       |                               ^

      println(s"Product: ${orderItems.find(_._2 == cv.productId).get._1}")
      println(s"  Current item: ${cv.currentItemId} - Price: $${cv.currentPrice}")
      println(s"  Cheapest available: ${cv.cheapestItemId} - Price: $${cv.cheapestPrice}")
      println(s"  Savings: $${cv.currentPrice - cv.cheapestPrice}")
      println()
    }
    
    val currentTotal = orderItems.map(_._4).sum
    val newTotal = cheapestVariants.map(_.cheapestPrice).sum
    val totalSavings = currentTotal - newTotal
    
    println(s"Current total: $${currentTotal}")
    println(s"New total with cheapest variants: $${newTotal}")
    println(s"Total savings: $${totalSavings}")
    println(s"Your credit limit: $1131")
    println(s"Difference: $${1131 - newTotal}")
  --- Error Output ---

       |                             ^
       |invalid string interpolation: `$$`, `$"`, `$`ident or `$`BlockExpr expected

    // Let's check all orders for grill purchases
    val allOrders = List("#W8367380", "#W8668939", "#W6272294", "#W1242543", "#W9232383", "#W9892465")
    var grillTotal = 0.0
    
    for (orderId <- allOrders) {
      val orderDetails = getOrderDetails(orderId)
      // Parse the order details to find grills
      if (orderDetails.contains("Grill")) {
        // Extract grill items and their prices
        val lines = orderDetails.split("\n")
        for (line <- lines) {
          if (line.contains("Grill")) {
            // Extract price - looking for pattern like "985.66" after "Grill"
            val pricePattern = """\d+\.\d+""".r
            val prices = pricePattern.findAllIn(line).toList
            if (prices.nonEmpty) {
              grillTotal += prices.last.toDouble
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Total price for all grills purchased: $$${grillTotal}")
    println(s"Number of grill items found: ${grillTotal / 985.66}") // Rough count based on known price

    val productDetails = getProductDetails("8024098596")
    // Parse the product details to find the cheapest available variant
    println("Analyzing tablet variants to find the cheapest available option...")
    
    // Extract variant information
    val variantsText = productDetails.toString()
    // Find all variant entries and their prices
    val pattern = """Variant\((\d+),Map\([^)]+\),([^,]+),([\d.]+)\)""".r
    val variants = pattern.findAllIn(variantsText).toList
    
    // Create a list of (itemId, availability, price)
    val variantList = variants.map { v =>
      val pattern(itemId, availabilityStr, priceStr) = v
      val available = availabilityStr.trim == "true"
      val price = priceStr.toDouble
      (itemId, available, price)
    }
    
    // Filter for available variants and find the cheapest
    val availableVariants = variantList.filter(_._2)
    val cheapestVariant = availableVariants.minBy(_._3)
    
    println(s"Total variants found: ${variantList.size}")
    println(s"Available variants: ${availableVariants.size}")
    println(s"Current tablet in order: itemId=6501071631, price=1018.68")

    import scala.util.parsing.json.JSON
    
    val productListStr = listAllProductTypes()
    println(s"Product list: $productListStr")
    // Parse JSON mapping name to id
    val productMapOpt = JSON.parseFull(productListStr).asInstanceOf[Option[Map[String, String]]]
    val productMap = productMapOpt.getOrElse(Map())
    // Find t-shirt product id (case-insensitive match)
    val tshirtEntry = productMap.find { case (name, _) => name.toLowerCase.contains("t-shirt") || name.toLowerCase.contains("tshirt") }
    val tshirtId = tshirtEntry.map(_._2).getOrElse("")
    println(s"T-shirt product id: $tshirtId")
    if (tshirtId.nonEmpty) {
      val detailsStr = getProductDetails(tshirtId)
      println(s"Details: $detailsStr")
      val detailsOpt = JSON.parseFull(detailsStr).asInstanceOf[Option[Map[String, Any]]]
      val details = detailsOpt.getOrElse(Map())
      val variants = details.get("variants").collect { case list: List[Map[String, Any]] => list }.getOrElse(List())
      println(s"Number of variants: ${variants.size}")
    } else {
      println("T-shirt product not found")

    import scala.collection.JavaConverters._
    
    def getPremiumVariant(productId: String): (String, Double) = {
      val prodStr = getProductDetails(productId)
      // prodStr is like Product(Name,productId,HashMap(...))
      // We can parse using regex to extract variant map entries.
      // Simpler: use the API? Not available. We'll parse manually.
      val pattern = "(\d+) -> Variant\((\d+),Map\([^)]*\),(true|false),(\d+\.\d+)\)".r
      val matches = pattern.findAllMatchIn(prodStr).toList
      // Filter available true
      val available = matches.filter(m => m.group(3) == "true")
      // Find max price
      val max = available.maxBy(m => m.group(4).toDouble)
      (max.group(2), max.group(4).toDouble)
    }
    
    val items = List(
      ("8310926033", "2366567022"), // Water Bottle
      ("1656367028", "1340995114"), // Mechanical Keyboard
      ("6938111410", "9791469541"), // Running Shoes
      ("5149340237", "1763705424")  // Makeup Kit
    )
    
    val premiumMap = items.map{ case (pid, curItem) =>
      val (newItemId, price) = getPremiumVariant(pid)
      (curItem, newItemId, price)
    }
    println(premiumMap)
  --- Error Output ---

ERROR #1025  [COMPILATION]  [E007] Type Mismatch Error:
  File:    gpt-oss-120b_retail_scala.json
  Task:    20 (trial 2)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getPremiumVariant(productId: String): (String, Double) = {
      val prodStr = getProductDetails(productId)
      // Regex to capture: itemId -> Variant(itemId,Map(...),true,price)
      val pattern: Regex = raw"""(\d+) -> Variant\((\d+),Map\([^)]*\),(true|false),(\d+\.\d+)\)""".r
      val matches = pattern.findAllMatchIn(prodStr).toList
      val available = matches.filter(m => m.group(3) == "true")
      if (available.isEmpty) throw new RuntimeException("No available variants")
      val max = available.maxBy(m => m.group(4).toDouble)
      (max.group(2), max.group(4).toDouble)
    }
    
    val items = List(
      ("8310926033", "2366567022"), // Water Bottle current item id
      ("1656367028", "1340995114"), // Mechanical Keyboard current item id
      ("6938111410", "9791469541"), // Running Shoes current item id
      ("5149340237", "1763705424")  // Makeup Kit current item id
    )
    
    val premiumMap = items.map{ case (pid, curItem) =>
      val (newItemId, price) = getPremiumVariant(pid)
      (curItem, newItemId, price)
    }
    println(premiumMap)
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E007] Type Mismatch Error: -------------------------------------------------
    8 |  val matches = pattern.findAllMatchIn(prodStr).toList
      |                                       ^^^^^^^
      |                       Found:    (prodStr : library.facade.retail.Product)
      |                       Required: CharSequence
      |
      | longer explanation available when compiling with `-explain`
    1 error found

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getPremiumVariant(productId: String): (String, Double) = {
      val prodStr = getProductDetails(productId).toString
      val pattern: Regex = raw"""(\d+) -> Variant\((\d+),Map\([^)]*\),(true|false),(\d+\.\d+)\)""".r
      val matches = pattern.findAllMatchIn(prodStr).toList
      val available = matches.filter(m => m.group(3) == "true")
      if (available.isEmpty) throw new RuntimeException("No available variants for " + productId)
      val max = available.maxBy(m => m.group(4).toDouble)
      (max.group(2), max.group(4).toDouble)
    }
    
    val items = List(
      ("8310926033", "2366567022"), // Water Bottle current item id
      ("1656367028", "1340995114"), // Mechanical Keyboard current item id
      ("6938111410", "9791469541"), // Running Shoes current item id
      ("5149340237", "1763705424")  // Makeup Kit current item id
    )
    
    val premiumMap = items.map{ case (pid, curItem) =>
      val (newItemId, price) = getPremiumVariant(pid)
      (curItem, newItemId, price)
    }
    println(premiumMap)
  --- Error Output ---

       |                                 ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

    def getTopVariant(productId: String): (String, Double) = {
      val product = getProductDetails(productId)
      // product.variants is java.util.HashMap[String, Variant]

    import scala.collection.JavaConverters._
    
    def findItemInOrders(itemId: String): Option[(String, String)] = {
      val orderIds = List("#W4967593", "#W9911714", "#W5733668")
      for (oid <- orderIds) {
        val order = getOrderDetails(oid)
        // order is Order case class with .items list
        val items = order.items
        for (it <- items) {
          if (it.itemId == itemId) return Some((oid, it.productName))
        }
      }
      None
    }

ERROR #1066  [RUNTIME]  java.lang.NumberFormatException
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala_trial2.json

    import scala.util.{Try, Success, Failure}
    
    // Helper to parse time HH:MM:SS to seconds
    def timeToSeconds(t: String): Int = {
      val parts = t.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      parts(0)*3600 + parts(1)*60 + parts(2)
    }
    
    def durationInHours(dep: String, arr: String): Double = {
      val d = timeToSeconds(dep)
      val a = timeToSeconds(arr)
      // assume same day, if arrival earlier, add 24h
      val diff = if (a >= d) a - d else a - d + 24*3600
      diff / 3600.0
    }
    
    val userId = "sophia_silva_7557"
    val user = getUserDetails(userId)
    
    val reservationSummaries = user.reservations.map { resId =>
      val res = getReservationDetails(resId)
      // For each flight, find matching DirectFlight
      val flightInfos = res.flights.map { f =>
        // search direct flights for that date
        val directFlights = searchDirectFlight(f.origin, f.destination, f.date)
        // find flight with matching flightNumber
        val maybeDirect = directFlights.find(_.flightNumber == f.flightNumber)
        maybeDirect match {
          case Some(df) =>
            val dur = durationInHours(df.scheduledDepartureTimeEst, df.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
            // price for current cabin
            val cabinKey = res.cabin match {
              case "business" => "business"
              case "economy" => "economy"
              case "basic_economy" => "basic_economy"
            }
            val currentPrice = df.prices.getOrElse(cabinKey, 0)
            val businessPrice = df.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
            val upgradeCost = if (res.cabin != "business") businessPrice - currentPrice else 0
            (f, dur, upgradeCost, df)
          case None =>
            // flight not found in search, return placeholder
            (f, -1.0, 0, null)
        }
      }
      // Separate flights
      val toCancel = flightInfos.filter{ case (_, dur, _, _) => dur > 4.0 }
      val toUpgrade = flightInfos.filter{ case (_, dur, _, _) => dur <= 3.0 && dur >= 0 && res.cabin != "business" }
      val totalUpgradeCost = toUpgrade.map(_._3).sum
      (
        resId,
        toCancel.map(_._1.flightNumber),
        toUpgrade.map(_._1.flightNumber),
        totalUpgradeCost
      )
    }
    
    // Build summary string
    val summary = reservationSummaries.map { case (resId, cancelList, upgradeList, upgradeCost) =>
      s"Reservation $resId:\n" +
      (if (cancelList.nonEmpty) s"  Flights to cancel (duration >4h): ${cancelList.mkString(", ")}" else "  No flights to cancel.") + "\n" +
      (if (upgradeList.nonEmpty) s"  Flights to upgrade (duration <=3h): ${upgradeList.mkString(", ")} (Total upgrade cost: $$${upgradeCost})" else "  No flights eligible for upgrade.")
    }.mkString("\n\n")
    
    println(summary)

ERROR #1067  [RUNTIME]  java.lang.NumberFormatException
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala_trial2.json
  Task:    44 (trial 2)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.{Try, Success, Failure}
    
    def timeToSeconds(t: String): Int = {
      val parts = t.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      parts(0)*3600 + parts(1)*60 + parts(2)
    }
    
    def durationInHours(dep: String, arr: String): Double = {
      val d = timeToSeconds(dep)
      val a = timeToSeconds(arr)
      val diff = if (a >= d) a - d else a - d + 24*3600
      diff / 3600.0
    }
    
    val userId = "sophia_silva_7557"
    val user = getUserDetails(userId)
    
    case class FlightDecision(
      flightNumber: String,
      origin: String,
      destination: String,
      date: String,
      duration: Double,
      currentCabin: String,
      canUpgrade: Boolean,
      upgradeCost: Int
    )
    
    val allSummaries = user.reservations.map { resId =>
      val res = getReservationDetails(resId)
      val cabin = res.cabin // current cabin for reservation
      val decisions = res.flights.map { f =>
        // search direct flight info
        val directList = searchDirectFlight(f.origin, f.destination, f.date)
        val directOpt = directList.find(_.flightNumber == f.flightNumber)
        directOpt match {
          case Some(df) =>
            val dur = durationInHours(df.scheduledDepartureTimeEst, df.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
            // price for current cabin
            val priceCurrent = df.prices.getOrElse(cabin, 0)
            val priceBusiness = df.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
            val upgradeCost = if (cabin != "business") priceBusiness - priceCurrent else 0
            val canUpgrade = df.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0) > 0 && cabin != "business"
            FlightDecision(f.flightNumber, f.origin, f.destination, f.date, dur, cabin, canUpgrade, upgradeCost)
          case None =>
            // If flight not found, set duration -1
            FlightDecision(f.flightNumber, f.origin, f.destination, f.date, -1.0, cabin, false, 0)
        }
      }
      // Determine which flights to cancel and which to upgrade
      val toCancel = decisions.filter(d => d.duration > 4.0).map(_.flightNumber)
      val toUpgrade = decisions.filter(d => d.duration >= 0 && d.duration <= 3.0 && d.canUpgrade).map(d => (d.flightNumber, d.upgradeCost))
      val totalUpgradeCost = toUpgrade.map(_._2).sum
      (resId, toCancel, toUpgrade.map(_._1), totalUpgradeCost)
    }
    
    // Build readable summary
    val summaryStr = allSummaries.map { case (resId, cancelList, upgradeList, upgradeCost) =>
      s"Reservation $resId:\n" +
        (if (cancelList.nonEmpty) s"  Flights to cancel (>4h): ${cancelList.mkString(", ")}" else "  No flights to cancel.") + "\n" +
        (if (upgradeList.nonEmpty) s"  Flights to upgrade (<=3h): ${upgradeList.mkString(", ")} (Total upgrade cost: $$${upgradeCost})" else "  No flights eligible for upgrade.")
    }.mkString("\n\n")
    
    println(summaryStr)

ERROR #1083  [COMPILATION]  [E086] Syntax Error:
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala_trial2.json
  Task:    44 (trial 5)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.collection.mutable.{ArrayBuffer, ListBuffer}
    
    // Helper to parse time strings HH:MM:SS to seconds
    def timeToSeconds(t: String): Int = {
      val parts = t.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      parts(0)*3600 + parts(1)*60 + parts(2)
    }
    
    def durationHours(dep: String, arr: String): Double = {
      val d = timeToSeconds(dep)
      val a = timeToSeconds(arr)
      // handle arrival next day? assume same day for simplicity
      val diff = if (a >= d) a - d else (24*3600 - d) + a
      diff / 3600.0
    }
    
    val userId = "sophia_silva_7557"
    val user = getUserDetails(userId)
    println(s"User: ${user.userId}, reservations: ${user.reservations}")
    
    case class FlightInfoDetail(reservationId: String, flight: ReservationFlight, durationHours: Double, isFuture: Boolean)
    
    val today = java.time.LocalDate.parse("2026-02-17")
    
    val allFlightDetails = new ListBuffer[FlightInfoDetail]()
    
    for (resId <- user.reservations) {
      val res = getReservationDetails(resId)
      for (flight <- res.flights) {
        val flightDate = java.time.LocalDate.parse(flight.date)
        val isFuture = flightDate.isAfter(today)
        // search direct flights for this origin/destination/date
        val directFlights = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
        // find matching flight number
        val matchOpt = directFlights.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
        matchOpt match {
          case Some(df) =>
            val dur = durationHours(df.scheduledDepartureTimeEst, df.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
            allFlightDetails += FlightInfoDetail(resId, flight, dur, isFuture)
          case None =>
            // If not found, we cannot compute duration, set -1
            allFlightDetails += FlightInfoDetail(resId, flight, -1.0, isFuture)
        }
      }
    }
    
    println("Collected flight details:")
    allFlightDetails.foreach { f =>
      println(s"Res ${f.reservationId}, Flight ${f.flight.flightNumber} on ${f.flight.date}, duration ${f.durationHours}, future ${f.isFuture}")
    }
    
    // Determine reservations to cancel (any future flight >4h)
    val cancelResIds = new ArrayBuffer[String]()
    val upgradeCandidates = new ArrayBuffer[String]() // reservation ids eligible for upgrade
    
    for (resId <- user.reservations) {
      val flights = allFlightDetails.filter(_.reservationId == resId && _.isFuture)
      if (flights.exists(_.durationHours > 4.0)) {
        cancelResIds += resId
      } else if (flights.nonEmpty && flights.forall(_.durationHours <= 3.0 && _.durationHours >= 0)) {
        // all future flights <=3h and duration known
        upgradeCandidates += resId
      }
    }
    
    println(s"Reservations to cancel: ${cancelResIds.mkString(", ")}")
    println(s"Reservations eligible for upgrade: ${upgradeCandidates.mkString(", ")}")
    
    // Compute upgrade cost for each candidate reservation
    case class UpgradeCost(reservationId: String, cost: Int)
    val upgradeCosts = new ListBuffer[UpgradeCost]()
    
    for (resId <- upgradeCandidates) {
      val res = getReservationDetails(resId)
      var totalDiff = 0
      var canUpgrade = true
      for (flight <- res.flights) {
        // get direct flight info for price
        val dfList = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
        val dfOpt = dfList.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
        dfOpt match {
          case Some(df) =>
            val currentPrice = df.prices.get(res.cabin) // cabin string matches keys?
            val businessPrice = df.prices.get("business")
            (currentPrice, businessPrice) match {
              case (Some(cp), Some(bp)) =>
                if (bp > cp) totalDiff += (bp - cp)
              case _ => canUpgrade = false // price info missing
            }
          case None => canUpgrade = false
        }
      }
      if (canUpgrade) {
        upgradeCosts += UpgradeCost(resId, totalDiff)
      } else {
        // cannot compute upgrade cost, skip
      }
    }
    
    println("Upgrade costs per reservation:")
    upgradeCosts.foreach { u => println(s"Res ${u.reservationId}: $${u.cost}") }
    
    val totalUpgradeCost = upgradeCosts.map(_.cost).sum
    println(s"Total upgrade cost: $${totalUpgradeCost}")

ERROR #1091  [RUNTIME]  java.lang.NumberFormatException
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala_trial2.json
  Task:    44 (trial 6)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.collection.mutable.ListBuffer
    
    val userId = "sophia_silva_7557"
    val user = getUserDetails(userId)
    
    case class FlightUpgradeInfo(reservationId: String, flight: ReservationFlight, durationHours: Double, currentCabin: String, canUpgrade: Boolean, priceDiff: Int)
    
    val upgrades = ListBuffer[FlightUpgradeInfo]()
    val cancellations = ListBuffer[String]()
    
    for (resId <- user.reservations) {
      val res = getReservationDetails(resId)
      // Determine if any flight >4h
      var hasLongFlight = false
      for (flight <- res.flights) {
        // search direct flight
        val directFlights = searchDirectFlight(flight.origin, flight.destination, flight.date)
        // find matching flightNumber
        val matchOpt = directFlights.find(_.flightNumber == flight.flightNumber)
        matchOpt.foreach { df =>
          // parse times HH:MM:SS
          def toSeconds(t: String): Int = {
            val parts = t.split(":").map(_.toInt)
            parts(0)*3600 + parts(1)*60 + parts(2)
          }
          val dep = toSeconds(df.scheduledDepartureTimeEst)
          val arr = toSeconds(df.scheduledArrivalTimeEst)
          val durationSec = if (arr >= dep) arr - dep else (24*3600 - dep) + arr // handle overnight
          val durationHours = durationSec / 3600.0
          if (durationHours > 4.0) hasLongFlight = true
          // For potential upgrades (<=3h)
          if (durationHours <= 3.0) {
            // check if can upgrade to business
            val currentCabin = res.cabin // reservation cabin
            if (currentCabin != "business") {
              // check availability of business seats
              val businessSeats = df.availableSeats.getOrElse("business", 0)
              if (businessSeats > 0) {
                val priceCurrent = df.prices.getOrElse(currentCabin, 0)
                val priceBusiness = df.prices.getOrElse("business", 0)
                val diff = priceBusiness - priceCurrent
                if (diff > 0) {
                  upgrades += FlightUpgradeInfo(resId, flight, durationHours, currentCabin, true, diff)
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
      if (hasLongFlight) cancellations += resId
    }
    
    println(s"Cancellations: ${cancellations.toList}")
    println(s"Potential upgrades: ${upgrades.toList}")
    
    val totalUpgradeCost = upgrades.map(_.priceDiff).sum
    println(s"Total upgrade cost: $totalUpgradeCost")
  --- Error Output ---

ERROR #1103  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala_trial2.json
  Task:    35 (trial 6)
  --- Scala Code ---
    val date = "2026-05-24"
    val directOAK = searchDirectFlight("JFK","OAK",date)
    val directSJC = searchDirectFlight("JFK","SJC",date)
    println(s"Direct OAK: ${directOAK.size}")
    println(s"Direct SJC: ${directSJC.size}")
    
    def collectOneStop(origin: String, dest: String, date: String): List[(String, Int, List[DirectFlight])] = {
      val pairs = searchOnestopFlight(origin, dest, date)
      pairs.map { pair =>
        val leg1 = pair(0)
        val leg2 = pair(1)
        val price1 = leg1.prices.getOrElse("economy", -1)
        val price2 = leg2.prices.getOrElse("economy", -1)
        val total = if (price1>=0 && price2>=0) price1+price2 else -1
        (s"${leg1.flightNumber}+${leg2.flightNumber}", total, pair)
      }
    }
    val oneStopOAK = collectOneStop("JFK","OAK",date)
    val oneStopSJC = collectOneStop("JFK","SJC",date)
    println(s"One-stop OAK: ${oneStopOAK.size}")
    println(s"One-stop SJC: ${oneStopSJC.size}")
    
    // Combine all itineraries with total price and details
    case class Itinerary(total:Int, legs:List[DirectFlight])
    val itinerariesOAK = (
      directOAK.filter(f=>f.prices.getOrElse("economy", -1)>=0).map(f=>Itinerary(f.prices("economy"), List(f))) ++
      oneStopOAK.filter(_._2>=0).map{case(_,total,legs)=>Itinerary(total, legs)}
    
    val itinerariesSJC = (
      directSJC.filter(f=>f.prices.getOrElse("economy", -1)>=0).map(f=>Itinerary(f.prices("economy"), List(f))) ++
      oneStopSJC.filter(_._2>=0).map{case(_,total,legs)=>Itinerary(total, legs)}
    
    println(s"Total itineraries OAK: ${itinerariesOAK.size}")
    println(s"Total itineraries SJC: ${itinerariesSJC.size}")
    
    // sort and get second cheapest if exists
    val sortedOAK = itinerariesOAK.sortBy(_.total)
    val sortedSJC = itinerariesSJC.sortBy(_.total)
    println("--- OAK sorted---")
    sortedOAK.foreach(i=>println(s"total=${i.total}, legs=${i.legs.map(_.flightNumber).mkString(",")}"))
    println("--- SJC sorted---")
    sortedSJC.foreach(i=>println(s"total=${i.total}, legs=${i.legs.map(_.flightNumber).mkString(",")}"))
  --- Error Output ---

    29 |val itinerariesSJC = (
       |^^^
       |')' expected, but 'val' found

    import scala.util.parsing.json.JSON
    
    def getEconomyPrice(fn: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String): Int = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, date)
      // parse JSON to find price for this flight number
      // The result may contain multiple flight objects; we need to find the one with matching flight_number
      val jsonList = JSON.parseFull(res).get.asInstanceOf[List[Map[String, Any]]]
      val flight = jsonList.find(m => m("flight_number").asInstanceOf[String] == fn).get
      flight("prices").asInstanceOf[Map[String, Double]]("economy").toInt
    }

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getEconomyPrice(fn: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String): Int = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, date)
      // pattern to match flight block containing the flight_number
      val flightPattern = new Regex(s"\\{[^}]*\\"flight_number\\": \\"$fn\\"[^}]*\\}")
      val flightBlockOpt = flightPattern.findFirstIn(res)
      flightBlockOpt match {
        case Some(block) =>
          // find economy price
          val econPattern = new Regex("\\"economy\\":\\s*(\\d+)")
          econPattern.findFirstMatchIn(block) match {
            case Some(m) => m.group(1).toInt
            case None => throw new RuntimeException(s"Economy price not found for $fn")
          }
        case None => throw new RuntimeException(s"Flight $fn not found in search result")
      }
    }

ERROR #1109  [RUNTIME]  java.lang.NumberFormatException
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala.json
  Task:    18 (trial 0)
  --- Scala Code ---
    def getEconomyPrice(fn: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String): Int = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, date)
      // locate the flight block containing the flight number
      val fnIdx = res.indexOf(s"\"flight_number\": \"$fn\"")
      if (fnIdx == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Flight $fn not found")
      // from fnIdx, find the next occurrence of "economy":
      val econIdx = res.indexOf("\"economy\":", fnIdx)
      if (econIdx == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Economy price not found for $fn")
      // after colon, extract number
      val afterColon = res.substring(econIdx + "\"economy\":".length)
      // trim spaces and commas
      val numStr = afterColon.takeWhile(ch => ch.isDigit)
      numStr.toInt
    }
    
    val flightData = List(
      ("HAT028","MCO","BOS","2024-05-21"),
      ("HAT277","BOS","CLT","2024-05-21"),
      ("HAT080","DEN","PHL","2024-05-28"),
      ("HAT076","PHL","DEN","2024-05-28"),
      ("HAT255","DEN","MIA","2024-05-30"),

ERROR #1110  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala.json
  Task:    18 (trial 0)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    // Helper to get flight numbers and dates from reservation JSON
    case class FlightInfoSimple(fn: String, date: String, price: Int)
    
    def parseReservation(resJson: String): (String, List[FlightInfoSimple]) = {
      // extract reservation_id
      val idPattern = new Regex("\\"reservation_id\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\"")
      val id = idPattern.findFirstMatchIn(resJson).get.group(1)
      // find all flight objects
      val flightPattern = new Regex("\\{[^}]*\\"flight_number\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",[^}]*\\"date\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",[^}]*\\"price\\": (\\d+)[^}]*\\}")
      val flights = flightPattern.findAllMatchIn(resJson).map(m => FlightInfoSimple(m.group(1), m.group(2), m.group(3).toInt)).toList
      (id, flights)
    }
    
    def getEconomyPrice(fn: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String): Int = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, date)
      // locate the block for this flight number
      val fnIdx = res.indexOf(s"\\"flight_number\\": \\"$fn\\"")
      if (fnIdx == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Flight $fn not found in search result")
      val econIdx = res.indexOf("\\"economy\\":", fnIdx)
      if (econIdx == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Economy price not found for $fn")
      // after colon, skip non-digits
      var i = econIdx + "\\"economy\\":".length
      while (i < res.length && !res.charAt(i).isDigit) i += 1
      val sb = new StringBuilder
      while (i < res.length && res.charAt(i).isDigit) { sb.append(res.charAt(i)); i += 1 }
      sb.toString.toInt
    }
    
    // Map of flight number to origin/destination (we can infer from reservation flight data)
    // We'll extract from reservation JSON as well.
    
    def extractOriginDest(resJson: String, fn: String): (String, String) = {
      val pattern = new Regex(s"\\"flight_number\\": \\"$fn\\",\\s*\\"origin\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"destination\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\"")
      val m = pattern.findFirstMatchIn(resJson).get
      (m.group(1), m.group(2))
    }
    
    val reservationIds = List("JG7FMM","2FBBAH","X7BYG1","EQ1G6C","BOH180")
    var totalSavings = 0
    var details = List.empty[String]
    
    for (resId <- reservationIds) {
      val resJson = getReservationDetails(resId)
      val (id, flights) = parseReservation(resJson)
      val originalTotal = flights.map(_.price).sum
      var newTotal = 0
      for (f <- flights) {
        val (orig, dest) = extractOriginDest(resJson, f.fn)
        val econPrice = getEconomyPrice(f.fn, orig, dest, f.date)
        newTotal += econPrice
      }
      val saved = originalTotal - newTotal
      totalSavings += saved
      details = details :+ s"Reservation $id: original $$${originalTotal}, new $$${newTotal}, saved $$${saved}"
    }
    
    println(details.mkString("\n"))
    println(s"Total savings across all reservations: $$${totalSavings}")
  --- Error Output ---

      |                                                                  ^

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    case class FlightInfoRec(fn: String, date: String, price: Int, orig: String, dest: String)
    
    def parseReservation(resJson: String): List[FlightInfoRec] = {
      // regex to capture flight_number, origin, destination, date, price
      val pattern = new Regex("""\\{"flight_number": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"origin\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"destination\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"date\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",[^}]*\\"price\\": (\\d+)""")

        FlightInfoRec(m.group(1), m.group(4), m.group(5).toInt, m.group(2), m.group(3))
      }.toList
    }

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    case class FlightInfoRec(fn: String, date: String, price: Int, orig: String, dest: String)
    
    def parseReservation(resJson: String): List[FlightInfoRec] = {
      val pattern = new Regex("""\\{"flight_number\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"origin\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"destination\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"date\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",[^}]*\\"price\": (\\d+)""")
      pattern.findAllMatchIn(resJson).map { m =>
        val fn = m.group(1)
        val orig = m.group(2)
        val dest = m.group(3)
        val date = m.group(4)
        val priceStr = m.group(5)
        FlightInfoRec(fn, date, priceStr.toString.toInt, orig, dest)
      }.toList
    }
    
    def getEconomyPrice(fn: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String): Int = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, date)

      if (econPos == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Economy price not found for $fn")

      while (i < res.length && !res.charAt(i).isDigit) i += 1
      val sb = new StringBuilder
      while (i < res.length && res.charAt(i).isDigit) { sb.append(res.charAt(i)); i += 1 }
      sb.toString.toInt
    }

      val resJson = getReservationDetails(resId)

      val originalTotal = flights.map(_.price).sum
      var newTotal = 0
      for (f <- flights) {

  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    case class FlightInfoRec(fn: String, date: String, price: Int, orig: String, dest: String)
    
    def parseReservation(resJson: String): List[FlightInfoRec] = {
      val pattern = new Regex("""\\{"flight_number\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"origin\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"destination\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",\\s*\\"date\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\",[^}]*\\"price\": (\\d+)""")
      pattern.findAllMatchIn(resJson).map { m =>
        FlightInfoRec(m.group(1), m.group(4), m.group(5).toInt, m.group(2), m.group(3))
      }.toList
    }
    
    def getEconomyPrice(fn: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String): Int = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, date)
      // locate flight block
      val fnPos = res.indexOf(s"\"flight_number\": \"$fn\"")
      if (fnPos == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Flight $fn not found")
      // locate prices block after fnPos
      val pricesPos = res.indexOf("\"prices\":", fnPos)
      if (pricesPos == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Prices block not found for $fn")
      // locate economy price after pricesPos
      val econPos = res.indexOf("\"economy\":", pricesPos)
      if (econPos == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Economy price not found for $fn")
      var i = econPos + "\"economy\":".length
      while (i < res.length && !res.charAt(i).isDigit) i += 1
      val sb = new StringBuilder
      while (i < res.length && res.charAt(i).isDigit) { sb.append(res.charAt(i)); i += 1 }
      sb.toString.toInt
    }
    
    val reservationIds = List("JG7FMM","2FBBAH","X7BYG1","EQ1G6C","BOH180")
    var totalSavings = 0
    var reportLines = List.empty[String]
    
    for (resId <- reservationIds) {
      val resJson = getReservationDetails(resId)
      val flights = parseReservation(resJson)
      val originalTotal = flights.map(_.price).sum
      var newTotal = 0
      for (f <- flights) {
        val econPrice = getEconomyPrice(f.fn, f.orig, f.dest, f.date)
        newTotal += econPrice
      }
      val saved = originalTotal - newTotal
      totalSavings += saved
      reportLines = reportLines :+ s"Reservation $resId: original $$${originalTotal}, economy $$${newTotal}, saved $$${saved}"
    }
    
    println(reportLines.mkString("\n"))
    println(s"Total savings across all reservations: $$${totalSavings}")
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E008] Not Found Error: -----------------------------------------------------
    8 |    FlightInfoRec(m.group(1), m.group(4), m.group(5).toInt, m.group(2), m.group(3))
