ERROR #1114  [COMPILATION]  generic -- Error
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala.json
  Task:    18 (trial 0)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    case class FlightInfoRec(fn: String, date: String, price: Int, orig: String, dest: String)
    
    def extractFlights(json: String): List[FlightInfoRec] = {
      val fnPattern = "\\"flight_number\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\"".r
      val originPattern = "\\"origin\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\"".r
      val destPattern = "\\"destination\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\"".r
      val datePattern = "\\"date\\": \\"([^\\"]+)\\"".r
      val pricePattern = "\\"price\\": (\\d+)".r
    
      fnPattern.findAllMatchIn(json).toList.map { m =>
        val fn = m.group(1)
        val after = json.substring(m.end)
        val orig = originPattern.findFirstMatchIn(after).get.group(1)
        val dest = destPattern.findFirstMatchIn(after).get.group(1)
        val date = datePattern.findFirstMatchIn(after).get.group(1)
        val price = pricePattern.findFirstMatchIn(after).get.group(1).toInt
        FlightInfoRec(fn, date, price, orig, dest)
      }
    }
    
    def getEconomyPrice(fn: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String): Int = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, date)
      val fnPos = res.indexOf(s"\\\"flight_number\\\": \\"$fn\\\"")
      if (fnPos == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Flight $fn not found")
      val pricesPos = res.indexOf("\\\"prices\\\":", fnPos)
      if (pricesPos == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Prices block not found for $fn")
      val econPos = res.indexOf("\\\"economy\\\":", pricesPos)
      if (econPos == -1) throw new RuntimeException(s"Economy price not found for $fn")
      var i = econPos + "\\\"economy\\\":".length
      while (i < res.length && !res.charAt(i).isDigit) i += 1
      val sb = new StringBuilder
      while (i < res.length && res.charAt(i).isDigit) { sb.append(res.charAt(i)); i += 1 }
      sb.toString.toInt
    }
    
    val reservationIds = List("JG7FMM","2FBBAH","X7BYG1","EQ1G6C","BOH180")
    var totalSavings = 0
    var reportLines = List.empty[String]
    
    for (resId <- reservationIds) {
      val json = getReservationDetails(resId)
      val flights = extractFlights(json)
      val originalTotal = flights.map(_.price).sum
      var newTotal = 0
      for (f <- flights) {
        val econPrice = getEconomyPrice(f.fn, f.orig, f.dest, f.date)
        newTotal += econPrice
      }
      val saved = originalTotal - newTotal
      totalSavings += saved
      reportLines = reportLines :+ s"Reservation $resId: original $$${originalTotal}, economy $$${newTotal}, saved $$${saved}"
    }
    
    println(reportLines.mkString("\n"))
    println(s"Total savings across all reservations: $$${totalSavings}")
  --- Error Output ---

  --- Scala Code ---
    val origins = List("JFK", "EWR")
    val destinations = List("SFO", "LAX", "SEA")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    
    case class FlightInfoSimple(flightNumber: String, price: Int, origin: String, destination: String, date: String)
    
    def parseFlights(jsonStr: String): List[FlightInfoSimple] = {
      // Very naive parsing assuming format: [{"flight_number":"...","price":...},...]
      import scala.util.parsing.json.JSON
      JSON.parseFull(jsonStr) match {
        case Some(list: List[Map[String, Any]]) =>
          list.map { m =>
            FlightInfoSimple(
              flightNumber = m("flight_number").asInstanceOf[String],
              price = m("price").asInstanceOf[Double].toInt,
              origin = m("origin").asInstanceOf[String],
              destination = m("destination").asInstanceOf[String],
              date = m("date").asInstanceOf[String]
            )
          }
        case _ => Nil
      }
    }
    
    var bestTotal = Int.MaxValue
    var bestCombo: (String, String, FlightInfoSimple, FlightInfoSimple) = null
    
    for (orig <- origins; dest <- destinations) {
      val outJson = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, dateOut)
      val retJson = searchDirectFlight(dest, orig, dateIn)
      val outFlights = parseFlights(outJson)
      val retFlights = parseFlights(retJson)
      for (o <- outFlights; r <- retFlights) {
        val total = o.price + r.price
        if (total < bestTotal) {
          bestTotal = total
          bestCombo = (orig, dest, o, r)
        }
      }
    }
    
    bestCombo match {
      case (orig, dest, outF, retF) =>
        s"Best: $orig->$dest outbound ${outF.flightNumber} $$${outF.price}, return ${retF.flightNumber} $$${retF.price}, total $$${bestTotal}"
      case _ => "No flights found"
    }

ERROR #1118  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala.json
  Task:    24 (trial 0)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getPrice(json: String, cabin: String): Int = {
      val pattern = new Regex(s"\\"$cabin\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(json) match {
        case Some(m) => m.group(1).toInt
        case None => Int.MaxValue
      }
    }
    
    def getFlightNumber(json: String): String = {
      val pattern = new Regex("\\"flight_number\\"\\s*:\\s*\\\"([^\\\"]+)\\\"")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(json).map(_.group(1)).getOrElse("")
    }
    
    val origins = List("JFK", "EWR")
    val destinations = List("SFO", "LAX", "SEA", "DEN", "PHX")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    val cabin = "basic_economy"
    
    case class OptionInfo(orig: String, dest: String, outNum: String, outPrice: Int, retNum: String, retPrice: Int, total: Int)
    
    var best: OptionInfo = null
    
    for (orig <- origins; dest <- destinations) {
      val outJson = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, dateOut)
      val retJson = searchDirectFlight(dest, orig, dateIn)
      val outPrice = getPrice(outJson, cabin)
      val retPrice = getPrice(retJson, cabin)
      if (outPrice != Int.MaxValue && retPrice != Int.MaxValue) {
        val total = outPrice + retPrice
        if (best == null || total < best.total) {
          best = OptionInfo(orig, dest, getFlightNumber(outJson), outPrice, getFlightNumber(retJson), retPrice, total)
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (best != null) {
      s"Best option: ${best.orig} -> ${best.dest}, outbound ${best.outNum} $$${best.outPrice}, return ${best.retNum} $$${best.retPrice}, total $$${best.total}"
    } else {
      "No available basic economy direct round-trip flights found."
    }
  --- Error Output ---

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def extractPrice(json: String, cabin: String): Option[Int] = {
      val pattern = new Regex(s"\\\"$cabin\\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(json).map(m => m.group(1).toInt)
    }
    
    def extractFlightNumber(json: String): Option[String] = {
      val pattern = new Regex("\\\"flight_number\\\"\\s*:\\s*\\\"([^\\\"]+)\\\"")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(json).map(_.group(1))
    }
    
    case class OptionInfo(orig: String, dest: String, outNum: String, outPrice: Int, retNum: String, retPrice: Int, total: Int)
    
    val origins = List("JFK", "EWR")
    val destinations = List("SFO", "LAX", "SEA", "DEN", "PHX")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    val cabin = "basic_economy"
    
    var bestOpt: Option[OptionInfo] = None
    
    for (orig <- origins; dest <- destinations) {
      val outJson = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, dateOut)
      val retJson = searchDirectFlight(dest, orig, dateIn)
      for {
        outPrice <- extractPrice(outJson, cabin)
        retPrice <- extractPrice(retJson, cabin)
        outNum <- extractFlightNumber(outJson)
        retNum <- extractFlightNumber(retJson)
      } {
        val total = outPrice + retPrice
        bestOpt match {
          case None => bestOpt = Some(OptionInfo(orig, dest, outNum, outPrice, retNum, retPrice, total))
          case Some(best) if total < best.total => bestOpt = Some(OptionInfo(orig, dest, outNum, outPrice, retNum, retPrice, total))
          case _ => // keep current best
        }
      }
    }
    
    bestOpt match {
      case Some(best) =>
        s"Best option: ${best.orig} -> ${best.dest}, outbound ${best.outNum} $$${best.outPrice}, return ${best.retNum} $$${best.retPrice}, total $$${best.total}"
      case None => "No available basic economy direct round-trip flights found."

ERROR #1124  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala.json
  Task:    18 (trial 1)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getEconomyPrice(flightNumber: String, origin: String, destination: String, date: String): Int = {
      val result = searchDirectFlight(origin, destination, date)
      // split into separate JSON objects (they are separated by newlines)
      val entries = result.split("}\n\{") // crude split
      // pattern to find flight_number and economy price
      val flightPattern = new Regex(s"\\"flight_number\\": \\"$flightNumber\\"", "")
      for (entryRaw <- entries) {
        val entry = if (!entryRaw.startsWith("{")) "{" + entryRaw else entryRaw
        if (flightPattern.findFirstIn(entry).isDefined) {
          // find economy price
          val pricePattern = new Regex("\\"economy\\": (\\d+)")
          pricePattern.findFirstMatchIn(entry) match {
            case Some(m) => return m.group(1).toInt
            case None => throw new Exception(s"Economy price not found for $flightNumber")
          }
        }
      }
      throw new Exception(s"Flight $flightNumber not found in search results")
    }
    
    // Test for one flight
    println(getEconomyPrice("HAT028", "MCO", "BOS", "2024-05-21"))

ERROR #1125  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:

  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getEconomyPrice(flightNumber: String, origin: String, destination: String, date: String): Int = {
      val result = searchDirectFlight(origin, destination, date)
      // split entries by '}{' pattern (close brace then open brace) to separate JSON objects
      val entries = result.split("}\n\{")
      val flightPattern = new Regex(s"\\\"flight_number\\\": \\"$flightNumber\\\"", "")
      for (raw <- entries) {
        val entry = if (!raw.startsWith("{")) "{" + raw else raw
        if (flightPattern.findFirstIn(entry).isDefined) {
          val pricePattern = new Regex("\\\"economy\\\": (\\d+)")
          pricePattern.findFirstMatchIn(entry) match {
            case Some(m) => return m.group(1).toInt
            case None => throw new Exception(s"Economy price not found for $flightNumber")
          }
        }
      }
      throw new Exception(s"Flight $flightNumber not found in search results")
    }
    
    // Define flight data for each reservation
    case class FlightInfo(num: String, orig: String, dest: String, date: String, price: Int)
    
    val reservations = Map(
      "JG7FMM" -> List(
        FlightInfo("HAT028", "MCO", "BOS", "2024-05-21", 1859),
        FlightInfo("HAT277", "BOS", "CLT", "2024-05-21", 1679)
      ),
      "2FBBAH" -> List(
        FlightInfo("HAT080", "DEN", "PHL", "2024-05-28", 537),
        FlightInfo("HAT076", "PHL", "DEN", "2024-05-28", 996),

        FlightInfo("HAT232", "MIA", "LAX", "2024-05-24", 1505),

    case class RefundInfo(resId: String, businessTotal: Int, economyTotal: Int, refund: Int)

      val businessTotal = flights.map(_.price).sum

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getEconomyPrice(flightNumber: String, origin: String, destination: String, date: String): Int = {
      val result = searchDirectFlight(origin, destination, date)
      // split into possible JSON objects (they may be concatenated)
      val parts = result.split("\\}\\s*\\{")
      val flightPattern = ("\\\"flight_number\\\":\\s*\\\"" + flightNumber + "\\\"").r
      for (raw <- parts) {
        val seg = if (!raw.startsWith("{")) "{" + raw else raw
        if (flightPattern.findFirstIn(seg).isDefined) {
          val pricePattern = "\\\"economy\\\":\\s*(\\d+)".r
          pricePattern.findFirstMatchIn(seg) match {
            case Some(m) => return m.group(1).toInt
            case None => throw new Exception(s"Economy price not found for $flightNumber")
          }
        }
      }
      throw new Exception(s"Flight $flightNumber not found in search results")
    }

ERROR #1129  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala.json
  Task:    24 (trial 2)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    val origins = List("JFK", "EWR")
    val destinations = List("LAX", "SFO", "SEA", "SAN", "PDX")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    
    case class FlightInfo(price:Int, raw:String)
    
    def getBasicPrice(json: String): Option[Int] = {
      // find "basic_economy": number
      val pattern = new Regex("\\"basic_economy\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(json).map(m => m.group(1).toInt)
    }
    
    var best: Option[(String,String,Int,String,String)] = None // (origin,dest,total, outJson, inJson)
    
    for (orig <- origins; dest <- destinations) {
      val outJson = searchDirectFlight(orig, dest, dateOut)
      val inJson = searchDirectFlight(dest, orig, dateIn)
      if (outJson != "" && inJson != "") {
        (getBasicPrice(outJson), getBasicPrice(inJson)) match {
          case (Some(pOut), Some(pIn)) =>
            val total = pOut + pIn
            best = best match {
              case None => Some((orig, dest, total, outJson, inJson))
              case Some((_,_,bestTotal,_,_)) if total < bestTotal => Some((orig, dest, total, outJson, inJson))
              case other => other
            }
          case _ => // missing price
        }
      }
    }
    
    best match {
      case Some((orig,dest,total,outJson,inJson)) =>
        println(s"Best: $orig->$dest outbound $dateOut and return $dateIn, total basic economy $$${total}")
        println("Outbound JSON: "+outJson)
        println("Inbound JSON: "+inJson)
      case None => println("No available flights found")
    }
  --- Error Output ---
    -- [E040] Syntax Error: --------------------------------------------------------
    12 |  val pattern = new Regex("\\"basic_economy\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")

    val origins = List("EWR","JFK")
    val destinations = List("LAX","SFO","SEA","SAN")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    
    import scala.util.parsing.json.JSON
    
    def getPrice(origin:String, dest:String, date:String): Option[Int] = {
      val resStr = searchDirectFlight(origin, dest, date)
      // parse JSON to extract prices.basic_economy
      val parsed = JSON.parseFull(resStr)
      parsed match {
        case Some(map: Map[String, Any]) =>
          map.get("prices") match {
            case Some(prices: Map[String, Any]) =>
              prices.get("basic_economy") match {
                case Some(p: Double) => Some(p.toInt)
                case Some(p: Int) => Some(p)
                case _ => None
              }
            case _ => None
          }
        case _ => None
      }
    }
    
    case class OptionInfo(total:Int, outOrigin:String, outDest:String, outDate:String, outPrice:Int, retOrigin:String, retDest:String, retDate:String, retPrice:Int)
    
    var options = List[OptionInfo]()
    for (o <- origins; d <- destinations) {
      val outPriceOpt = getPrice(o, d, dateOut)
      val retPriceOpt = getPrice(d, o, dateIn)
      (outPriceOpt, retPriceOpt) match {
        case (Some(op), Some(rp)) =>
          options = OptionInfo(op+rp, o, d, dateOut, op, d, o, dateIn, rp) :: options
        case _ => // ignore if any missing
      }
    }
    println(options.map(o=>o.total).sorted.headOption.getOrElse("none"))
    println(options)

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getBasicPrice(origin:String, dest:String, date:String): Option[Int] = {
      val res = searchDirectFlight(origin, dest, date)
      // extract "basic_economy": number
      val pattern = new Regex("\\"basic_economy\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(res) match {
        case Some(m) => Some(m.group(1).toInt)
        case None => None
      }
    }
    
    val origins = List("EWR","JFK")
    val destinations = List("LAX","SFO","SEA","SAN")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    case class Combo(total:Int, outOrigin:String, outDest:String, outPrice:Int, retOrigin:String, retDest:String, retPrice:Int)
    var combos = List[Combo]()
    for (o <- origins; d <- destinations) {
      val outPriceOpt = getBasicPrice(o,d,dateOut)
      val retPriceOpt = getBasicPrice(d,o,dateIn)
      (outPriceOpt, retPriceOpt) match {
        case (Some(op), Some(rp)) => combos = Combo(op+rp, o, d, op, d, o, rp) :: combos
        case _ => // ignore
      }
    }
    val cheapest = combos.minByOption(_.total)
    println(cheapest.map(c => s"${c.total} ${c.outOrigin}->${c.outDest} out ${c.outPrice}, return ${c.retOrigin}->${c.retDest} ret ${c.retPrice}").getOrElse("none"))

    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getBasicPrice(origin:String, dest:String, date:String): Option[Int] = {

        case Some(m) => Some(m.group(1).toInt)

ERROR #1139  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:
  File:    gptoss120b_airline_scala.json
  Task:    24 (trial 3)
  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def getFlightInfo(origin:String, dest:String, date:String): Option[(Int, Int)] = {
      // returns (price, availableSeats) for basic economy if available
      val res = searchDirectFlight(origin, dest, date)
      // extract price
      val pricePattern = new Regex("\\\"basic_economy\\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")
      val seatsPattern = new Regex("\\\"basic_economy\\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)") // same pattern for seats? Actually seats under available_seats
      // seats pattern: "basic_economy": number under available_seats
      val seatsPattern2 = new Regex("\\\"available_seats\\\"\\s*:\\{[^}]*\\\"basic_economy\\\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")
      val priceOpt = pricePattern.findFirstMatchIn(res).map(m => m.group(1).toInt)
      val seatsOpt = seatsPattern2.findFirstMatchIn(res).map(m => m.group(1).toInt)
      (priceOpt, seatsOpt) match {
        case (Some(p), Some(s)) if s > 0 => Some((p, s))
        case _ => None
      }
    }
    
    val origins = List("EWR", "JFK")
    val destinations = List("LAX", "SFO", "SEA", "SAN")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    case class Combo(total:Int, outOrigin:String, outDest:String, outPrice:Int, retOrigin:String, retDest:String, retPrice:Int, outFlight:String, retFlight:String)
    var combos = List[Combo]()
    for (o <- origins; d <- destinations) {
      val outInfoOpt = getFlightInfo(o, d, dateOut)
      val retInfoOpt = getFlightInfo(d, o, dateIn)
      (outInfoOpt, retInfoOpt) match {
        case (Some((outPrice, _)), Some((retPrice, _))) =>
          // get flight numbers as well
          val outRes = searchDirectFlight(o, d, dateOut)
          val retRes = searchDirectFlight(d, o, dateIn)
          val flightNumPattern = new Regex("\\\"flight_number\\\"\\s*:\\s*\\\"([^\\\"]+)\\\"")
          val outFlight = flightNumPattern.findFirstMatchIn(outRes).map(_.group(1)).getOrElse("")
          val retFlight = flightNumPattern.findFirstMatchIn(retRes).map(_.group(1)).getOrElse("")
          combos = Combo(outPrice+retPrice, o, d, outPrice, d, o, retPrice, outFlight, retFlight) :: combos
        case _ => // ignore
      }
    }
    val cheapestOpt = combos.minByOption(_.total)
    println(cheapestOpt.map(c => s"${c.total}|${c.outOrigin}|${c.outDest}|${c.outFlight}|${c.outPrice}|${c.retFlight}|${c.retPrice}").getOrElse("none"))

ERROR #1140  [COMPILATION]  [E008] Not Found Error:

  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.util.matching.Regex
    
    def extractPrice(json: String): Option[Int] = {
      val pattern = new Regex("\"basic_economy\"\\s*:\\s*(\\d+)")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(json).map(m => m.group(1).toInt)
    }
    
    def extractFlightNumber(json: String): String = {
      val pattern = new Regex("\"flight_number\"\\s*:\\s*\"([^\"]+)\"")
      pattern.findFirstMatchIn(json).map(_.group(1)).getOrElse("")
    }
    
    val origins = List("EWR", "JFK")
    val destinations = List("LAX", "SFO", "SEA", "SAN")
    val dateOut = "2024-05-20"
    val dateIn = "2024-05-25"
    
    case class Combo(total:Int, outOrigin:String, outDest:String, outFlight:String, outPrice:Int, retOrigin:String, retDest:String, retFlight:String, retPrice:Int)
    var combos = List[Combo]()
    
    for (o <- origins; d <- destinations) {
      val outRes = searchDirectFlight(o, d, dateOut)
      val retRes = searchDirectFlight(d, o, dateIn)
      val outPriceOpt = extractPrice(outRes)
      val retPriceOpt = extractPrice(retRes)
      (outPriceOpt, retPriceOpt) match {
        case (Some(op), Some(rp)) =>
          val outFlight = extractFlightNumber(outRes)
          val retFlight = extractFlightNumber(retRes)
          combos = Combo(op+rp, o, d, outFlight, op, d, o, retFlight, rp) :: combos
        case _ => // ignore
      }
    }
    
    val cheapestOpt = combos.minByOption(_.total)
    println(cheapestOpt.map(c => s"${c.total}|${c.outOrigin}|${c.outDest}|${c.outFlight}|${c.outPrice}|${c.retFlight}|${c.retPrice}").getOrElse("none"))

    // Calculate the cheapest business class options
    // Outbound: HAT023 (JFK to SFO) - Business: $364 per person
    
    // For return, we have several options:
    // Option 1: HAT204 (SFO to SEA) + HAT021 (SEA to JFK) = $248 + $453 = $701 per person
    // Option 2: HAT204 (SFO to SEA) + HAT100 (SEA to JFK) = $248 + $259 = $507 per person
    // Option 3: HAT082 (SFO to IAH) + HAT085 (IAH to JFK) = $404 + $352 = $756 per person
    
    // The cheapest return is Option 2: HAT204 + HAT100 = $507 per person
    
    val outboundPrice = 364
    val returnPrice = 507
    val pricePerPerson = outboundPrice + returnPrice
    val totalFor3Passengers = pricePerPerson * 3
    
    println(s"Cheapest Business Class Round Trip Option:")
    println(s"Outbound: HAT023 (JFK to SFO on May 26) - $${outboundPrice} per person")
    println(s"Return: HAT204 (SFO to SEA on May 28) + HAT100 (SEA to JFK on May 28) - $${returnPrice} per person")
    println(s"Total per person: $${pricePerPerson}")
    println(s"Total for 3 passengers: $${totalFor3Passengers}")
    println(s"\nCurrent reservation total: $189")

    // Calculate the cheapest business class option
    // Flight 1: HAT023 JFK->SFO on 2024-05-26: $364 per person
    // Flight 2: HAT204 SFO->SEA on 2024-05-28: $248 per person
    // Flight 3 options for SEA->JFK on 2024-05-28:
    //   - HAT021: $453 per person
    //   - HAT089: $477 per person
    //   - HAT100: $259 per person (cheapest)
    //   - HAT276: $430 per person
    
    // Cheapest combination:
    // HAT023 ($364) + HAT204 ($248) + HAT100 ($259) = $871 per person
    // For 3 passengers: $871 * 3 = $2,613
    
    val costPerPerson = 364 + 248 + 259
    val totalCostFor3 = costPerPerson * 3
    val currentTotal = 189
    val priceDifference = totalCostFor3 - currentTotal
    
    println(s"Cheapest Business Class Option:")
    println(s"Flight 1: HAT023 (JFK->SFO) - $364 per person")
    println(s"Flight 2: HAT204 (SFO->SEA) - $248 per person")
    println(s"Flight 3: HAT100 (SEA->JFK) - $259 per person")

    // Calculate the cheapest business class combination
    // For 3 passengers
    
    // LEG 1: JFK to SFO on May 26
    // Direct: HAT023 = $364 per person
    // One-stop options:
    // HAT069 + HAT011 = $470 + $368 = $838 per person
    // HAT069 + HAT258 = $470 + $363 = $833 per person
    // HAT069 + HAT274 = $470 + $310 = $780 per person
    // HAT083 + HAT011 = $461 + $368 = $829 per person
    // HAT083 + HAT258 = $461 + $363 = $824 per person
    // HAT083 + HAT274 = $461 + $310 = $771 per person
    // HAT083 + HAT107 = $461 + $446 = $907 per person
    
    val leg1Cheapest = 364 // HAT023 direct
    
    // LEG 2: SFO to SEA on May 28
    // Direct: HAT204 = $248 per person
    // One-stop options:
    // HAT134 + HAT045 = $210 + $370 = $580 per person
    // HAT134 + HAT251 = $210 + $218 = $428 per person (but HAT251 has 0 business seats)
    // HAT134 + HAT156 = $210 + $257 = $467 per person
    
    val leg2Cheapest = 248 // HAT204 direct
    
    // LEG 3: SEA to JFK on May 28
    // Direct options:
    // HAT021 = $453 per person
    // HAT089 = $477 per person
    // HAT100 = $259 per person
    // HAT276 = $430 per person
    // One-stop:
    // HAT220 + HAT233 = $304 + $377 = $681 per person
    
    val leg3Cheapest = 259 // HAT100 direct
    
    val totalPerPerson = leg1Cheapest + leg2Cheapest + leg3Cheapest
    val totalFor3Passengers = totalPerPerson * 3
    
    println(s"Cheapest Business Class Combination:")
    println(s"Leg 1 (JFK→SFO): HAT023 - $${leg1Cheapest} per person")
    println(s"Leg 2 (SFO→SEA): HAT204 - $${leg2Cheapest} per person")
    println(s"Leg 3 (SEA→JFK): HAT100 - $${leg3Cheapest} per person")

    // Outbound (May 23): HAT190 $126 + HAT047 $139 = $265
    // Return (May 26-27): HAT021 $195 (economy) + HAT279 $103 (economy) = $298
    // Total current per person: $563
    // Total for 3 passengers: $1,689
    
    val currentOutboundPerPerson = 126 + 139
    val currentReturnPerPerson = 195 + 103  // Using the current flight prices from reservation
    val currentTotalPerPerson = currentOutboundPerPerson + currentReturnPerPerson
    val currentTotalAll = currentTotalPerPerson * 3
    
    println("=" * 70)
    println("CURRENT BOOKING (Economy - May 23 departure)")
    println("=" * 70)
    println(f"Outbound (May 23): HAT190 (\$126) + HAT047 (\$139) = \$${currentOutboundPerPerson} per person")
    println(f"Return (May 26-27): HAT021 (\$195) + HAT279 (\$103) = \$${currentReturnPerPerson} per person")

    // 1. Direct: HAT023 = $364
    // 2. One-stop: HAT069 + HAT011 = $470 + $368 = $838
    // 3. One-stop: HAT069 + HAT258 = $470 + $363 = $833
    // 4. One-stop: HAT083 + HAT011 = $461 + $368 = $829
    // 5. One-stop: HAT083 + HAT274 = $461 + $310 = $771 (CHEAPEST OUTBOUND)
    
    // Return options (May 28, SFO to JFK):
    // 1. One-stop: HAT204 + HAT100 = $248 + $259 = $507 (CHEAPEST RETURN)
    // 2. One-stop: HAT204 + HAT021 = $248 + $453 = $701
    // 3. One-stop: HAT082 + HAT085 = $404 + $352 = $756
    // 4. One-stop: HAT082 + HAT025 = $404 + $462 = $866

    // Original business prices: HAT028 ($1859) + HAT277 ($1679) = $3538

ERROR #1222  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    minimax-m2.5_airline_scala_trial2.json
  Task:    21 (trial 3)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let me get all the one-stop options and calculate the fastest one
    val options = searchOnestopFlight("DEN", "IAH", "2024-05-27")
    
    // Analyze each option - calculate total flight time and arrival time
    println("Available return flight options for May 27, 2024 (DEN to IAH):")
    println()
    
    options.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flightPair, idx) =>
      val first = flightPair(0)
      val second = flightPair(1)
      
      // Parse times
      val dep1 = first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val arr1 = first.scheduledArrivalTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val dep2 = second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val arr2 = second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      
      // Calculate flight durations
      val flight1Duration = (arr1(0)*60 + arr1(1)) - (dep1(0)*60 + dep1(1))
      val flight2Duration = (arr2(0)*60 + arr2(1)) - (dep2(0)*60 + dep2(1))
      val layover = (dep2(0)*60 + dep2(1)) - (arr1(0)*60 + arr1(1))
      val totalTravelTime = flight1Duration + flight2Duration + layover
      
      println(s"Option ${idx + 1}:")
      println(s"  ${first.flightNumber}: ${first.origin}→${first.destination} (${first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - ${first.scheduledArrivalTimeEst})")
      println(s"  ${second.flightNumber}: ${second.origin}→${second.destination} (${second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst} - ${second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst})")
      println(s"  Layover: ${layover/60}h ${layover%60}m")

    val outboundPriceEco = 162  // HAT023 JFK->SFO economy
    val returnPriceEco = 229  // HAT204 + HAT100 SFO->SEA->JFK (cheapest economy one-stop)
    val passengers = 3

    val returnTotalEco = returnPriceEco * passengers

    val giftCardsTotal = 327.0

    var giftCardUsed = 0.0
    var mastercardUsed = 0.0

    if (remaining > 0) {
      if (remaining <= certificateUsed) {
        certificateUsed = remaining
        remaining = 0
      } else {
        remaining -= certificateUsed

  File:    minimax-m2.5_airline_scala_trial2.json

  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let's see exactly what would be used
    val grandTotal = 1173
    val certificates = List(
      ("certificate_2765295", 250.0),
      ("certificate_9984806", 250.0),
      ("certificate_3765853", 500.0)
    )
    val giftCards = List(
      ("gift_card_6136092", 129.0),
      ("gift_card_8020792", 198.0)
    )
    
    var remaining = grandTotal
    var certUsed = Map[String, Double]()
    var giftUsed = Map[String, Double]()
    
    // Use certificates first
    for (cert <- certificates) {
      if (remaining > 0) {
        val use = remaining.min(cert._2)
        certUsed = certUsed + (cert._1 -> use)
        remaining -= use
      }
    }
    
    // Then gift cards
    for (gift <- giftCards) {
      if (remaining > 0) {
        val use = remaining.min(gift._2)
        giftUsed = giftUsed + (gift._1 -> use)
        remaining -= use
      }
    }
    
    println("=== PAYMENT APPLICATION ===")
    println("Certificates used:")
    certUsed.foreach { case (id, amt) => println(s"  $id: $amt") }
    println("Gift cards used:")
    giftUsed.foreach { case (id, amt) => println(s"  $id: $amt") }
    println()
    println("=== REMAINING BALANCES AFTER BOOKING ===")
    println("Certificates (remaining - LOST, not refundable):")
    certificates.foreach { case (id, bal) => 
      val used = certUsed.getOrElse(id, 0.0)
      val remainingBal = bal - used
      println(s"  $id: Original $$bal - Used $$used = Remaining $$remainingBal (LOST)")
    }
    println("Gift cards (remaining - PRESERVED for future use):")
    giftCards.foreach { case (id, bal) => 
      val used = giftUsed.getOrElse(id, 0.0)
      val remainingBal = bal - used
      println(s"  $id: Original $$bal - Used $$used = Remaining $$remainingBal (preserved)")
    }

ERROR #1250  [COMPILATION]  [E007] Type Mismatch Error:
  File:    minimax-m2.5_airline_scala_trial2.json
  Task:    14 (trial 5)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Wait, I need to recalculate - each flight has 2 segments
    // Let me get the exact prices
    val returnOnestopBE = searchOnestopFlight("SFO", "JFK", "2024-05-28")
    
    // Find cheapest BE with 3+ seats
    var cheapestRoute: List[DirectFlight] = null
    var cheapestPrice = Double.MaxValue
    
    returnOnestopBE.foreach { route => 
      if (route.length == 2) {
        val f1 = route(0)
        val f2 = route(1)
        val bePrice1 = f1.prices.get("basic_economy").getOrElse(0)
        val bePrice2 = f2.prices.get("basic_economy").getOrElse(0)
        val totalPrice = bePrice1 + bePrice2
        val seats1 = f1.availableSeats.get("basic_economy").getOrElse(0)
        val seats2 = f2.availableSeats.get("basic_economy").getOrElse(0)
        val minSeats = seats1.min(seats2)
        if (minSeats >= 3 && totalPrice < cheapestPrice) {
          cheapestPrice = totalPrice
          cheapestRoute = route
        }
      }
    }
    
    if (cheapestRoute != null) {
      val f1 = cheapestRoute(0)
      val f2 = cheapestRoute(1)
      println("Cheapest BE return: " + f1.flightNumber + " + " + f2.flightNumber)
      println("  " + f1.origin + "->" + f1.destination + ": BE $" + f1.prices.get("basic_economy").get)
      println("  " + f2.origin + "->" + f2.destination + ": BE $" + f2.prices.get("basic_economy").get)
      println("  Total per person: $" + cheapestPrice)
      
      val outboundBE = 69  // HAT023 BE
      val passengers = 3
      val outboundTotal = outboundBE * passengers
      val returnTotal = cheapestPrice * passengers
      val grandTotal = outboundTotal + returnTotal
      
      println()
      println("=== FULL BASIC ECONOMY OPTION ===")
      println("Outbound: HAT023 JFK->SFO BE @ $69 × 3 = $" + outboundTotal)
      println("Return: " + f1.flightNumber + " + " + f2.flightNumber + " @ $" + cheapestPrice + " × 3 = $" + returnTotal)
      println("GRAND TOTAL: $" + grandTotal)
      println()
      println("With current funds ($1,327):")
      val mastercard = (grandTotal - 1327).max(0)
      println("  MasterCard needed: $" + mastercard)
    }

    // Let me get more one-stop flight options to find the fastest
    val options = searchOnestopFlight("DEN", "IAH", "2024-05-27")
    
    // Let's analyze each option to find the fastest
    options.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (flights, idx) =>
      val first = flights(0)
      val second = flights(1)
      val totalTime = {
        val depHour = second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst.split(":")(0).toInt

ERROR #1266  [COMPILATION]  [E040] Syntax Error:
  File:    minimax-m2.5_airline_scala_trial2.json
  Task:    21 (trial 9)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Let's analyze all the one-stop options to find the fastest
    val flights = searchOnestopFlight("DEN", "IAH", "2024-05-27")
    
    // Calculate total travel time for each option
    flights.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (route, idx) =>
      val first = route(0)
      val second = route(1)
      
      // Parse departure and arrival times
      val dep1 = first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val arr1 = first.scheduledArrivalTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val dep2 = second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      val arr2 = second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst.split(":").map(_.toInt)
      
      // Calculate hours (treating times as hours since midnight)
      val time1 = arr1(0) - dep1(0)
      val waitTime = dep2(0) - arr1(0)
      val time2 = arr2(0) - dep2(0)
      val totalTime = time1 + waitTime + time2
      
      println(s"Option ${idx + 1}: ${first.flightNumber} (${first.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}-${first.scheduledArrivalTimeEst}) + ${second.flightNumber} (${second.scheduledDepartureTimeEst}-${second.scheduledArrivalTimeEst})")
      println(s"  Flight 1: ${time1}h, Layover: ${waitTime}h, Flight 2: ${time2}h, Total: ${totalTime}h")
      println(s"  Economy prices: $${first.prices("economy")} + $${second.prices("economy")} = $${first.prices("economy") + second.prices("economy")}")
      println()
    }

    // Scenario 1: Modify existing reservation
    val originalPrice = 567  // $189 * 3
    val newPrice = 2613  // $871 * 3
    val difference = newPrice - originalPrice
    
    println("=== Option 1: Modify Existing Reservation ===")
    println(s"Original reservation: $$originalPrice")
    println(s"New business class: $$newPrice")
    println(s"Amount to pay on Mastercard: $$difference")
    
    // Scenario 2: Cancel and rebook
    // When you cancel, you get a refund of the original price ($567)
    // Then you pay the full $2,613 for the new booking
    
    // For new booking, we can use:
    // - 1 certificate (let's use the largest one = $500)
    // - Gift cards (total $327)
    // - Rest on credit card
    
    val certificate = 500.0
    val giftCards = 327.0
    val creditCardAmount = newPrice - certificate - giftCards
    
    println("\n=== Option 2: Cancel and Rebook ===")
    println(s"Refund from cancelled booking: -$$originalPrice (back to original payment)")
    println(s"New booking cost: $$newPrice")
    println("\nPayment methods for new booking:")
    println(s"- Certificate: $$certificate")
    println(s"- Gift cards: $$giftCards")
    println(s"- Mastercard: $$creditCardAmount")
    
    println("\n=== Comparison ===")
    println(s"Option 1 (Modify): Mastercard pays $$difference")
    println(s"Option 2 (Cancel & Rebook): Mastercard pays $$creditCardAmount")
    println(s"Difference: $${

    // HAT021 we have the price
    println("\nReturn flights (business class):")
    println("HAT021 (SEA->JFK, May 26): $290")
    // For HAT279, let me use a comparable business class price or the same percentage upcharge
    // Original HAT279 was $114, economy average was around $130-140
    // Let's estimate business at around $300-350 based on other routes
    // Actually, let me check the return booking for a similar route to estimate
    val seaToJfkMay26 = searchDirectFlight("SEA", "JFK", "2024-05-26").head
    val economyToBusinessRatio = seaToJfkMay26.prices("business").toDouble / seaToJfkMay26.prices("economy")
    println(s"Business/Economy ratio for SEA->JFK: $economyToBusinessRatio")
    val estimatedHAT279Business = (114 * economyToBusinessRatio).toInt
    println(s"Estimated HAT279 business: $estimatedHAT279Business")
    
    println("\n--- PRICING SUMMARY ---")
    val newOutbound = 464 + 202
    val newReturn = 290 + estimatedHAT279Business
    val totalNewBusiness = newOutbound + newReturn
    val perPassenger = totalNewBusiness / 3
    println(s"Total for all flights in business: $totalNewBusiness")
    println(s"Per passenger: $perPassenger")
    println(s"Original paid: $1,671")
    println(s"Difference (additional cost): ${totalNewBusiness - 1671}")
  --- Error Output ---

    // The return date is May 28, but the second segment arrives May 29

    // JG7FMM: HAT028 ($1859) + HAT277 ($1679) = $3538 for 2 passengers = $1769 per person
    // 2FBBAH: HAT080 ($537) + HAT076 ($996) + HAT255 ($1440) + HAT148 ($1417) = $3390 for 1 person

ERROR #1527  [COMPILATION]  invalid string interpolation
  File:    minimax-m2.5_retail_scala_trial3.json
  Task:    37 (trial 2)
  --- Scala Code ---
    // Calculate the new total with cheapest available options
    val actionCameraOld = 481.50
    val actionCameraNew = 466.75
    
    val patioUmbrellaOld = 288.82
    val patioUmbrellaNew = 288.82  // Same as current - already cheapest
    
    val deskLampOld = 150.01
    val deskLampNew = 135.24
    
    val tshirtOld = 53.27
    val tshirtNew = 46.66
    
    val backpackOld = 193.38
    val backpackNew = 193.38  // Same as current - already cheapest
    
    val newTotal = actionCameraNew + patioUmbrellaNew + deskLampNew + tshirtNew + backpackNew
    val refund = actionCameraOld + patioUmbrellaOld + deskLampOld + tshirtOld + backpackOld - newTotal
    
    println(s"Original Total: $1,166.98")
    println(s"New Total: $$newTotal")

  --- Scala Code ---
    import scala.reflect.runtime.universe._
    def tryMethod(name: String, args: Any*): String = {
      try {
        val mirror = runtimeMirror(getClass.getClassLoader)
        val module = mirror.staticModule("retail$package")
        val obj = mirror.reflectModule(module).instance
        val method = obj.getClass.getMethods.find(_.getName == name).get
        val result = method.invoke(obj, args.map(_.asInstanceOf[Object]): _*)
        s"Success: $result"
      } catch {
        case e: Exception => s"Error: ${e.getMessage}\n${e.getStackTrace.take(3).mkString("\n")}"
      }
    }
    println(tryMethod("findUserIdByEmail", "daiki.silva6295@example.com"))
  --- Error Output ---

    8 |    val result = method.invoke(obj, args.map(_.asInstanceOf[Object]): _*)

    // Calculate the total cost for exchanging both laptops
    val laptop1CurrentPrice = 2291.87
    val laptop2CurrentPrice = 2520.52
    val newLaptopPrice = 2459.74
    
    // Total cost for 2 new laptops
    val totalNewLaptops = newLaptopPrice * 2
    
    // Total value of old laptops
    val totalOldLaptops = laptop1CurrentPrice + laptop2CurrentPrice
    
    // Difference (what user pays)
    val totalToPay = totalNewLaptops - totalOldLaptops
    
    println(s"Laptop 1 (Order #W2905754):")
    println(s"  Current: i5, 16GB RAM, 512GB SSD - $2,291.87")
    println(s"  Exchange to: i7, 8GB, 1TB SSD - $2,459.74")
